companies.body:
# Bastion Security Products

> UK manufacturer of modular, demountable secure room and armoured walling systems for government and defence use.

## What they do

Bastion specialises in modular, reusable secure room and partitioning systems. Its armoured walling and enclosure products provide burglar, bullet and blast resistance, along with resistance to forced entry and surreptitious attack. The bolt-together systems can divide an existing space, create five- or six-sided secure rooms of almost any size, or reinforce weak walls, and are demountable and relocatable.

## Products and solutions

- **BastionWALL A.C.E.** - CPNI-approved walling for UK Government use; meets the MOD physical security standard for highest-level secure containment.
- **BastionWALL4** - LPS 1175 SR4 rated walling system.
- **BastionWALL5** - LPS 1175 SR5 rated walling system.
- **Multi-Threat modular room and walling system** - upgradable on site as threat levels change; holds LPS 1175 Issue 8 certifications D5 to G5 with a 120-minute fire integrity rating.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001; Cyber Essentials; Cyber Essentials Plus; CPNI approval; MOD physical security standard compliance; LPS 1175 product certifications (SR4, SR5, Issue 8 D5 to G5).
- **Memberships:** ADS Group; Made in Britain; Secured by Design.

## Ownership

Acquired by BeaverFit in September 2025, folding Bastion's modular walling into BeaverFit's force-protection and deployable-infrastructure offering. UK design and manufacturing retained.

## Recent news

- **2025-09-04** - Acquired by BeaverFit to expand its global physical security capabilities; combined offering shown at DSEI 2025. [source](https://beaverfiteu.com/beaverfit-acquires-bastion-to-expand-global-physical-security-capabilities/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.bastionprotects.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/bastion-security-products-ltd

companies.name: BattleBottle
companies.summary: AI-powered drone warfare simulator combining a consumer mobile game and a browser-based tactical advisor for defence customers, underpinned by a shared simulation engine and crowdsourced AI data layer.
companies.body:
# BattleBottle
> AI-powered drone warfare simulator combining a consumer mobile game and a browser-based tactical advisor for defence customers, underpinned by a shared simulation engine and crowdsourced AI data layer.

## What they do
BattleBottle is a UK defence-tech startup building AI-powered simulation tools for drone warfare. The company runs two surfaces off one simulation engine: a mobile consumer game (B2C) where players make tactical decisions using an in-game AI advisor, and a browser-based tactical advisor for defence customers (B2G) that models force composition, deployment and engagement trade-offs across configurable scenarios. Every game session generates labelled training data that feeds back into the AI model. Platforms and maps reference real systems in service, including Switchblade, RQ-11 Raven and Anduril Anvil. The positioning aligns to UK Strategic Defence Review 2025 priorities on human-machine teaming.

## Products and solutions
- **BattleBottle (B2C)** - Mobile drone combat game generating crowdsourced AI training data through player tactical decisions.
- **BattleBottle Tactical Advisor (B2G)** - Browser-based decision support tool for defence customers, comparing force composition and engagement outcomes across three operational modes.

## Links
- Website: https://battlebottle.tech/

## Sources
Public information verified 2026-06-29.

companies.name: Battlespace Simulations, Inc.
companies.summary: Military modelling, simulation and analysis software for multidomain combat training and rehearsal.
companies.body:
# Battlespace Simulations, Inc.

> Military modelling, simulation and analysis software for multidomain combat training and rehearsal.

## What they do

Battlespace Simulations, Inc. (BSI) provides modelling, simulation and analysis software focused on multidomain combat simulation in near-peer threat environments, simulating the entire battlespace including non-visible effects. Its software is used by militaries and companies internationally for joint fires training, wargaming, mission planning and rehearsal, electronic warfare training, operational research and after-action review. In February 2025 BSI was acquired by FAAC Incorporated, a division of Arotech Corporation.

## Products and solutions

- **MACE (Modern Air Combat Environment)** - computer-generated forces engine used as the simulation engine behind multiple combat system simulations worldwide.
- **ARMOR (Augmented Reality Mission Observation & Rehearsal)** - real-time 3D visualisation of the battlespace, with terrain that can be built anywhere in the world within MACE.

## Recent news

- **2025-02-28** - FAAC Incorporated, a division of Arotech Corporation, announced the acquisition of Battlespace Simulations. [source](https://www.faac.com/blog/2025/02/28/faac-incorporated-acquires-battlespace-simulations-inc/)

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/battlespace-simulations-inc-

# BeaverFit

> UK manufacturer of containerised gym systems, outdoor fitness equipment, and special operations training infrastructure for military and defence customers worldwide.

## What they do

BeaverFit has been a leading supplier of container gyms and outdoor fitness solutions to the US and UK militaries since 2010. In 2015 the company launched BeaverFit Special Operations Equipment (SOE) as a dedicated sister capability, supplying bespoke special operations training infrastructure. Customers include the UK MOD, UK Special Forces, Royal Marines, NATO, US Armed Forces, and the Foreign Commonwealth Office. The company has delivered over 350 container gyms and more than 30 SOE projects.

## Products and solutions

- **FOB-Series Container Gyms** - fully functional containerised multi-modality fitness facilities deployable to forward operating bases.
- **BeaverFit SOE Training Towers** - purpose-built special operations training structures.
- **Live Fire Shoot Houses** - modular live-fire training facilities.
- **Urban Climbing Features** - tactical urban environment training infrastructure.
- **Air Delivery Training Stations** - parachute and air insertion training platforms.
- **Outdoor Fitness Equipment** - rigs, racks, and functional training installations for permanent military bases.

# Bertin Exensor

> Designs and manufactures networked Unattended Ground Sensor (UGS) systems for military and security surveillance, with its production site in the UK.

## What they do

Bertin Exensor designs, develops and manufactures networked Unattended Ground Sensor (UGS) systems used for force protection, long-range surveillance, counter-mobility and asset protection. Founded in 1987, the company has its headquarters and main R&D centre in Lund, Sweden, a communications and network lab in Kalmar, and its production and manufacturing site near Basingstoke, UK. Since 2017 it has been a subsidiary of the French group Bertin Technologies. The UK entity, Bertin Exensor Limited, handles production, post-design services, product R&D and sales, including support to UK MOD contracts.

## Products and solutions

- **Flexnet** - wireless UGS platform combining seismic, acoustic, magnetic and thermal imaging sensors to detect, classify and report targets.
- **UGS sensors** - the Mini Mk3, Scout Mk3, Surveyor, PIR and MicroRadar ground sensors.
- **Flexnet Commander** - command and control software for the sensor network.
- **Gateways and modems** - networking hardware linking sensors to the C2 system.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2025-11-20** - Awarded a 9-year EUR 45 million frame contract for Unmanned Unattended Ground Sensors, with a first call-off of nearly EUR 30 million for the Dutch Armed Forces. [source](https://www.exensor.com/bertin-exensor-has-been-awarded-the-frame-contract-for-the-delivery-of-unmanned-unattended-ground-sensors-uugs-commander-commit-admiral-jan-willem-hartman-and-vp-sales-director-of-bertin-exensor-mr/)
- **2025-04-03** - Signed a framework agreement with the Swedish, Finnish, Danish and Norwegian defence procurement agencies for the supply of Flexnet UGS systems. [source](https://www.exensor.com/bertin-exensor-signs-framework-agreement-with-swedish-defence-materiel-administration-fmv-the-finnish-defence-forces-logistics-command-the-danish-ministry-of-defence-acquisition-and-logistics-orga/)

> UK entity of the German Bertrandt engineering group, which provides engineering and development services across automotive, aerospace and defence.

## What they do

Bertrandt UK Limited is the UK entity of the Bertrandt Group, a German engineering and development services company wholly owned by Bertrandt AG. The UK operation has a long-standing automotive engineering presence, including work as a Ford Tier 1 supplier from its Dunton site. At group level Bertrandt provides engineering and consultancy to the aerospace and defence sector, covering the lifecycle of military aircraft systems from analysis and design through development, verification and in-service support, plus structural design and safety-critical software development to standards such as RTCA DO-178C.

## Products and solutions

- **Aerospace and defence engineering services** - system development and integration, structural design and physical engineering for military aircraft platforms.
- **Safety-critical software engineering** - development to aerospace and functional-safety standards including DO-178C and IEC 61508.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

# Beyond Blue

> Cyber security and operational resilience consultancy working with boards and senior leaders, with national security heritage.

## What they do

Beyond Blue is a remote-first UK consultancy specialising in cyber security, crisis exercising and operational resilience. It works with senior teams and boards to prepare organisations for incident response and recovery, and to manage technology and cyber risk across the wider organisation. Its leadership and advisory team draw on senior roles in UK defence and national security, including the Ministry of Defence and GCHQ.

- **Organisational resilience** - strengthening response and recovery capabilities, scenario testing and crisis exercising for senior leaders.
- **Supply chain resilience** - assessing and remediating risk across direct suppliers and lower-tier parties.

companies.body:
# Bifrost Defence

> Copenhagen-based defence venture studio that co-founds and invests in hardware-focused defence technology companies.

## What they do

Bifrost Defence is a venture studio operating within the Bifrost Studios ecosystem, founded in 2025. Rather than following a traditional venture-capital model, it actively co-founds and builds companies from the ground up, providing operational teams, go-to-market strategy, legal, finance and fundraising support. It partners with founders, engineers, military personnel and researchers to turn early-stage ideas into scalable, field-tested defence products. Stated areas of interest include unmanned ground vehicles, unmanned surface vehicles, rocketry, infrastructure, energy, communications and defence AI.

## Products and solutions

- **Venture studio model** - co-founds and builds hardware-focused, mission-critical defence technology companies, with comprehensive operational and investment support.
- **Portfolio** - portfolio ventures include Thor's Haven, which provides towable, combat-proven infrastructure deployed in Ukraine as trauma care centres, command posts or drone manufacturing facilities.

## Recent news

Bikar Aerospace Metals Ltd is the UK arm of the German BIKAR group, supplying semi-finished non-ferrous metals from a Bristol base. It stocks and processes aluminium, copper, brass and bronze, including aerospace aluminium, supplied as plates, sheets, bars, profiles, tubes, rings and precision-cut blanks. # BiP Solutions

> Public sector procurement intelligence and e-sourcing platform; official publisher of MOD contract information for over 16 years.

## What they do

BiP Solutions has operated at the interface of public and private sector procurement for more than 35 years, making public sector contracting more transparent, competitive, and efficient. The company is the official publisher of MOD contract information and operates Defence Contracts International (DCI), the primary source of MOD and international defence contract intelligence. Its Delta eSourcing platform is used by over 500 public sector organisations and approximately 100,000 active suppliers.

## Products and solutions

- **Delta eSourcing** - UK-compliant e-procurement platform including Tender Manager, Supplier Manager, Contract Manager, eAuctions, and Buyer Portal.

Bitwise provides software development, testing and software safety management for systems where assurance, safety and performance matter. # Black Space Technology

> UK military medical software SME specialising in combat telemedicine and digital battlefield casualty care.

## What they do

Black Space Technology is a privately funded UK SME, formed in 2018, that develops scalable, future-proofed mobile telemedicine and telehealth solutions for the digitalisation of the medical battlespace. Its solutions are software focused, hardware agnostic and configurable to local service needs including language localisation. They are used internationally by intergovernmental, non-governmental and military customers deployed on land, sea and air.

## Products and solutions

- **Rapid Triage-EPR** - a multi-language electronic patient record with wireless vital-sign monitoring and telemedicine capability for prehospital care and remote environments.

companies.name: Blackbird.AI
companies.summary: AI-driven narrative and disinformation intelligence platform serving national security organisations, governments and enterprises.
companies.body:
# Blackbird.AI

> AI-driven narrative and disinformation intelligence platform serving national security organisations, governments and enterprises.

## What they do

Blackbird.AI develops the Constellation Platform, an AI-enabled narrative intelligence system that detects, analyses and prioritises harmful narratives, disinformation campaigns and coordinated influence operations across social media, news, and the dark web. The platform identifies threat actors, maps the networks through which narratives spread, and scores risk across more than 25 languages. Customers include national security organisations, NATO, and major enterprises globally.

## Products and solutions

- **Constellation Platform** - Core narrative intelligence platform combining media monitoring, sentiment analysis, trend detection and bot-behaviour analysis to surface harmful narratives in real time.
- **Compass Context** - Harmful narrative detection across text and media content.
- **Compass Vision** - Detection of deepfake and AI-generated images.
- **RAV3N Watch** - Curated narrative research and analyst expertise service.
- **RAV3N Recon** - Influencer and threat actor investigation tool.
- **RAV3N Agent** - Embedded AI analyst for Constellation workflows.
- **Constellation API** - Programmatic integration layer for narrative intelligence data.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

## Recent news

- **2026-02** - Brandwatch and Blackbird.AI selected by NATO to deliver an Information Environment Assessment Capability (IEAC), providing AI-enabled tools to monitor, analyse and counter disinformation across the Alliance. [Blackbird.AI](https://blackbird.ai/blog/nato-brandwatch-blackbird-ai/)
- **2026-01-09** - Raised $28m in new funding, bringing total raised to $58m, with participation from Ten Eleven Ventures, Dorilton Ventures and cybersecurity leaders Dave DeWalt and Chris Young. [Fintech Global](https://fintech.global/2026/01/09/blackbird-ai-secures-28m-to-counter-ai-disinformation/)

## Links

- Website: https://blackbird.ai
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/blackbird-ai

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29.

# BlackbirdAI
> AI-driven narrative intelligence platform that identifies disinformation, bot networks and threat actors affecting national security, government and commercial organisations.

## What they do
BLACKBIRD.AI protects organisations from narrative attacks that cause financial, operational and reputational harm. The platform ingests open-source data, identifies key narratives and the actors and networks driving them, detects anomalous bot behaviour scaling them, and maps the communities they connect. The company was founded by a team spanning AI, threat intelligence, journalism and national security. Customer use cases cover strategic communications, brand protection and national security.

## Products and solutions
- **Constellation** - AI narrative intelligence platform providing real-time identification of disinformation campaigns, bot networks, deepfakes and coordinated inauthentic behaviour across open-source channels.

Blueskytec develops hardware-based cyber security for cyber-physical systems, driving protection down to the control-systems level. Its devices are designed for industrial control systems, operational technology, IoT and transport, and for safety-critical use in marine, industrial, high-voltage and nuclear environments, including space, reactor rooms and underwater marine settings. # BMNT

> Defence and national-security innovation consultancy and early-stage tech accelerator.

## What they do

BMNT is an innovation company for governments and their partners that uses startup methods to create new capabilities for defence and national security. The UK arm supports companies, from pre-seed and seed to enterprise, in entering the UK, US and Australian defence and national-security markets. It operates internationally with offices including Silicon Valley, Austin, Washington, London, Cheltenham and Canberra.

## Products and solutions

- **Commercial readiness and regulatory compliance** - support for companies preparing to enter defence and national-security markets.
- **Market validation** - assessment and validation of dual-use and deep-tech propositions.
- **Navigation and enablement** - guidance through procurement and entry into defence ecosystems.
- **H4X Labs** - a deep-tech, dual-use accelerator for defence and national security.
- **Hacking for the Ministry of Defence (H4MoD)** - the UK university programme based on the Hacking for Defense (H4D) model, launched in January 2019.

companies.body:
# BMT

> An international engineering, science and technology consultancy best known for naval design and maritime engineering.

## What they do

BMT Group is a multidisciplinary engineering, science and technology consultancy serving the defence and security, critical infrastructure, commercial shipping and environment sectors. It is a maritime-orientated high-end design house and technical consulting firm, and describes itself as the world's largest independent naval design consultancy. The company employs around 1,350 professionals across offices in the Americas, Asia Pacific and Europe.

## Products and solutions

- **Maritime design and naval architecture** - concept-to-detailed design services for advanced and specialised vessels.
- **Defence design support** - contributions to programmes including the Queen Elizabeth class aircraft carriers, Tide class tankers, Type 31 frigates and the Fleet Solid Support programme.
- **Risk and contract management** - engineering, design support and risk management consultancy.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

## Recent news

- **1985** - BMT was formed from the merger and privatisation of the British Shipbuilders Research Association and the National Maritime Institute. [source](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/BMT_Group)

Boeing Defence UK provides support for Boeing products across UK and US military programmes. It delivers technology, products, services and capabilities to the Ministry of Defence, including in-service support, maintenance, logistics and training. The company operates across sites in the UK, with a presence near MOD Abbey Wood in Bristol and at locations co-located with customers.

Boeing Distribution Services distributes aircraft parts and consumables to civil and defence customers in the UK and globally. It carries products from over 250 aviation manufacturers, covering airframe parts, electrical components, hardware, avionics, instruments, and ground support and test equipment. Booth Welsh provides integrated engineering services for highly regulated environments, including nuclear and defence. > Production-volume additive manufacturing division of Bowman International Ltd, serving aerospace and defence.

## What they do

Bowman 3D is the additive manufacturing division of Bowman International Ltd, a UK bearing and precision component manufacturer based in Abingdon. The division uses powder bed fusion 3D printing, including HP Multi Jet Fusion, to produce components in volumes from single prototypes to tens of thousands of parts. It works with aerospace and defence customers supplying production parts as well as gauges, jigs, fixtures and placeholder components.

# Bowman B&E Consultants
> Dorset-based defence and innovation consultancy delivering business and engineering support to SMEs, with specialist depth in MOD contract management, quality assurance and defence innovation-process design.

## What they do
Bowman B&E Consultants is the practice of a former Lieutenant Colonel REME who served as a founder member and Head of Operations of the Defence BattleLab. Operating from Wareham, Dorset, the practice delivers innovation support, MOD contract management, ISO 9001 quality assurance and engineering qualifications to micro and small organisations, with a particular focus on the Defence and NHS domains. The name covers the founder's twin specialisms: Business (operating model, lean management, change) and Engineering (REME pedigree, accreditation, contract quality assurance).

# Bowmill Engineering

> Sub-contract precision machining and surface finishing for the aerospace, defence and marine sectors.

## What they do

Bowmill Engineering, part of the Bowmill Group, provides sub-contract machining, sub-assemblies and surface finishing treatments for the aerospace, defence and marine sectors. Established in 1970, it operates from sites in Poole, Dorset and Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire. The company manufactures components to sub-micron tolerances, from small valve assemblies to flying control assemblies and landing gear kits, with non-destructive testing and metal treatments available in-house through Bowmill Metal Treatments Ltd.

## Products and solutions

- **Precision machined components** - multi-disciplined machined products for aerospace, defence and marine customers.
- **Assemblies** - sub-assemblies and final assembly, including flying control assemblies and landing gear kits.
- **Surface finishing and testing** - metal treatment processing and non-destructive testing.

companies.body:
# boxxe Limited

> UK IT hardware, software, and managed services provider with over 30 years of active MOD engagement and a dedicated defence solutions practice.

## What they do

boxxe supplies IT hardware, software licensing, cybersecurity, and managed services to UK public sector and corporate customers. Its defence practice covers Microsoft Enterprise Licensing, secure cloud and virtualisation infrastructure, ruggedised device procurement and configuration, and encryption solutions for classified and operational environments. The company operates from a MOD-accredited facility and holds Microsoft Large Authorised Reseller status.

## Products and solutions

- **Microsoft Enterprise Licensing and Licence Management Platform** - manages and optimises Microsoft EA compliance and spend for MOD environments; underpinned the £291 million MOD Microsoft agreement (2022-2025).
- **Secure data encryption** - Stonewood Flagstone Enhanced Data Encryption deployed on Royal Navy submarine laptops at HMNB Clyde and HMNB Devonport.
- **Ruggedised device procurement** - configured portable devices and software for the British Army's Multiple Launch Rocket System Electronic Data Library programme.
- **Cloud and virtualisation infrastructure** - supply and support for OPNET, CAMTES, and related defence programme environments.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** Crown Commercial Service RM6068 (Technology Products and Associated Services); RM6098 TePAS2 (all 8 lots); G-Cloud Digital Marketplace (supplier ID 92355)
- **Accreditations:** MOD-accredited facility; Armed Forces Covenant signatory; Cisco EMEA Security Partner of the Year 2025
- **Memberships:** ADS Group; techUK; Team Forces Gold Partner

## Recent news

- **2025-07-01** - Acquisition of CAE Technology Services Limited (£159.8m revenue, Cisco Gold Partner) completed, expanding public sector managed services capability. [boxxe](https://boxxe.com/news-and-resources/news/boxxe-announces-acquisition-of-cae)
- **2025-11-01** - DE&S awarded contract for MLRS Electronic Data Library hardware replacement (value £271,808). [Find a Tender](https://www.find-tender.service.gov.uk/Notice/078094-2025)
- **2022-07-12** - £291 million MOD Microsoft Enterprise Licensing Agreement announced, one of the largest Microsoft public sector deals in the UK at the time. [The Register](https://www.theregister.com/2022/07/12/boxxe_defence_microsoft_contract/)

## Links

- Website: https://boxxe.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/boxxe-uk

# Boyce Precision Engineering

> Precision CNC machining of high-specification components for aerospace and defence.

## What they do

Boyce Precision Engineering is a family-founded business established in 2006 in Portadown, Northern Ireland, specialising in precision machined components for the aerospace, defence, pharmaceutical, textile, motorsport and food sectors. It machines components in aluminium, hard metals and engineered polymers, and supplies jigs, fixtures and sub-assemblies. The company became employee-owned in May 2024 through an Employee Ownership Trust covering its 27 staff.

# BI Engineering

> Family-owned UK manufacturer of fabrications and assemblies for the defence and off-highway vehicle sectors.

## What they do

B. I. Engineering, the trading name of Bozeat Industrial Limited, has supplied manufactured parts and assemblies to the defence and commercial on- and off-highway sectors since 1975. It offers design, manufacture, supply and fitment of light, heavy and armoured fabrications, and specialises in vehicle engine cooling and heat transfer. It works with OEMs and Tier 1 suppliers, and houses its operations across 185,000 square feet of manufacturing, R&D, bonded stores and distribution facilities in Wellingborough.

# Bradbury Group

> Manufacturer of physical security doorsets, grilles and steel security products, with products certified for use across UK government and critical national infrastructure.

## What they do

Bradbury Group is a UK manufacturer of physical security solutions, operating from a head office in Lincolnshire. It manufactures a portfolio of third-party accredited doorsets for security, fire, flood and acoustics, serving sectors including architecture and construction, utilities and defence. The business operates through four divisions: Bradbury Security, Extendor, Martin Roberts and Newton Security Doors.

# Bravo Zulu AI

> AI governance, training, and AI Management System provider for UK defence organisations and regulated sectors, drawing on high-reliability organisation and defence aviation safety heritage.

## What they do

Bravo Zulu AI provides practical AI training, advisory services, and AI Management Systems for MOD organisations, defence primes, and SMEs. Its methodology applies high-reliability organisation and defence aviation safety thinking to AI governance and adoption. The company trained over 600 UK MOD leaders and managers in 2024-25 and delivers more than 25 courses per year.

## Products and solutions

- **AI Management System (AIMS)** - lightweight ISO 42001-aligned AI governance baseline for defence and regulated environments, covering policy, risk, and compliance.
- **AI Training Workshops** - group and one-to-one sessions on safe AI use, team playbooks, and adoption habits for MOD and defence prime teams.
- **Advisory and Consultancy** - tool selection, AI governance support, process mapping, and automation roadmapping for defence and government customers.

# Bridewell

> Cyber security services provider for critical national infrastructure and regulated sectors.

## What they do

Bridewell is a UK-headquartered cyber security services company protecting business functions across IT, OT and cloud. It delivers end-to-end consulting and 24x7 managed detection and response to organisations operating across critical national infrastructure and other regulated industries. Founded in 2013, it is one of the UK's larger independent cyber security services providers, headquartered in Reading with offices across the UK and USA.

## Products and solutions

- **Managed detection and response (MDR)** - 24x7 security monitoring and response.
- **Penetration testing** - including NCSC CHECK-accredited testing.
- **Cyber threat intelligence** - threat monitoring and intelligence services.
- **Security consultancy** - risk management, audit and review, and security architecture.
- **Cyber incident response** - including NCSC-assured Cyber Incident Response and Cyber Incident Exercising.
- **Data privacy** - compliance-driven advisory.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** CREST (member company); NCSC-assured services including CHECK Penetration Testing, Cyber Incident Response (CIR), Cyber Incident Exercising (CIE), and consultancy in risk management, audit and review, and security architecture; ISO 27001, ISO 27701, ISO 9001.

# Brigantes Consulting Ltd

> Specialist tactical and adventure-training equipment procurement and distribution for defence.

## What they do

Brigantes is an on-the-man tactical apparel and equipment procurement specialist, supplying soldier systems to NATO military and elite police units. The company was conceived to bridge the gap between the outdoor and defence industries. It develops product ranges through alliances with specialist brands and distributes equipment across operational theatres.

## Products and solutions

- **Tactical apparel and equipment** - on-the-man soldier systems and procurement for military and elite police units.

# Brimstone Site Investigation

> Unexploded ordnance risk-mitigation and explosive ordnance disposal specialist serving construction, infrastructure and brownfield development in the UK and internationally.

## What they do

Brimstone is a UXO (unexploded ordnance) risk-mitigation specialist for the construction, infrastructure and brownfield-development sectors. It describes itself as the only UK Government and MoD-assured contractor for explosive ordnance clearance and conventional munitions disposal. The team is drawn from explosive ordnance disposal personnel recruited from the British Army, Royal Navy and Royal Air Force.

## Products and solutions

- **UXO risk assessment and consultancy** - qualitative and quantitative desktop risk assessments, training, and a watching brief during site works.
- **UXO survey** - intrusive and non-intrusive land and marine surveys, including pushcart, towed and drone-borne magnetometry and geophysical survey.
- **Explosive ordnance disposal** - licensed EOD and conventional munitions disposal, delivered internationally.
- **Remnant** - a live UXO intelligence platform monitoring and visualising reported UXO incidents.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** CPD-certified training provider; Armed Forces Covenant signatory.

companies.body:
# Broadway Engineering

> Precision-machining manufacturer of high-complexity components for civil and defence aero-engine and airframe applications, and the founding business of the Broadway Group.

## What they do

Broadway Engineering manufactures high-complexity, tight-tolerance machined components for aero-engine, power-generation and airframe applications, serving UK and international civil and defence aerospace customers. It is the founding business of the Broadway Group, an aerospace manufacturing group that also includes Broadway AVPE and Broadway GET, offering machining through to finishing and inspection. The company is based in Bristol and dates its founding to 1938.

## Products and solutions

- **Precision machining** - grinding, milling and turning of structural components and assemblies for aero-engines and airframes.
- **Inspection and treatment** - non-destructive testing, pressure testing, heat treatment and surface treatments delivered across the group.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** AS/EN 9100 (aerospace quality, incorporating ISO 9001); Cyber Essentials Plus.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group; West of England Aerospace Forum; Midlands Aerospace Alliance.

## Recent news

- **2026-04-20** - Broadway Group acquired General Engineering (Treatments) Ltd of Southend-on-Sea, trading as Broadway GET, adding surface-treatment capability. [source](https://www.midlandsaerospace.org.uk/broadway-apr26)

## Links

- Website: https://broadwaygroup.co.uk/broadway-engineering/

companies.body:
# Broder Aerospace

> Distributor and supplier of materials and equipment for air, land and marine commercial and defence requirements.

## What they do

Broder Aerospace supplies and distributes materials and equipment into air, land and marine markets, covering both commercial and defence requirements. Its defence-facing range spans ground support equipment, hose and ducting, onboard power solutions, LED lighting, steel and alloys, and military HVAC systems, alongside managed MRO services and procurement support. Broder Aerospace is the defence and aerospace arm of Broder Metals Group Ltd; it was set up as a separately registered subsidiary in 2020 and is based in Sheffield.

## Products and solutions

- **Ground support equipment** - powered GSE systems for aircraft and platform support.
- **Onboard power and lighting** - onboard power solutions and LED illumination for air, land and marine platforms.
- **Military HVAC** - heating, ventilation and air conditioning systems for military tents and shelters.
- **MRO and procurement** - maintenance, repair and overhaul services and procurement support.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001, AS9120.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group, West of England Aerospace Forum, North West Aerospace Alliance.

## Links

- LinkedIn: https://uk.linkedin.com/company/broder-aerospace

# Broder Metals Group

> Independent stockist and distributor of high-specification stainless steels, nickel alloys and super alloys.

## What they do

Broder Metals Group is an independent stockist and distributor of high-specification stainless steels, nickel alloys and super alloys, supplying UK, European and worldwide markets. It serves oil and gas, petrochemical, power generation, marine and subsea, motorsport, nuclear and aerospace customers. Its defence and aerospace supply runs through its Broder Aerospace subsidiary. The business has traded since 2003 and is based in Sheffield.

## Products and solutions

- **Stainless steels** - high-specification stainless grades in round bar and other forms.
- **Nickel and super alloys** - nickel alloys and super alloys for demanding applications.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

companies.name: Brookhouse Aerospace Limited
companies.summary: Build-to-print manufacturer of composite and metallic aerostructures for civil and defence aerospace.
companies.body:
# Brookhouse Aerospace

> Build-to-print manufacturer of composite and metallic aerostructures for civil and defence aerospace.

## What they do

Brookhouse Aerospace is a build-to-print aerostructures and engineering specialist serving civil and defence aerospace. It operates three business units covering metallics and fabrication, composites, and surface treatments, producing composite structures, metallic detail parts, surface treatments and integrated assemblies across two sites in Lancashire. The company traces back to 1985 and operated under the Kaman and Brookhouse Composites names before a 2021 management buyout re-established it as an independent UK business.

## Products and solutions

- **Composite structures** - monolithic and sandwich parts in carbon fibre, glass and Aramid, autoclave-cured in clean room facilities.
- **Metallics and fabrication** - sheet metal fabrications and machined metal parts, including high-volume CNC machining.
- **Surface treatments** - surface treatment processes offered to external customers and used in-house.
- **Defence end products** - aerostructures, fuselage and engine panels, missile structures and UAV components.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001, AS9100, NADCAP.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group, North West Aerospace Alliance, Composites UK.

## Recent news

- **2025-12** - Completed the acquisition of Midlands precision machining firm Parker Precision, adding CNC turning, milling and 5-axis grinding. [The Manufacturer](https://www.themanufacturer.com/articles/brookhouse-aerospace-completes-acquisition-of-parker-precision/)
- **2025-01** - Opened a new manufacturing facility and head office in Darwen, relocating administration, engineering, programmes and metallics units. [Composites UK](https://compositesuk.co.uk/brookhouse-aerospace-new-factory/)

## Links

- Website: https://brookhouse-aerospace.com/
- LinkedIn: https://uk.linkedin.com/company/brookhouseaero

companies.name: Brownell Limited
companies.summary: Designer and manufacturer of humidity, moisture and pressure-control products for sensitive electrical and electronic equipment.
companies.body:
# Brownell

> Designer and manufacturer of humidity, moisture and pressure-control products for sensitive electrical and electronic equipment.

## What they do

Brownell designs and manufactures humidity, moisture and pressure-control products that protect sensitive electrical and electronic equipment from condensation, humidity and pressure effects. It has operated since 1952 and serves sectors from defence and security to power generation and distribution, with a stated focus on the aerospace and defence sectors. The company is based at Park Royal in London.

## Products and solutions

- **Desiccants** - desiccant bags, container desiccants, refills and packaging and preservation solutions, including Envirogel silica gel.
- **Humidity indicators** - relative-humidity and condensation indicators.
- **Breathers and valves** - pressure relief valves, immersion-proof breathers, transformer breathers and tank-vent dryers.
- **VMAP** - Versatile Moisture Adsorbent Polymer, a mouldable or machinable adsorbent material developed for electronics, aerospace, defence and optics applications.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR.
- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001, Cyber Essentials.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group, Make UK Defence, Farnborough Aerospace Consortium.

## Links

companies.name: Bruhn NewTech Limited
companies.summary: Specialist developer of CBRN knowledge management and warning-and-reporting software for defence and civil authorities.
companies.body:
# Bruhn NewTech

> Specialist developer of CBRN knowledge management and warning-and-reporting software for defence and civil authorities.

## What they do

Bruhn NewTech develops chemical, biological, radiological and nuclear (CBRN) knowledge management software, sensor connectivity software, and battle management and command-and-control integration. Its products are used by defence forces and civil authorities in more than 30 countries. The group is headquartered in Søborg, Denmark, and the UK entity is a long-established subsidiary based in Salisbury, Wiltshire. The wider group is majority-owned by Nordic private equity firm Adelis Equity Partners following a 2024 acquisition.

## Products and solutions

- **CBRN-Analysis** - off-the-shelf CBRN information management, hazard prediction and warning and reporting application.
- **CBRNE-Frontline** - companion CBRN warning-and-reporting and hazard-prediction application.
- **SafeVita** - hazard monitoring and reaction planning for non-CBRN specialists.
- **SCIM** - sensor connectivity software that integrates multiple sensor types into a single display and standard CBRN messaging.
- **BRaCIS** - biological, radiological and chemical warning-and-reporting software for which Bruhn NewTech is the OEM to the UK MoD.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group, CBRN-UK, NATO ATP-45(F) standards committee.

## Recent news

- **2025** - Awarded a five-year single-source UK MoD support contract for the BRaCIS warning-and-reporting software, running to FY 2031 with two option years. [Find a Tender](https://www.find-tender.service.gov.uk/Notice/004357-2025)

## Links

- Website: https://bruhn-newtech.com/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/bruhn-newtech-as

Public information verified 2026-06-29. ADS Group member directory, Bruhn NewTech website, CBRN-UK member listing, UK Find a Tender service, Adelis Equity Partners announcement, Companies House (03336119), Bruhn NewTech LinkedIn company page. companies.body:
# Bruntons Aero Products

> Manufacturer of machined components and mechanical cable assemblies for the aerospace supply chain, including flight control cables, helicopter winch cables and runway arrester pendants.

## What they do

Bruntons Aero Products is a specialised manufacturer of machined components and mechanical cable assemblies, supplying direct to all levels of the aerospace supply chain across prototype, serial production and spares. It is a supplier of control cables and lanyards for the aviation industry and also supports the vintage aircraft market with streamline wires. The company operates from a facility in Musselburgh, near Edinburgh.

## Products and solutions

- **Aircraft control cables** - mechanical control cables from 1mm to 10mm diameter, flight control system cables, release mechanism cables and retaining cords.
- **Helicopter winch cables** - cable assemblies for helicopter winch systems.
- **Runway arrester pendants** - cross runway arrester ropes and pendants from 22mm to 32mm diameter for military and naval airfield arresting systems.
- **Machined components and lanyards** - machined parts, lanyards and streamline wires.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** AS9100 Rev D (incorporating ISO 9001).
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

BSL Express Spares sources, stocks, manufactures and supplies obsolete components, units and sub-assemblies used to keep electronic systems operational. ## What they do

Butser Rubber manufactures custom rubber mouldings, O rings, gaskets and rubber-bonded components from its site in Liss, Hampshire. # C P Cases Limited

> Designer and manufacturer of protective transit cases and 19" racks for military and defence use.

## What they do

CP Cases designs and manufactures protective cases, 19" racks and bags for the transport, operation and storage of equipment, predominantly for military, industrial and defence applications. In-house capabilities span rotomoulded plastic, aluminium, laminated plywood, composite, textiles and CNC foam machining. Many products are accredited to MIL-STD-810 and Def-Stan 00-35, rated to IP65 and carry NATO stock numbers.

## Products and solutions

- **Amazon Cases and Racks** - rotomoulded polyethylene cases and racks originally designed for military markets.
- **ERack** - rugged 19" rack accredited to IP65 and MIL-STD-810F, available with EMC and TEMPEST shielding for secure communications.
- **Climate control units** - case-cooling for electronics operating in extreme temperatures.
- **Custom enclosures** - bespoke rackmount enclosures, including units supplied for the Queen Elizabeth Class aircraft carriers.

companies.summary: UK manufacturer of hydrofoiling rigid inflatable boats, including the Patrol AWC variant supplied to the Ministry of Defence.
companies.body:
# C-Fury

> UK manufacturer of hydrofoiling rigid inflatable boats, including the Patrol AWC variant supplied to the Ministry of Defence.

## What they do

C-Fury designs and manufactures twin-hulled hydrofoil RIBs from a facility in Herefordshire. Their hull technology combines a catamaran form, sub-hull air tunnels, and an assister hydrofoil to deliver lift, stability, and fuel efficiency at speed. The Patrol AWC (F70) variant is purpose-built for professional and public-sector maritime operations, with a heavier lay-up, open deck, and Yamaha F40 powerplant capable of over 40 knots. Confirmed professional customers include the UK Ministry of Defence and the Port of London Authority.

## Products and solutions

- **Patrol AWC F70** - Professional patrol hydrofoil RIB for public-sector and maritime operations.
- **Voyager** - Leisure and adventure hydrofoil RIB.
- **Storm** - Leisure and adventure hydrofoil RIB.
- **Yacht** - Leisure and adventure hydrofoil RIB.

# C. Brandauer & Co Ltd

> Precision metal stamping and tooling manufacturer serving aerospace, defence and other engineering sectors.

## What they do

Brandauer is a contract precision metal stamping and tooling company based in Birmingham. It works in thin gauge materials, with material thicknesses from roughly 0.1mm to 2mm and tolerances measured in microns. The company supplies the automotive, aerospace, defence, mining and power generation sectors, and lists aerospace and defence among the markets it is targeting under its current ten-year plan.

## Products and solutions

- **Precision metal stamping** - high volume, thin gauge stamped components produced from in-house tooling.
- **Tooling design and manufacture** - modular, in-house tooling solutions.
- **Rapid prototyping** - laser cutting and tool-less precision metal forming to move a design from 2D drawing to formed 3D component.

# C3IA Solutions

> Cyber security consultancy and NCSC Assured service provider serving UK defence, government and commercial customers.

C3IA designs, delivers and assures critical information and communication systems for customers where high availability and resilience are absolute requirements. It works across UK defence, government and the commercial sector, with particular depth in MoD acquisition processes and Secure by Design. Its stated purpose is "Connecting People. Securing Systems. Protecting Data."

# CA Models Ltd

> Rapid prototyping, additive manufacturing and model making company serving aerospace, defence and other sectors.

## What they do

CA Models is a rapid prototyping and model making business based in Stirling, Scotland, established in 1983. It works across aerospace, automotive, defence, marine, medical, oil and gas and product design. Capabilities include additive manufacturing in titanium, aluminium and stainless steel, SLA, SLS, FDM and DLP printing, five-axis CNC machining, vacuum casting and specialist model making. CA Models is part of the Prototal group following acquisition by Prototal Industries (Sweden); the Stirling operation continues under the CA Models name.

## Products and solutions

- **Additive manufacturing** - metal and polymer 3D printing including titanium, aluminium and stainless steel.
- **Precision CNC machining** - five-axis machining for prototype and production parts.
- **Model making and finishing** - vacuum casting, painting, powder coating, anodising and plating.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR registered.
- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001, Cyber Essentials.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

# Cablescan

> Manufacturer of high-performance electrical cable assemblies, wiring harnesses and control panels for military and aerospace platforms.

## What they do

Cablescan manufactures and develops electrical cable assemblies, wiring harnesses, cables and control panels for military and aerospace customers. It holds onsite engineering and prototyping capability, supporting development through to volume manufacture, and maintains a large onsite stockholding of ground-vehicle material to respond to UK Urgent Operational Requirement (UoR) demands. The business was formed in 1994; the current legal entity was registered in 2001, and Cablescan was acquired by Amphenol Corporation in 2019.

## Products and solutions

- **Cable assemblies and wiring harnesses** - design, manufacture and test for military aerospace, naval, land vehicle and UAV applications.
- **Control panels** - manufacture for defence and industrial platforms.
- **Repair, overhaul and modification** - in-service support for existing assemblies.
- **Laser wire marking, automatic testing and machine overbraiding** - supporting manufacturing capabilities.

Stated market sectors include military aerospace, naval, military land vehicles, unmanned aerial vehicles, communications, test equipment and security.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** AS9100, ISO 9001, ISO 14001, Cyber Essentials Plus, IPC-620, IPC J-STD-001, VG96927
- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR registered; SC21 Silver
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Links

- Website: https://www.cablescan.co.uk
- LinkedIn: https://uk.linkedin.com/company/cablescan-limited

# CAD Wing Training & Advisory

> UK micro-SME providing counter-UAS and tactical UAS training alongside a range of multi-spectral camouflage and concealment products.

## What they do

CAD Wing (trading name of Cadwing Ltd) operates across two verticals: specialist military training and camouflage systems. Training courses cover UAS operations, counter-UAS, SERE, and combat medicine, delivered in the UK and overseas. The camouflage product range addresses thermal, infrared, and visual signature reduction across personal, vehicle, and equipment applications. The company draws on experience of UAS and counter-UAS operations and positions products around lessons from recent conflicts.

companies.name: CAE (UK) plc
companies.summary: UK arm of CAE Inc, providing synthetic training equipment and aircrew training to the UK armed forces.
companies.body:
# CAE (UK) plc

> UK arm of CAE Inc, providing synthetic training equipment and aircrew training to the UK armed forces.

## What they do

CAE (UK) plc is a training systems integrator and synthetic training equipment provider, ranked as a key supplier to the UK Ministry of Defence. It provides synthetic training equipment and training services and holds Design Authority status for several British Army training systems. The RAF and Royal Navy use CAE UK for aircrew training across a range of platforms, from basic flying skills to advanced mission training and rehearsal.

CAE (UK) plc is the UK subsidiary of CAE Inc, headquartered in Montreal, Canada. The UK entity dates to 1967 and is based at Burgess Hill, West Sussex, with the Medium Support Helicopter Aircrew Training Facility at RAF Benson.

## Products and solutions

- **Medium Support Helicopter Aircrew Training Facility (MSHATF)** - six full-mission simulators at RAF Benson (Chinook, Merlin and Puma) covering conversion through to pre-deployment mission rehearsal.
- **Land training systems** - simulators for artillery fire control, direct fire gunnery, air defence engagement and target recognition; Design Authority for the Warrior Gunnery Turret Trainer, Warrior Desk Top Trainer and Artillery Fire Control Trainer.
- **Single Synthetic Environment (SSE)** - mission-rehearsal capability work for UK Strategic Command.
- **CAE London Burgess Hill** - simulator-based pilot training centre mixing civil and military rotary training.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** MoD Design Authority status for several Army training systems.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2025-02-27** - MoD awarded CAE a £3.5m Warrior training system contract, a single-source award on the basis of CAE's Design Authority status, delivered from Burgess Hill. [UK Defence Journal](https://ukdefencejournal.org.uk/mod-awards-3-5m-warrior-training-system-contract-to-cae/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.cae.com

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Companies House (00921122); ADS Group members directory; CAE United Kingdom regional page; UK Defence Journal. No clean LinkedIn company-page slug for the UK entity was confirmed, so it is omitted.

companies.body:
# Calian UK

> UK arm of Canada's Calian Group, delivering military training, role-play exercises and simulation to the British Army and UK MoD.

## What they do

Calian UK Ltd, formerly Mabway Limited, is a prime supplier to the British Army and UK MoD for large-scale military training, role-play exercise support and simulation. The UK business specialises in defence role-play environments (actors, audiences, adversaries and specialists) that simulate operational conditions for live military exercises, alongside technical and engineering education for naval and maritime forces.

Calian UK is the UK operating company of Calian Group Ltd, a TSX-listed group headquartered in Ottawa, Canada. The UK entity dates to 2004 and is registered in Hampshire.

## Products and solutions

- **Live training and role-play exercise support** - managing realistic role-playing environments for military field exercises; prime supplier to the British Army.
- **MaestroEDE** - exercise design, development and delivery software platform for large-scale military exercises.
- **Immersive Training Technologies** - AR, VR, MR and XR training environments.
- **Audio distribution and connectivity** - systems-agnostic connectivity of field radios for exercise command and control.
- **Technical and engineering education** - for naval and maritime communities.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** EAL-recognised training provider (engineering and manufacturing qualifications).
- **Memberships:** ADS Group; Armed Forces Covenant signatory.

companies.name: Callen-Lenz Associates Limited
companies.summary: UK developer that designs, manufactures and operates uncrewed and autonomous air systems for military customers.
companies.body:
# Callen-Lenz

> UK developer that designs, manufactures and operates uncrewed and autonomous air systems for military customers.

## What they do

Callen-Lenz offers products, platforms and services across the uncrewed and autonomous air vehicle market. Design, development and manufacture of UAV platforms and associated avionic systems are performed in-house, alongside aviation services and technical consultancy for crewed and uncrewed aviation. All systems are manufactured in the UK, mostly from UK supply chains. The company was acquired by BAE Systems in 2024 into its FalconWorks research and development arm.

## Products and solutions

- **Koios** - compact medium VTOL platform for strategic ISR with a tactical footprint; range up to around 750 km and endurance up to around 10 hours.
- **Nyan** - one-way effector (loitering munition); subject of a UK MoD contract and tested by the British Army.
- **Fregata** - medium, high-endurance conventional take-off and landing ISR platform.
- **Prometheus** - reconfigurable UAS for mapping and autonomous navigation of GNSS-denied subterranean environments.
- **SkyCircuits** - wholly owned subsidiary producing high-integrity autopilots and mission management systems for crewed and uncrewed aviation.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001, Cyber Essentials, Cyber Essentials Plus.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group (Aerospace and Defence sectors).

## Recent news

- **2026-02-20** - UK awarded Callen-Lenz a £4.99m contract for Nyan one-way effectors to support deep-fire capability. [The Defense Post](https://thedefensepost.com/2026/02/20/uk-callen-lenz-owe-drones/)
- **2024** - Acquired by BAE Systems FalconWorks. [Aviation Week](https://aviationweek.com/defense/aircraft-propulsion/bae-systems-falconworks-acquires-uas-developer-callen-lenz)

## Links

- Website: https://callenlenz.com
- LinkedIn: https://uk.linkedin.com/company/callen-lenz

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Companies House (06361441); ADS Group members directory; Callen-Lenz company website; Callen-Lenz LinkedIn company page; The Defense Post; Shephard Media; Aviation Week.

companies.name: Callidus Roe
companies.summary: UK defence engineering SME specialising in military communications system design, installation, certification, and through-life support for MOD and prime contractors.
companies.body:
# Callidus Roe

> UK defence engineering SME specialising in military communications system design, installation, certification, and through-life support for MOD and prime contractors.

## What they do

Callidus Roe provides engineering, project management, and technical support to the UK MOD and defence prime contractors, with a core focus on military communications systems across land and maritime platforms. Services span the full programme lifecycle: design and certification of communications systems to relevant JSPs; installation surveys and data performance analysis of legacy cabling; end-of-life decommissioning and salvage; cable harness production; and project management of testing in UK facilities and remote locations worldwide. The company operates an associate network of SQEP providing rapid-access specialist technicians, qualified armoured vehicle crews, and cable designers proficient in Harmware and RapidHarness tooling.

## Products and solutions

- **Installation, Design and Certification** - Design, certification, and installation of communications systems into land and maritime platforms to JSP standards.
- **Installation Surveys** - Survey and performance analysis of in-service land and maritime communications equipment, with harness adapter production to Mil 38999 standard.
- **End of Life Decommissioning** - Decommissioning, disposal, salvage, and reclamation of obsolete vehicles and communications infrastructure.
- **Technical Support** - Cable harness production, outsized equipment delivery, GFA management, and procurement support.
- **Equipment Testing and Trials** - Project management of testing in static and remote locations worldwide.
- **SQEP Associate Network** - Rapid-access specialist personnel for armoured vehicle movements, land comms operations, and cable design.

## Links

- Website: https://www.callidusroe.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/callidus-roe

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Companies House (10074821); callidusroe.com; LinkedIn company page.

# Cam Lock

> Manufacturer of CBRN respiratory protection and life-support breathing apparatus for aircrew, military and emergency use.

## What they do

Cam Lock designs and manufactures personal protection life-support systems: breathing apparatus and respiratory protection for aircrew, military, industrial and emergency use. Its defence focus is CBRN (chemical, biological, radiological, nuclear) respiratory protection for aircrew, with core strength in elastomeric mouldings and life-support products. The company is based in Aldershot, Hampshire, is part of the Camberley Group, and operates additional facilities in the USA, Canada, Asia Pacific and the Middle East.

## Products and solutions

- **CBRN Tactical Mask (aircrew respirator)** - CBRN aircrew mask qualified across platforms including Typhoon, Gripen, Rafale, Hawk, F-15, F-16, F-18, F-22 and F-35.
- **JSAM-TA (Joint Service Aircrew Mask - Tactical Aircraft)** - supplied to the US Navy and Marine Corps, USAF, Australian Defence Force and Italian Air Force.
- **Aircrew oxygen masks**
- **FAST-mask and FAST-resQ** - escape respirator and emergency breathing apparatus.
- **Industrial respirators and firefighter breathing apparatus** - including SCBA and emergency escape sets.

# Cambrai Risk Solutions

> UK risk management and protective security consultancy specialising in hostile environments, with a focus on Africa and the Middle East.

## What they do

Cambrai Risk Solutions provides threat and risk analysis, travel risk management, protective services, and security consultancy to private sector clients, NGOs, and government projects operating in high-risk environments. The company is operated by personnel with backgrounds in hostile environment operations. Geographic focus is Africa and the Middle East. Services are structured around pre-deployment threat analysis, real-time travel support, secure transportation, and strategic security advice.

companies.name: Cambridge Aerospace Limited
companies.summary: UK defence-technology company developing low-cost air and missile defence interceptors to counter drones and missiles.
companies.body:
# Cambridge Aerospace Limited

> UK defence-technology company developing low-cost air and missile defence interceptors to counter drones and missiles.

## What they do

Cambridge Aerospace is a UK defence-technology scale-up founded in 2024, focused on sovereign air and missile defence for the UK and allied customers. Its stated mission is to "eliminate the risk of existential war in Europe", developing scalable, low-cost interceptors against drone and cruise-missile threats. It is also establishing UK solid-rocket-motor manufacturing to underpin its own systems and supply chain.

## Products and solutions

- **Skyhammer** - tube-launched interceptor against slower, lower-value threats such as Shahed-style drones and subsonic missiles. Reported speed around Mach 0.7, range over 30 km, unit cost in the tens of thousands of dollars.
- **Starhammer** - interceptor for faster, higher-value targets.
- **Nightstar** - solid rocket motors, to be produced at a planned Norfolk facility for the company's own use and potential third-party sale.

## Recent news

- **2026-06-10** - In talks to raise around 300m USD at a roughly 3.5bn USD valuation. [source](https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-06-10/cambridge-aerospace-in-talks-to-raise-at-3-5-billion-valuation)
- **2026-04-13** - UK MoD orders a significant number of Skyhammer air-defence systems, with first deliveries expected from May 2026. [source](https://www.theregister.com/2026/04/13/cambridge_aerospace_skyhammer_interceptor/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.cambridgeaerospace.com/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/cambridgeaerospace

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website, Companies House (no. 15935962, active, incorporated 4 September 2024), Bloomberg, The Register, The Aviationist. Note: this is the defence-technology firm trading as "Cambridge Aerospace", not the long-established Marshall of Cambridge Aerospace Limited (Companies House no. 00245740), a separate company with a similar name. Headcount (~125) and operational siting (registered office London, planned solid-rocket-motor facility in Norfolk) are drawn from press reporting rather than filed records.

# Cambridge Consultants

> A deep-tech product development and engineering consultancy, part of Capgemini, with a defence and security practice.

## What they do

Cambridge Consultants is a technology and product development consultancy that works across multiple industries including defence and security. Its defence work spans autonomous land, air and underwater vehicles, sensing and wireless technology, signal processing, machine learning, cyber defence and quantum technologies. The company employs more than 900 staff across offices in Cambridge, Boston, Tokyo and Singapore. Since 2021 it has been part of Capgemini Invent.

companies.body:
# Cambridge Intelligence Limited

> Cambridge-based developer of graph, timeline and geospatial data-visualisation SDKs used to build investigation tools for mission-critical software.

## What they do

Cambridge Intelligence provides visualisation software development kits (SDKs) that developers and product teams embed in their own applications to enable interactive exploration of complex, connected data. The tools are used in high-stakes domains including law enforcement, national security, cybersecurity and fraud prevention, where clarity, performance and reliability matter. The stated mission is to help people make sense of complex, connected data.

## Products and solutions

- **KeyLines** - JavaScript SDK for graph and network visualisation.
- **ReGraph** - React SDK for state-driven graph visualisation.
- **KronoGraph** - timeline visualisation SDK for investigating event data at scale.
- **MapWeave** - geospatial visualisation SDK for uncovering connections in map-based data.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

companies.name: Cambridge Pixel Ltd
companies.summary: Employee-owned UK developer of modular radar, camera and sensor processing software, SDKs and interface hardware for defence, maritime and security integrators.
companies.body:
# Cambridge Pixel Ltd

> Employee-owned UK developer of modular radar, camera and sensor processing software, SDKs and interface hardware for defence, maritime and security integrators.

## What they do

Cambridge Pixel develops modular radar, camera and sensor processing software, SDKs and interface hardware that let systems integrators and developers add radar capability to their systems with lower technical risk. It is a supplier of software-based radar tracking and scan-conversion solutions through its SPx software library and HPx hardware range, supporting over 80 makes and models of modern and legacy radar. The employee-owned company is based near Cambridge and serves customers in over 50 countries.

## Products and solutions

- **SPx** - modular software library and SDK for radar, camera and sensor processing.
- **SPx Server V2** - radar tracking software; a 2026 update added proximity detection, HPx-700 support, and TAK and SAPIENT track-output formats.
- **HPx** - radar input and interface hardware card range.
- **HPx-700** - ARM-based edge Radar Input and Signal Processor that digitises analogue radars without a host PC.
- **VSD-C2** - command-and-control display software bridging COTS and bespoke C2 systems.
- Radar scan conversion and display, primary radar acquisition and target tracking, multi-sensor integration, and BlackTalon counter-UAS ecosystem integration.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001:2015 (quality management, BSI-audited).
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2026-04-30** - Released SPx Server V2, adding proximity detection, HPx-700 support and TAK/SAPIENT track outputs. [source](https://www.adsadvance.co.uk/cambridge-pixel-releases-spx-server-v2.html)
- **2026-03** - Introduced the HPx-700 edge-based Radar Input and Signal Processor. [source](https://www.unmannedsystemstechnology.com/2026/03/cambridge-pixel-introduces-hpx-700-for-edge-based-radar-input-signal-processing/)
- **2026-01-29** - Enhanced the BlackTalon counter-UAS ecosystem with advanced multi-sensor integration. [source](https://www.unmannedsystemstechnology.com/fr/2026/02/cambridge-pixel-ameliore-lecosysteme-c-uas-et-lintegration-multi-capteurs-de-blacktalon/)

## Links

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/cambridge-pixel

companies.name: Cambridge Sensoriis Ltd
companies.summary: Developer of low size, weight and power radar and sensing systems for uncrewed aerial vehicles in military and commercial use.
companies.body:
# Cambridge Sensoriis

> Developer of low size, weight and power radar and sensing systems for uncrewed aerial vehicles in military and commercial use.

## What they do

Cambridge Sensoriis develops micro-radar and sensing systems for uncrewed aerial vehicles. Its radars use frequency modulated continuous wave (FMCW) methodology in a low size, weight and power form factor, supporting operation in adverse weather and GNSS-denied environments. The company was founded in 2020 and is based in Bishop's Stortford.

## Products and solutions

- **RadarAware** - a compact, power-efficient radar weighing under 500 grams, with no moving parts and electronically steered antenna arrays, for detect-and-avoid and collision avoidance.
- **ARC (Active Radar Cooperating)** - patented technology providing localisation based on direct radar range measurement, independent of satellites and resilient to jamming.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2024** - Awarded a Dstl contract to develop a UAV-deployed, radar-based solution for humanitarian demining (GARD ME), detecting unexploded ordnance. [source](https://www.cambsensoriis.com/dstl-contract-to-advance-uav-radar-for-humanitarian-demining/)

companies.name: Camcode Global Ltd
companies.summary: Provider of item-level asset identification, unique identification marking and traceability for defence using NATO standards.
companies.body:
# Camcode Global

> Provider of item-level asset identification, unique identification marking and traceability for defence using NATO standards.

## What they do

Camcode Global is a defence technology company specialising in item-level traceability and asset identification using NATO standards. As a NATO and Partnership for Peace approved partner, it works to the STANAG 2290 / S2000 framework and unique identification (UID) to support asset tracking across the lifecycle. It was established in 2012 and has offices in the UK, the Netherlands, the USA and Australia.

## Products and solutions

- **UID marking and asset identification** - durable item-level marking and identification meeting standards including CDS-751, DEF STAN 05-132, MIL-STD-130, DEF(AUST) 1000C and DAOD 3038-0, delivered with an integrated mobile laser marking cart solution.
- **Data cleansing** - asset data cleansing services to support traceability.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

companies.body:
# Canary Zero

> UK OPSEC, COMSEC, and INFOSEC consultancy offering operational security, communications security, and information security services to high-profile individuals and private offices.

## What they do

Canary Zero provides security and privacy services across three disciplines: operational security (OPSEC), communications security (COMSEC), and information security (INFOSEC). The company's personnel have backgrounds in former UKIC and British Military operations. Clients are primarily high-profile individuals, families, and private or family offices requiring bespoke security. Services are delivered as a concierge model covering tailored threat modelling, digital footprint auditing, adversary profiling, managed digital identities, secure travel planning, and real-time threat intelligence. The company also holds a registered presence in Dubai.

## Products and solutions

- **OPSEC Services** - Digital footprint auditing, threat modelling, adversary profiling, tailored posting protocols, managed digital identities, and secure travel planning.
- **COMSEC Services** - Securing client communications against interception and unauthorised access.
- **INFOSEC Services** - Safeguarding data against compromise, alteration, or loss.

companies.summary: Designer and manufacturer of specialised, rugged and embedded computing systems for defence and other critical applications.
companies.body:
# Captec Group

> Designer and manufacturer of specialised, rugged and embedded computing systems for defence and other critical applications.

## What they do

Captec designs and engineers specialised computers, integrated systems and subsystems for challenging, critical and certified applications. Its platforms combine high-performance computing, electro-mechanical design and system integration for deployment in demanding operating environments. It works with OEMs and systems integrators to deliver application-specific solutions with long-term availability, configuration control and full lifecycle support.

## Products and solutions

- **Specialised computers** - application-specific industrial, compact, embedded and rackmount computers, plus custom tablets and design-to-order builds.
- **Rugged servers** - the SRS (Specialised Rugged Server) range in 1U/2U and short-depth formats, engineered against shock, vibration, EMI, temperature and unstable power; CRS-215 Rugged GPU Server.
- **Secure Encrypted Server (SES) range** - SES-120 and SES-110 with military-grade AES-256 hardware encryption and tamper-evident chassis, developed with Viasat.
- **Integrated systems** - unified multi-configuration cabinet and enclosure platforms.
- **Subsystems engineering** - metalwork, professional finishing to BR 3939 defence standards, electro-mechanical integration and build-to-print.
- **Unified Edge** - distributed edge processing and the E-Series embedded/edge/IoT range.
- **Quadbox** - hardware platform for simulation and training applications.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001 (quality); ISO 14001 (environmental); Cyber Essentials Plus.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group (Manufacturing Organisations category).

## Recent news

- **2026-04-27** - Published commentary on managing deployed defence systems amid accelerating threats. [source](https://www.captec-group.com/managing-deployed-defence-systems-amid-accelerating-threats/)
- **2026-04-09** - Published guidance on BR 3939 defence finishing standards ("warpaint"). [source](https://www.captec-group.com/its-not-just-paint-its-warpaint/)

## Links

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/captec

# Carbon ThreeSixty Ltd

> Advanced composite structures for aerospace, defence, automotive and energy.

## What they do

Carbon ThreeSixty is an innovator in advanced composite structures, providing turnkey solutions across aerospace, defence, automotive and energy. The company specialises in resin transfer moulding (RTM) and novel preforming techniques such as tailored fibre placement (TFP) to produce highly optimised, cost-effective lightweight structures. It was established in 2017 and is based in Chippenham.

## Products and solutions

- **Carbon fibre wheels** - for automotive and defence applications.
- **Rotor blades** - for UAV and eVTOL vehicles.
- **PEMD components** - parts for power electronics, machines and drives applications, including electric motor components.
- **Hydrogen storage solutions** - composite storage structures.
- **TFP and RTM engineering** - design and manufacture services using tailored fibre placement and resin transfer moulding.

- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

# Carl Zeiss

Carl Zeiss Ltd is the UK operating company of ZEISS, the German optics and optoelectronics group headquartered in Oberkochen. companies.body:
# Cassi

> AI-powered probabilistic forecasting and decision support platform for defence and government.

## What they do

Cassi is a UK AI startup building a probabilistic forecasting and decision support engine for high-stakes environments. The company has a core defence and government focus: its CEO, Dr Keith Dear, is a former RAF Intelligence Officer and former Expert Adviser to the Prime Minister on Science, Technology, Space, and Modernising Defence. Cassi submitted AI forecasting evidence to Parliament's Defence Select Committee and actively engages on autonomous systems, military AI strategy, and UK defence modernisation.

## Products and solutions

- **Cassi superstrategy engine** - Probabilistic decision support platform that forecasts outcomes, quantifies risk, and recommends strategies. Benchmarked as a leading AI forecaster on ForecastBench at time of Parliamentary submission.

## Recent news

- **2025** - Dr Keith Dear gave evidence to Parliament's Defence Committee on autonomous systems and AI trajectory. [UK Defence Journal](https://ukdefencejournal.org.uk/uk-defence-warned-against-complacency-on-drones-and-ai/)
- **2025** - Cassi's AI forecaster submitted probabilistic evidence to Parliament estimating a 20% chance of Britain being drawn into a major war before 2036. [Cassi blog](https://blog.cassi-ai.com/p/our-ai-evidence-to-parliament-suggests)

## Links

- Website: https://cassi-ai.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/cassi-ai

companies.body:
# Catalyst Corporation Ltd

> Defence innovation consultancy building synthetic environments and prototypes for autonomous and uncrewed systems.

## What they do

Catalyst Corporation creates real-time 3D simulations and synthetic environments to explore future technology at reduced risk and cost. It supports ideation, rapid prototyping and user testing, ranging from paper and code prototyping through to working technology demonstrators in complex system simulations. The company works on land and air systems, including drones, robotic and autonomous systems and uncrewed platforms. It is based at the Sussex Innovation Centre, University of Sussex.

## Products and solutions

- **SE2 synthetic environment** - real-time 3D environment containing uncrewed air and ground vehicle models that can be controlled directly (human in the loop) or autonomously using AI and machine learning approaches.
- **Prototyping and simulation services** - low-fidelity through to advanced prototyping for defence systems development.

Catalyst has worked with Dstl, Thales and Digital Concepts Engineering on the Land Digital Robotics and Autonomous Systems Integration Capability (L-DRIC) project, and has experimented with open electronic architecture standards such as DEF STAN GVA.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/catalystcorporation

# CAV Systems Ltd

> Aircraft ice protection and drag reduction technology for general aviation, commercial aerospace and defence.

## What they do

CAV Systems designs, certifies and manufactures aircraft ice protection systems and drag reduction technology. Its products are supplied to general aviation, commercial aerospace and defence markets. The company traces its origins to 1942, when the TKS fluid ice protection method was developed for RAF aircraft, and it manufactures from a site in Consett, County Durham.

## Products and solutions

- **TKS Ice Protection System** - fluid-based anti-ice and de-ice system certified for Flight Into Known Icing, installed across many aircraft types.
- **SLD Guard** - ice protection addressing supercooled large droplet icing and associated certification requirements.
- **microLASE laser-perforated surfaces** - laser-perforated panels used for drag reduction.

CAV's technologies have been applied on defence and aerospace platforms including the C-17, Eurofighter and unmanned aircraft.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2023-09-06** - The Loar Group Inc. completed its acquisition of CAV Systems Group. [source](https://www.cav-systems.com/news/the-loar-group-inc-announces-acquisition-of-cav-systems-group/)
