companies.body:
# Craxel UK

> US-founded graph database and AI decision-intelligence software company with a Belfast hub targeting UK and European defence and financial services markets.

## What they do

Craxel UK Ltd is the UK subsidiary of Craxel Inc. (Fairfax, Virginia, USA), incorporated in Belfast in December 2025 with Invest Northern Ireland backing. The parent company, founded in 2007, builds patented high-performance graph database software and AI decision-intelligence platforms for defence, national security, and financial services customers. The Belfast hub, planned to grow to 27 staff by 2028, is the company's primary base for UK and European market development, with a partnership with Queen's University Belfast Centre for Secure Information Technologies (CSIT). The company is an ADS Group member and signed the Armed Forces Covenant in May 2026.

## Products and solutions

- **Black Forest Knowledge Infrastructure** - patented graph database platform delivering O(1) query performance at large scale; supports time-series graph analysis, real-time observability, elastic ingest pipelines, geospatial analytics, edge computing, and IoT data management.
- **Black Forest Reaper** - defensive cyber analytics platform built on Black Forest, enabling real-time threat detection and analysis at scale; assessed "Awardable" on the US DoD CDAO Tradewinds Solutions Marketplace.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group; Armed Forces Covenant signatory (signed May 2026)

companies.body:
# Cre8 Associates

> UK micro-SME specialising in EMC engineering, covert and armoured vehicle electrical integration, and specialist electronic products for military, law enforcement, and government customers.

## What they do

Cre8 Associates is an electrical and electronic engineering consultancy and manufacturer operating from Bruntingthorpe Proving Ground, Lutterworth. Core work covers EMC design, filter manufacture, and pre-compliance and compliance testing to Def Stan 59-411 and MIL-STD-461; RF communications including electronic countermeasures system design; and armoured and covert vehicle electrical integration, wiring looms, and power management for government and agency customers worldwide. The company has manufactured and deployed proprietary products including the Start Safe II battery protection system and the LIMS Vehicle Blackout system.

## Products and solutions

- **EMC filters and testing** - design, manufacture, and testing to UK MOD Def Stan 59-411 and US MIL-STD-461 military standards.
- **LIMS Vehicle Blackout** - proprietary system announced 2018; manages electrical load shedding on specialist vehicles.
- **Start Safe II** - battery protection system; 200+ units shipped.
- **Shield Safe** - further battery and protection product; 50+ units deployed as of 2014.
- **Armoured and covert vehicle integration** - bespoke wiring, power management, and data acquisition installations for military and agency vehicles in UK, Middle East, and USA.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001:2015 (UKAS, certified January 2018)
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

companies.name: Createc Ltd
companies.summary: Applied technology SME developing gamma radiation imaging, autonomous robotics, AI, and GNSS-denied sensing systems for nuclear decommissioning, defence, and security markets.
companies.body:
# Createc

> Applied technology SME developing gamma radiation imaging, autonomous robotics, AI, and GNSS-denied sensing systems for nuclear decommissioning, defence, and security markets.

## What they do

Createc designs and deploys advanced sensing, robotics, and imaging systems, with particular depth in gamma radiation detection and 3D mapping, GNSS-denied navigation, LiDAR, and autonomous robotic platforms. Founded in 2010 in Cockermouth, Cumbria, the company employs more than 60 people including 13 PhDs across three specialist laboratories, with additional offices in Oxford and Oslo. Its technology stack is explicitly dual-use: the same robotics, sensing, and AI systems underpin nuclear decommissioning work for Sellafield, Dounreay, and TEPCO Fukushima, and defence and security applications including the UK MOD's SAPIENT autonomous sensor architecture.

## Products and solutions

- **N-Visage** - flagship gamma radiation 3D imaging system; 360 x 180 degree field, CZT detector, energy range 30 keV to 2 MeV, up to 1 Sv/hr dose tolerance; deployable through 90mm ports.
- **N-Visage Fusion** - 3D radiation field modelling and visualisation software.
- **N-Visage Explore** - robotic payload variant for real-time source discovery on mobile autonomous platforms.
- **SLATE (Scanning Laser Automatic Threat Extraction)** - sensor module developed for Dstl's SAPIENT programme; provides autonomous threat detection for perimeter security and counter-UAS applications.
- **RISER UAV** - GPS-denied autonomous drone (co-developed with Blue Bear Systems Research) with integrated N-Visage radiation sensing; deployed inside Fukushima Daiichi reactor buildings.
- **Flyt** - nuclear decommissioning and waste package management software.
- **Station Guardian / Situate** - AI and LiDAR-based crowd monitoring platform; permanently deployed at London Waterloo station from 2024 following Dstl-funded development through SAPIENT and DASA competitions.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2025-06-01** - Createc and AtkinsRéalis (ARCTEC joint venture) awarded up to £9.5m by the NDA for the Auto-SAS autonomous nuclear waste sorting and segregation project at NRS Oldbury, Phase 1 to August 2027. [gov.uk](https://www.gov.uk/government/news/nda-launches-pioneering-robotics-partnership-to-manage-nuclear-waste)
- **2025-03-01** - Createc receives fourth King's Award for Enterprise: International Trade. [createc.co.uk](https://createc.co.uk/createc-awarded-fourth-kings-award-for-international-trade/)
- **2024-12-01** - Createc and ANYbotics announce collaboration integrating N-Visage onto the ANYmal autonomous robot for nuclear power plant inspection in Europe, US, and Japan. [anybotics.com](https://www.anybotics.com/news/anybotics-and-createc-collaborate-to-revolutionize-nuclear-facility-inspections/)
- **2024-07-01** - Createc secures £3m Sellafield Ltd framework contract for Quadruped Robotic Inspection Platform (Boston Dynamics Spot with NV-Explore payload), July 2024 to July 2026. [createc.co.uk](https://createc.co.uk/createc-secures-3-million-contract-to-advance-quadruped-robotic-inspection-at-sellafield-ltd/)
- **2024-06-01** - Curtiss-Wright Nuclear signs teaming agreement with Createc to distribute products into the US commercial nuclear fleet, Department of Energy, Department of Defense, and National Laboratories. [curtisswright.com](https://nuclear.curtisswright.com/newsroom/news/news-details/2024/Curtiss-Wright-Signs-Agreement-with-Createc)
- **2024-04-01** - DASA-funded Station Guardian AI and LiDAR crowd safety system permanently deployed at London Waterloo by Network Rail following trials at Euston and Luton Airport. [gov.uk](https://www.gov.uk/government/news/crowd-watch-dasa-funded-ai-and-lidar-innovation-helps-enhance-crowd-safety)

## Links

- Website: https://createc.co.uk
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/createc

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website https://createc.co.uk; ADS Group member profile https://www.adsgroup.org.uk/members/createc-ltd-1/; Companies House record 07293648 https://find-and-update.company-information.service.gov.uk/company/07293648; GOV.UK SAPIENT news https://www.gov.uk/government/news/plug-and-play-autonomous-sensors; GOV.UK DASA telexistence https://www.gov.uk/government/news/cutting-edge-telexistence-technology-given-funding-boost; GOV.UK NDA robotics partnership https://www.gov.uk/government/news/nda-launches-pioneering-robotics-partnership-to-manage-nuclear-waste; GOV.UK Sellafield robot dogs case study https://www.gov.uk/government/case-studies/how-are-robot-dogs-helping-clean-up-sellafield; Curtiss-Wright announcement https://nuclear.curtisswright.com/newsroom/news/news-details/2024/Curtiss-Wright-Signs-Agreement-with-Createc; ANYbotics announcement https://www.anybotics.com/news/anybotics-and-createc-collaborate-to-revolutionize-nuclear-facility-inspections/; Tandfonline peer-reviewed publication on Fukushima deployment https://www.tandfonline.com/doi/full/10.1080/00223131.2024.2431537.

companies.body:
# Creative Composites

> Northern Ireland composites manufacturer producing glass and carbon fibre reinforced polymer components for automotive, transport, and defence markets, with over 40 years of defence container and packaging supply.

## What they do

Creative Composites designs and manufactures composite components using compression moulding, resin transfer moulding, CNC machining, painting, and assembly at a 100,000 sq.ft facility in Lisburn, Co. Antrim. The company owns the largest compression mould presses in the UK. Primary markets are automotive, transportation (bus, coach, rail), off-highway, and electric vehicles. Defence has been a continuous market for over 40 years, with the company supplying composite containers and packing assemblies for defence applications.

## Products and solutions

- **Composite containers and packing assemblies** - protective transit and storage casings for defence equipment; supplied to the defence sector for over 40 years per ADS member profile.
- **Compression-moulded structural components** - glass and carbon fibre reinforced polymer parts for automotive and transportation OEMs.

companies.body:
# CRFS Limited

> Cambridge-based manufacturer of RF spectrum monitoring and geolocation systems for military, intelligence, and national security customers.

## What they do

CRFS designs, builds, and deploys hardware and software for detecting, monitoring, and geolocating RF signals across congested and contested electromagnetic environments. The company serves military and EW operators, security and intelligence agencies, system integrators, and national spectrum regulators. In September 2025 CRFS was acquired by Motorola Solutions as part of its purchase of Silvus Technologies.

## Products and solutions

- **RFeye Node** - Portable, rugged RF sensors for real-time 24/7 spectrum monitoring and geolocation, covering frequencies up to 40 GHz; deployed on unmanned systems, integrated vehicles, and fixed installations.
- **RFeye Array** - Direction-finding antenna arrays (100 and 300 series) for signal geolocation.
- **RFeye Guard** - Technical surveillance countermeasures (TSCM) sensor.
- **RFeye Suite (Site / Mission Manager / DeepView)** - Software platform for spectrum analysis, mission management, and advanced signal intelligence analytics.
- **RFeye SenS Portable** - I/Q data recorder for RF signal capture.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials, ISO 9001:2015, JOSCAR
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2025-09-08** - Motorola Solutions acquired CRFS Limited and CRFS Inc. as part of its acquisition of Silvus Technologies Holdings Inc. [CRFS company news](https://www.crfs.com/company-news/motorola-solutions-welcomes-crfs-limited-and-crfs-inc)

# Crime and Fire Defence Systems Ltd

Crime and Fire Defence Systems designs, constructs, installs, and maintains integrated physical security systems including electrified perimeter fencing, CCTV, intruder detection, access control, and control room monitoring. companies.name: CrisisCast Ltd
companies.summary: Immersive security and military training organisation using roleplay actors, casualty simulation, and virtual reality to support defence, emergency services, and government customers.
companies.body:
# CrisisCast Ltd

> Immersive security and military training organisation using roleplay actors, casualty simulation, and virtual reality to support defence, emergency services, and government customers.

## What they do

CrisisCast provides scenario-based crisis training using professionally trained roleplay actors, film-grade casualty simulation, and virtual reality platforms. The company works with the military, police, emergency services, hospitals, and government bodies, delivering simulated mass casualty incidents, hostile threat exercises, and pre-deployment cultural immersion for special forces. Specialist actors are trained by behavioural psychologists and rehearsed in criminal and victim behaviour.

## Products and solutions

- **Casualty Simulation (CAS SIM)** - Film-grade moulage makeup, trained amputee actors, and scenario production for battlefield and emergency medical training.
- **Project Tyrion / Human Domain Matrix** - VR prototype training concept developed with the British Army, bringing immersive roleplay into a military virtual reality environment.
- **Pre-deployment VR** - Immersive psychological encounter simulations for special forces, recreating target cultural environments.
- **Crisis Management Exercises** - Scripted live scenarios testing communications, lockdown and evacuation procedures, emergency services response, and media handling.
- **Deepfake Training** - Simulated deepfake and shallowfake scenarios for crisis management exercises and consultancy.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2025-05-25** - British Army simulation training article references CrisisCast's Project Tyrion collaboration. [Unconventional Soldier](https://unconventionalsoldier.uk/2025/05/25/beyond-the-battlefield-exploring-british-army-simulation-training/)

# Critical Software Ltd

> Safety- and mission-critical software and systems engineering company serving aerospace, defence, and security customers; Portuguese-headquartered with a UK entity in Southampton.

## What they do

Critical Software provides systems and software engineering services for safety, mission, and business-critical applications. The company's aerospace and defence work covers avionics software development and certification (DO-178C, DO-254, ARP-4754A), command and control systems, and homeland security software. Founded in 1998 in Portugal, the company operates from offices in Southampton (UK), Coimbra, Porto, and Lisbon (Portugal), Munich (Germany), and Boston (USA). The UK entity (Companies House 05256049) is a subsidiary of the Portuguese parent.

## Products and solutions

- **Avionics software development and certification** - DO-178C, DO-254, and ARP-4754A compliant development and verification for civil and military aviation programmes.
- **Command and control systems** - Software for mission-critical C2 environments, including defence and homeland security applications.
- **Data management services** - Solutions for managing critical operational assets and processes.
- **Critical FlyTech (joint venture)** - A 51/49 joint venture with Airbus, launched November 2025, focused on high-assurance embedded software and certifiable avionics, cabin, and connectivity systems.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

companies.body:
# Cross Manufacturing

> Bath-based precision manufacturer of metallic sealing components for aerospace, defence and high-performance industrial applications.

## What they do

Cross Manufacturing designs and manufactures precision-engineered metallic sealing solutions for aircraft engines, gas and steam turbines, automotive turbochargers and other high-temperature, high-stress environments. The company has been developing heat-resistant wrought alloy products since the 1930s. In 2026, Cross Manufacturing established the UK's first pilot-scale end-to-end manufacturing process for Ceramic Matrix Composites (CMCs), working with Dstl, QinetiQ, MBDA, the University of Oxford, the National Composites Centre and the UK Atomic Energy Authority.

## Products and solutions

- **Brush seals** - high-temperature sealing rings for aircraft engines and gas turbines.
- **Retaining rings** - precision retaining components ranging from 6 mm to over 2,000 mm diameter.
- **Step gap sealing rings and friction rings** - for advanced propulsion and transmission systems.
- **Ceramic Matrix Composite components** - pilot-scale production of nose cones, curved panels and high-temperature seals capable of withstanding temperatures exceeding 1,000°C; targeted at hypersonics, space and advanced propulsion.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** AS/EN/JISQ 9100, ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 50001, ISO/TS (ITAF) 16949, NADCAP (EDM, Heat Treatment, NDT, Welding), Cyber Essentials Plus
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2026-03-10** - Dstl announces Cross Manufacturing has built the UK's first pilot-scale CMC manufacturing process, co-developed with QinetiQ, MBDA and academic partners. [GOV.UK](https://www.gov.uk/government/news/uk-first-achieved-in-advanced-materials-to-benefit-defence)

## Links

- Website: https://www.crossmanufacturing.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/cross-manufacturing-company-1938-ltd/

# CrowdStrike Holdings, Inc.

> Cloud-native cyber security vendor built around the Falcon platform, with UK operations serving government and enterprise.

## What they do

CrowdStrike is a cyber security company founded in 2011 and headquartered in Austin, Texas. Its AI-native Falcon platform unifies endpoint, cloud, identity and data security through a single lightweight sensor and cloud back end. It serves enterprise and public sector customers internationally, including UK government agencies and FTSE 100 organisations, with a network of UK-based managed service partners.

## Products and solutions

- **Falcon platform** - AI-native security platform unifying endpoint, cloud, identity and AI security in one agent and console.
- **Falcon Data Security** - data security product launched at RSA 2026 to discover, classify and stop unauthorised movement of sensitive data in real time.

CTS Logistics delivers specialist road transportation, global freight forwarding, secure warehousing and site logistics for defence, nuclear and healthcare customers. # Cubic Corporation

> US defence and transportation technology group providing combat training systems, C4ISR and fare-collection systems.

## What they do

Cubic Corporation is a US multinational defence and public transportation technology company founded in 1949. It operates across realistic combat training systems, secure communications and networking, and command, control, communications, computers, intelligence, surveillance and reconnaissance (C4ISR) capabilities for the US and allied forces, alongside automated fare-collection systems for public transit. The company was publicly traded until 2021, when it was taken private by Veritas Capital and Evergreen Coast Capital.

## Products and solutions

- **Cubic Defense (formerly Cubic Global Defense / Cubic Mission Solutions)** - live, virtual and constructive military training systems, range instrumentation, laser-based training, and networked C4ISR capabilities.
- **Cubic Transportation Systems** - automated fare-collection and integrated payment systems for public transport operators.

Cummins Ltd is the UK registered entity of Cummins Inc., an American power technology company headquartered in Columbus, Indiana. UK manufacturing facilities are located in Darlington and Daventry. Cummins Inc. is NYSE-listed and one of the largest independent diesel engine manufacturers in the world.

Cundall is an independent multi-disciplinary engineering and design consultancy with over 1,200 engineers and designers operating across 29 locations globally. Cunning Running provides specialist 2D and 3D mapping, visualisation and planning software that supports decision-making in mission-critical operations. The company specialises in using GIS to analyse, visualise and understand threats and mitigations, supporting force protection, counter-terrorism, search and law-enforcement tasks. # Cunningham Covers Limited

## What they do

Cunningham Covers designs and manufactures custom textile protective covers for defence and other high-consequence sectors. The company has served the defence market for over 40 years, producing covers for military vehicles, artillery, small arms, battle tanks, ships and submarines. Manufacturing takes place in a 50,000 square foot facility in Maghera, Co Londonderry, with products shipped globally. Cunningham has received the King's Award for Enterprise in recognition of its international trade.

# Curtiss-Wright Defense Solutions

> US-headquartered defence electronics division of Curtiss-Wright Corporation (NYSE: CW), with UK design and manufacturing facilities specialising in embedded computing, flight recorders, and video management systems.

## What they do

Curtiss-Wright Defense Solutions is a division of Curtiss-Wright Corporation, supplying rugged embedded computing, flight data recording, mission computing, and video management systems for military and commercial aerospace applications. The UK-based business, with facilities at Christchurch (Dorset) and Letchworth (Hertfordshire), designs and manufactures flight recorders, air data computers, mission computers, video recorders, and video management solutions. UK manufacturing capabilities include environmental stress screening and system integration of COTS cards into rugged enclosures, all qualified to AS9100. The Letchworth site has been a centre of excellence for defence and aerospace computing products since 1982.

## Products and solutions

- **Rugged embedded computing** - COTS-based processor systems and application-ready computing platforms for unmanned vehicles, helicopters, missiles, and fixed-wing aircraft.
- **Flight data recorders** - airborne flight data and cockpit voice recorders for military and commercial platforms.
- **Video management systems** - video recorders and management solutions for airborne ISR and mission systems.
- **Air data computers** - aircraft air data sensing and processing systems.
- **Data acquisition systems** - high-speed flight test instrumentation including network switches, recorders, and RF transmitters.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** AS9100, SC21 OE, SC21 Silver
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

# Curtiss-Wright Defense Solutions

> Rugged embedded computing and electronic systems for manned and unmanned air, land and naval defence platforms.

## What they do

Curtiss-Wright Defense Solutions is the defence electronics arm of Curtiss-Wright Corporation, a US-listed engineering group headquartered in Davidson, North Carolina. It provides rugged embedded computing modules, electronic systems and networking and communication solutions for manned and unmanned rotorcraft, fixed-wing, ground and naval applications. Its products are based on open-architecture commercial off-the-shelf (COTS) technologies designed to meet size, weight, power and cost (SWaP-C) constraints. The NCS (Networking and Communication Solutions) line provides secure mobile networking and tactical data link processing.

## Products and solutions

- **Rugged embedded computing** - single board computers, FPGA processor cards, digital signal processors, I/O and communications boards, and video/graphics cards.
- **Networking and Communication Solutions (NCS)** - secure mobile networks for distributed processing and time-sensitive data sharing, plus tactical data link processing.
- **Computing and electronic systems** - integrated C5ISR and vetronics system solutions ruggedised for harsh land, air and sea environments.

# CVC Components Limited

> Essex-based obsolescence supply-chain specialist stocking over 100 million hard-to-find legacy, military, avionic, radar, and electronic components.

## What they do

CVC Components, part of the UKC Group, is one of the UK's largest stockists of obsolete, discontinued, and hard-to-find electronic and mechanical components for military, avionic, radar, industrial, and commercial applications. Operating from a purpose-built 45,000 sq ft secure storage facility on a 40-acre site in Latchingdon, Essex, the company supplies government, defence, and commercial customers worldwide. Capabilities extend to sourcing, reverse engineering, testing and analysis services, and small-batch manufacturing when replacement components are globally unavailable. The business traces its origins to Chelmer Valve Co Ltd, established in 1961, and rebranded as CVC Components in 2018.

## Products and solutions

- **Obsolete and legacy component supply** - over 100 million electronic and mechanical components in stock, covering semiconductors, integrated circuits, connectors, resistors, capacitors, transistors, diodes, circuit breakers, synchro motors, and NATO-numbered (NSN) items for military ships, aircraft, land vehicles, and radar systems.
- **Sourcing services** - international network-based sourcing of hard-to-find and obsolete parts not held in stock.
- **Reverse engineering** - engineering and manufacturing of replacement components when originals are globally unavailable.
- **Testing and analysis** - independent component testing and verification services.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR registered
- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

# Cyber Chain Alliance Ltd

> Cyber security consultancy and NCSC-assured service provider serving the defence supply chain, public sector and private organisations.

## What they do

Cyber Chain Alliance (CCA) helps organisations manage information risk and strengthen cyber resilience through tailored consultancy, ISO 27001 certification support, managed security solutions and cyber incident and crisis management. The company holds NCSC Assured Service Provider status for Cyber Incident Exercising and operates as a Certification Body for Cyber Essentials, Cyber Essentials Plus and IASME Assurance. CCA explicitly supports ADS members in protecting assets across the aerospace, defence, security and space supply chains.

## Products and solutions

- **Cyber Incident Exercising** - NCSC-assured design and delivery of cyber exercises.
- **ISO 27001 Certification Support** - Consultancy through to certification.
- **Cyber Essentials / CE+ Certification** - Assessment and certification body services.
- **Managed Security Solutions** - Ongoing security management for organisations.

# Cyber Defence Service Ltd

> UK cyber, radio-frequency and electromagnetic-spectrum firm supporting military, law enforcement and public-sector clients.

## What they do

Cyber Defence Service supports critical organisations across the military, law enforcement, and public and private sectors, including SMEs. It specialises in the cyber, radio-frequency and electromagnetic environments, providing real-time analysis and exposure of what it calls the invisible battlespace. It does this by developing secure platforms and methodologies that connect advanced hardware to secure cloud-based software systems.

## Products and solutions

- **Overt AI** - a wideband, high-fidelity radio-frequency detection and analysis system using machine learning to detect adversary activity, tactics and techniques, providing real-time and recorded overviews of RF activity and geolocation.
- **Service areas** - AI and machine learning, cyber and networks, cyber threat intelligence, data science, information assurance, open-source intelligence, sensors and communications, software, and systems engineering.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials Plus.
- **Memberships:** Stated alumni of the 2021 NCSC Cyber Accelerator and graduate of HMGCC Accelerate; member of the North West Cyber Security Cluster and Greater Manchester Digital Security Hub.

# Cyber Guarded Ltd

> Vendor-independent cyber security testing and assurance firm; NCSC-accredited for CHECK penetration testing and Cyber Advisor services.

## What they do

Cyber Guarded provides infrastructure, cloud, IoT and application security testing and auditing services to organisations in the public and private sectors. The company is NCSC-accredited as a CHECK penetration testing provider and as a Cyber Advisor. It also operates as a Cyber Essentials Plus Certification Body, assessing and certifying organisations against the government's Cyber Essentials scheme. Clients include government departments, local authorities, health trusts, fire and rescue services, international airports and financial institutions. The company operates offices in Surrey, Belfast and Dublin.

## Products and solutions

- **CHECK Penetration Testing** - NCSC-accredited infrastructure and application penetration testing.
- **Red Team Testing** - Ethical hacking exercises simulating real-world attack techniques.
- **Cyber Audits and Reviews** - Risk and compliance-based audit of an organisation's cyber security posture.
- **Cyber Risk Management** - Strategy, policy and procedure development.
- **Cyber Essentials / CE+ Certification** - Assessment and certification body services.

companies.body:
# Cyber Ranges

> Cyprus-headquartered military-grade cyber range platform provider; UK entity (Cyber Ranges UK and Ireland Ltd) based in Sheffield; serves militaries, governments and critical national infrastructure.

## What they do

Cyber Ranges designs, delivers and manages simulation-based cyber security exercises for training and capability development. The platform is used by military and law enforcement agencies, governments and critical infrastructure operators to build and validate cyber defence capabilities. Cyber Ranges is the official cyber range platform of the UN's International Telecommunication Union (ITU) for national, regional and global cyber drills. MITRE ATT&CK designated the platform its cyber range of choice in 2022. The UK entity, Cyber Ranges UK and Ireland Ltd (Companies House 05831135), is registered in Sheffield. The company's global HQ is in Limassol, Cyprus, with additional offices in the United States and Kenya.

## Products and solutions

- **Cyber Range Platform** - Cloud-hosted and on-premise simulation environment for cyber exercises and capability development.
- **Military and Law Enforcement Package** - Tailored cyber training for armed forces and law enforcement agencies.
- **Workforce Development Programmes** - Transition training for personnel moving from active service to civilian cyber roles.
- **National Cyber Drills** - Design and delivery of national-level cyber exercises in partnership with the ITU.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group; European Cyber Security Organisation (ECSO); Global Cyber Alliance (GCA, Premium Partner)

# CSA Cyber

> Gloucester-based cyber security managed services and consultancy provider, NCSC-approved CHECK company, with a client base including UK government and MoD organisations.

## What they do

Cyber Security Associates Ltd, trading as CSA Cyber, was founded in 2013 by former UK government cyber specialists and operates a 24/7 Security Operations Centre (SOC) in Gloucester. The company provides cyber consultancy, penetration testing, managed detection and response, and incident response services. CSA Cyber holds NCSC CHECK status and serves government organisations including the Ministry of Defence, the Foreign and Commonwealth Office and large UK enterprises. FluidOne invested in CSA in 2020 and CSA acquired SureCloud Cyber Services in March 2024.

## Products and solutions

- **Managed Detection and Response (MDR)** - 24/7 SOC-based monitoring and threat detection using Microsoft Sentinel and SentinelOne.
- **Penetration testing** - NCSC CHECK and CREST-approved application, infrastructure, product and cloud testing.
- **BorderPoint** - CSA's proprietary security incident detection platform providing real-time monitoring and alerting.
- **Incident response** - emergency response, retainer services and tabletop exercises.
- **Cyber Essentials certification** - CE and CE+ assessments as an accredited certification body.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** NCSC CHECK, CREST, ISO 27001, ISO 9001, Cyber Essentials Certification Body, Microsoft Solutions Partner (Security), Microsoft Advanced Solutions Partner (Cloud Security, Threat Protection)
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

companies.summary: UK subsidiary of the global identity security specialist, providing privileged access management and identity protection platforms to government and defence customers.
companies.body:
# CyberArk Software (UK) Ltd

> UK subsidiary of the global identity security specialist, providing privileged access management and identity protection platforms to government and defence customers.

## What they do

CyberArk is a global leader in identity security, specialising in protecting organisations from cyber threats that exploit privileged accounts and credentials. The company pioneered the Privileged Access Management (PAM) category and offers a platform covering both human and machine identities. CyberArk serves UK central government, defence, and critical national infrastructure clients, with its products listed on the G-Cloud Digital Marketplace and the UK Government's approved solutions catalogue. In February 2026 CyberArk was acquired by Palo Alto Networks in a transaction valued at approximately $25 billion; the UK entity continues to operate under the CyberArk brand.

## Products and solutions

- **CyberArk Privilege Cloud** - SaaS privileged access management; listed on G-Cloud for UK public sector procurement.
- **CyberArk Secure Cloud Access** - Secure access controls for cloud infrastructure; available via G-Cloud.
- **CyberArk Identity Security Platform** - Integrated platform securing human and machine identities across enterprise environments, including government and defence deployments.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** G-Cloud (multiple services listed on the UK Digital Marketplace)
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2026-02-11** - Palo Alto Networks completed the $25 billion acquisition of CyberArk, combining identity security and network security into a unified platform. [DelMorgan & Co.](https://delmorganco.com/palo-alto-networks-acquisition-of-cyberark/)
- **2025-07-30** - Palo Alto Networks announced the definitive agreement to acquire CyberArk. [Palo Alto Networks](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/company/press/2025/palo-alto-networks-announces-agreement-to-acquire-cyberark--the-identity-security-leader)

# CybExer Technologies

> Estonian cyber range and live-fire cyber training platforms for defence, government and critical infrastructure.

## What they do

CybExer Technologies is a NATO-awarded Estonian cybersecurity company that builds and maintains cyber security training platforms with a focus on cyber capability development. Its cyber range is a virtual environment that can run thousands of virtual machines at once and supports highly realistic live-fire exercises, cyber skills testing, capture-the-flag competitions and security testing. The platforms are used for training across the spectrum from ordinary users and technical responders to strategic leadership.

companies.name: CYIENT Europe Limited
companies.summary: UK subsidiary of Cyient Limited, an Indian-headquartered engineering and technology services group providing aerospace and defence engineering, avionics design, aerostructures, and digital services.
companies.body:
# CYIENT Europe

> UK subsidiary of Cyient Limited, an Indian-headquartered engineering and technology services group providing aerospace and defence engineering, avionics design, aerostructures, and digital services.

## What they do

CYIENT Europe Limited is the UK legal entity of Cyient Limited, incorporated in 1992 (as Infotech Enterprises Europe Ltd) and active with over 1,000 UK staff. The group delivers engineering design, embedded systems, digital aftermarket, and design-led manufacturing for the aerospace and defence sector. The EMEA headquarters is in London (High Holborn); a significant operational presence is maintained in Reading and Cheddar (Somerset), the latter carrying geospatial heritage from the 2016 Blom Aerofilms acquisition.

Cyient Limited is listed on Indian stock exchanges and reported group revenue of approximately $834 million in FY2025 across some 20,800 employees in 24 countries.

## Products and solutions

- **Avionics and embedded systems** - fly-by-wire, actuation, autopilot, collision avoidance, navigation, flight controls, battery management, RF and microwave electronics; systems engineering, design, prototyping, testing, and independent verification and validation.
- **Aerostructures** - metallic and composite design, stress analysis, and value engineering for OEMs and Tier 1 suppliers.
- **Defence electronics** - ITAR-compliant delivery centres; X-band transmit/receive modules for AESA radar (described as ITAR-free); Software Defined Radio for secure military communications.
- **UAV systems** - field-proven ISTAR, artillery target acquisition, battle damage assessment, and persistent surveillance via Cyient Solutions and Systems (a joint venture with BlueBird Aero Systems).
- **Digital aftermarket and MRO** - predictive maintenance, health monitoring, digital technical publications, and asset management.
- **Geospatial services** - aerial survey, mapping, and geospatial data products (Somerset site).

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** AS9100:2016, ISO/IEC 27001:2022, ISO 9001:2015, ISO 14001:2015 (parent entity; UK scope not separately confirmed in open sources)
- **Memberships:** ADS Group, Midlands Aerospace Alliance

## Recent news

- **2026-06** - Cyient group acquires Tao Digital for approximately $218 million to boost AI capabilities. [Tracxn](https://tracxn.com/d/companies/cyient/)
- **2025-12** - Cyient Semiconductors acquires Kinetic Technologies for $93 million, adding power conversion and protection IP. [EE Times](https://www.eetimes.com/cyient-semiconductors-to-acquire-kinetic-technologies-for-93-million/)
- **2025-02** - Cyient expands its engineering role on the Deutsche Aircraft D328eco regional turboprop programme. [MRO Business Today](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/mro-business-today_cyient-expands-role-in-d328eco-project-activity-7287412418262032385-IKnM)

companies.body:
# CYSIAM

> UK cyber intelligence specialist providing managed detection and response, incident response, and sovereign cyber capacity-building for national security, defence, and public sector clients.

## What they do

CYSIAM is a specialist cyber security company founded in 2018, headquartered in rural Buckinghamshire near Milton Keynes. The team background is military intelligence, law enforcement, and national security; all staff hold HMG security clearances. The company operates a wholly UK-based 24/7/365 Security Operations Centre and delivers managed detection and response underpinned by a proprietary Cyber Threat Intelligence platform informed by collaboration with over 700 global Incident Response Teams. Since 2019 CYSIAM has built sustainable SOC and CIRT capability in over 25 countries, working with national governments and critical infrastructure operators on behalf of UK international development programmes. A private equity firm (undisclosed) acquired the company from Maven VCTs in May 2026.

## Products and solutions

- **Managed Detection and Response (MDR)** - 24/7/365 intelligence-led SOC service with CREST SOC accreditation, built around a proprietary Cyber Threat Intelligence platform.
- **Cyber Incident Response (CIR)** - NCSC-certified Level 2 incident response capability for high-severity events.
- **Cyber Capacity Building** - sovereign SOC and CIRT delivery for national governments and critical infrastructure operators; 25-plus countries since 2019.
- **Penetration Testing and Vulnerability Assessment** - CREST-accredited testing across IT and OT environments.
- **Cyber Incident Exercising** - NCSC Assured Service Provider for tabletop and live exercises.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** Crown Commercial Service (Cyber Services 3, G-Cloud 11, R-Cloud, DOS4); JOSCAR registered
- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials Plus; IASME Gold; ISO 9001; ISO 27001; CREST (Penetration Testing, Vulnerability Assessment, Incident Response, SOC); NCSC Cyber Incident Response Level 2; NCSC Assured Service Provider (Cyber Incident Exercising); NCSC Approved Cyber Advisor; FIRST Full Member; MOD Employer Recognition Scheme Gold
- **Memberships:** ADS Group, techUK

## Recent news

- **2026-05** - Maven VCTs exit CYSIAM through a sale to an undisclosed UK mid-market private equity firm, generating a 3x return on their 2021 investment. [Maven Capital](https://www.mavencp.com/our-portfolio/cysiam)
- **2025** - CYSIAM named CrowdStrike's 2025 Rising Star Partner of the Year. [cysiam.com](https://cysiam.com/news/cysiam-named-crowdstrikes-2025-rising-star-partner-of-the-year-2025)

companies.name: Cyviz Limited
companies.summary: UK subsidiary of Oslo-listed Norwegian technology company Cyviz AS, designing and delivering high-performance control rooms, command-and-control centres, and deployable visualisation systems for defence, government, and enterprise.
companies.body:
# Cyviz UK

> UK subsidiary of Oslo-listed Norwegian technology company Cyviz AS, designing and delivering high-performance control rooms, command-and-control centres, and deployable visualisation systems for defence, government, and enterprise.

## What they do

Cyviz Limited (trading as Cyviz UK Ltd) is the British entity of Cyviz AS, incorporated in Scotland in 2012 and registered at Dalkeith, Midlothian. The parent is listed on Euronext Growth (Oslo, ticker: CYVIZ) and operates across seven countries. Cyviz builds integrated control room and C2 environments combining video wall infrastructure, data visualisation, and a software management platform for remote monitoring and multi-site management. The company is in an active strategic transition from system integrator to software and platform provider.

The company claims over 1,500 control room deployments across 80-plus countries and serves NATO bodies, governments, and major commercial enterprise customers.

## Products and solutions

- **Integrated control room and C2 systems** - turnkey hardware and software environments for joint operation centres, security operation centres, and emergency operation centres; supports Tempest A/B certifiable and Common Criteria EAL4 certifiable architectures.
- **Deployable and containerised command centres** - mobile, ruggedised C2 capability for expeditionary and field use; demonstrated 24-hour deployment during a NATO-aligned Dutch military exercise (June 2025).
- **Software Management Platform** - remote monitoring, management, and multi-site control of AV and visualisation infrastructure; the core platform-as-product offering.
- **Design and professional services** - site design, systems integration, and ongoing managed support.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR registered
- **Accreditations:** SOC2; architecture supports NATO Tempest A/B certification and Common Criteria EAL4 certification
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2025-12** - Cyviz awarded two classified NATO defence contracts to deliver containerised C2 capability to two major European NATO-partner nations; initial deployments 2025 and full operational readiness targeted Q1 2026. [BusinessWire](https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20251218625485/en/Cyviz-Awarded-Two-Classified-NATO-Defense-Contracts)
- **2025-07** - Strategic partnership announced with Anders+Kern UK Ltd to distribute Cyviz's Software Management Platform through the UK AV channel. [Cyviz newsroom](https://www.cyviz.com/newsroom/cyviz-and-anderskern-uk-ltd-form-partnership-to-deliver-scalable-software-solutions/)
- **2025-06** - Cyviz demonstrates 24-hour ballistic-protected mobile command centre deployment during a NATO-aligned Dutch military exercise, working with SPIE Nederland, Capgemini, and Dujardin Remmers. [The Defense Post](https://thedefensepost.com/2025/06/10/cyviz-ballistic-proof-command-center/)

## Links

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/cyviz-as

# DJJ Precision Engineering

> CNC precision engineering manufacturer supplying machined components to defence, aerospace, automotive, motorsport and other sectors from a facility in Pontypool, South Wales.

## What they do

DJJ Precision Engineering Ltd is a 24/7 CNC precision machining and manufacturing company based in Pontypool, South Wales, established in 1976. It produces CNC turned and milled components, broaching, prototypes, assemblies, sub-assemblies and laser-marked parts for over 200 industries including defence, aerospace, automotive, motorsport, medical and rail. The company holds JOSCAR registration as an approved defence supplier and is a Ford Global Tier 1 manufacturer. It has been a signatory to the Armed Forces Covenant.

## Products and solutions

- **CNC machining** - precision CNC turning, milling, broaching, honing, grinding and ID marking from a 10,000 sq ft facility, with 24/7 manufacturing capability.
- **Prototype and batch production** - design and prototype expertise through to full batch production, with CMM inspection, PPAP, ISIR, IMDS and C of C certification.
- **One-stop-shop supply** - surface finishing, treatments, stock management, kanban and global delivery services.

companies.name: DAETECH SYSTEMS (UK) LIMITED
companies.summary: Manchester-based designer and manufacturer of bespoke digital forensics, evidence retrieval, and field intelligence gathering systems for law enforcement, military, counter-terrorism, and government agencies.
companies.body:
# Daetech Systems (UK)

> Manchester-based designer and manufacturer of bespoke digital forensics, evidence retrieval, and field intelligence gathering systems for law enforcement, military, counter-terrorism, and government agencies.

## What they do

Daetech Systems (UK) Limited has manufactured custom intelligence and digital forensics systems since 2000, serving law enforcement, military, state security, counter-terrorism, homeland security, and government agencies in the UK and internationally. The company also holds the exclusive global distributor and hardware integration partnership for Cognitech Inc, the forensic image analysis software developer, providing sales, support, and training on the full Cognitech product range. International deployments include Sweden, the Netherlands, Germany, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Oman, Jordan, Morocco, Algeria, Turkey, Lebanon, Mauritius, and India.

## Products and solutions

- **MIDAS (Mobile Image and Data Acquisition System)** - field-deployable, off-grid capable platform for on-scene CCTV retrieval, drive cloning, and multimedia evidence processing; integrated battery system; used by law enforcement, counter-terrorism, and military agencies.
- **DARS (Digital Analysis and Retrieval System)** - video processing and photogrammetry workstations for agencies handling large volumes of digital multimedia evidence; hundreds of systems deployed in the UK and internationally.
- **Cognitech forensic video products** - forensic video enhancement, analysis, and photogrammetry software distributed and integrated exclusively by Daetech for UK and international agencies.
- **Bespoke remote and off-grid computing solutions** - custom-built systems to agency operational and environmental specifications, including austere and remote environments.
- **Training** - digital forensic investigator courses for agency and military personnel.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group, Made in Britain

## Links

- Website: https://daetechsystems.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/daetech-systems-uk-limited

companies.name: Daher Aerospace Ltd

companies.body:
# Daher Aerospace Ltd

> French aerospace group providing integrated logistics, defence equipment, and aircraft manufacturing to aerospace and defence customers, with a UK operating base in the East Midlands.

## What they do

Daher is a family-owned French aerospace and industrial group, active in the UK since the 1960s. Its UK entity operates across integrated supply-chain logistics for aerospace and defence customers (including an active Airbus Defence and Space A400M logistics partnership), specialist packaging and kitting, vendor-managed inventory, MRO support, and export-controlled storage. The wider Daher group manufactures military tactical containers, mobile tactical shelters, and the TBM turboprop aircraft series, and is developing the EyePulse MALE drone demonstrator, with first flight achieved in 2025.

## Products and solutions

- **Military tactical containers** - over 200 types in laminated polyester, thermoformed aluminium, sandwich panel, and 19-inch rack formats; compliant with European military standards for transport and storage of weapons, aircraft components, engines, and communications systems.
- **Mobile tactical shelters** - configured for radar, communications, and operational missions.
- **Integrated logistics support** - supply-chain management, VMI, kitting, MRO support, and mid-life retrofit for aerospace and defence customers; delivered on-site at five customer locations across the UK.
- **EyePulse MALE drone** - medium altitude long endurance drone demonstrator; first flight 2025.
- **TBM turboprop aircraft** - civil and dual-use turboprop series (TBM 910/960 family) manufactured by Daher Aircraft.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO accredited (Doncaster site); Black Book approved; EAR/ITAR approved (Doncaster).
- **Memberships:** ADS Group; Midlands Aerospace Alliance.

## Recent news

- **2025-02-05** - Daher reported revenue of €1.9bn for 2025, with 14,500 employees, and announced acceleration of its Take Off 2027 strategic plan including international expansion and new logistics contracts. [AIN Online](https://www.ainonline.com/aviation-news/aerospace/2025-02-05/revenues-rise-daher-chases-improved-productivity)
- **2025** - Daher achieved first flight of its EyePulse MALE drone demonstrator, developed in under six months. [Daher](https://www.daher.com/en/daher-continues-its-development-during-the-take-off-2027-strategic-plan-sovereign-innovation-and-internationalization/)
- **2025** - Daher published a statement on strengthening its position in the defence market. [Daher](https://www.daher.com/en/daher-strengthens-its-position-in-the-rapidly-expanding-defense-market/)
- **2026-07** - Exhibiting on the ADS Pavilion at Farnborough International Airshow 2026. [ADS Group](https://www.adsgroup.org.uk/farnborough-international-airshow-2026/)

## Links

# Dantech Electronic Engineering

> UK designer and manufacturer of electronic power supplies, security hardware, and access-control equipment, serving government and critical infrastructure security integrators.

## What they do

Dantech Electronic Engineering, trading name of Benham (General Engineers) Limited, designs and manufactures electronic security and life-safety products at its facility in Maldon, Essex. Products include power supplies, power management equipment, relay modules, indicators, request-to-exit switches, door interlocks, and equipment-mounting solutions. The company is a named technology partner of Axis Communications and distributes through ADI Global and Norbain. Dantech exhibits at Security and Policing, the Home Office's invitation-only event at Farnborough, confirming engagement with the government security market.

## Products and solutions

- **Power supplies and power management** - a range of 12V and 24V DC and 24V AC power supply units for access control, CCTV, and security systems.
- **Access control ancillaries** - relay modules, door interlocks, request-to-exit switches, and indicator panels.
- **Axis housing and power solutions** - specialist enclosures and power feeds for Axis Communications network door-controller hardware.
- **Bespoke and turnkey engineering** - custom electronic assemblies built to customer specification.

# DarkSaber Labs

> US electronic warfare firm building AI-driven, edge-computing EW systems for dismounted operators.

## What they do

DarkSaber Labs builds electronic warfare systems rooted in agentic AI and edge computing, designed for operators in disconnected, contested, data-heavy environments. It develops modular, full-hardware-stack EW solutions intended to act as a force multiplier across electronic warfare, signals intelligence and cyber operations.

## Products and solutions

- **Yankee One** - an AI-powered sensor fusion system that autonomously interprets electronic signals, imagery and communications to give the operator real-time information. Manpackable with a chest-worn tablet, geared for dismounted operations.

# Darter Ltd

> UK data and digital consultancy operating exclusively in defence, national security, and critical infrastructure.

## What they do

Darter is a Southampton-based consultancy whose stated scope is strengthening UK security, resilience, and prosperity through data strategy and digital transformation. Service lines include data strategy, cloud platform implementation, digital transformation advisory, and AI and data governance programmes. The company works with defence clients including RAF Digital and operates as a partner SME within the Mars Secure Advisors consortium for defence and aerospace data transformation. Darter holds two G-Cloud 14 listings on the Crown Commercial Service digital marketplace.

> Independent management and technical consultancy providing strategic decision support to defence, government, and critical national infrastructure clients worldwide.

Decision Analysis Services Limited (DAS Ltd) is a Basingstoke-based consultancy specialising in systems thinking, programme and portfolio management, investment modelling, and AI-enabled analytics. companies.body:
# Dassault Systemes UK Ltd

> UK subsidiary of the French 3DEXPERIENCE software group, providing 3D design, simulation, and digital manufacturing platforms to aerospace, defence, and industrial customers.

## What they do

Dassault Systèmes UK Ltd is the British operating entity of Dassault Systèmes SE (branded as "the 3DEXPERIENCE Company"), founded in 1981 and headquartered in France. The UK subsidiary sells, deploys, and supports the group's platform portfolio into British aerospace, defence, and manufacturing industry. Dassault Systèmes serves 290,000 customers in 140 countries across 11 industries. In the UK it has over 250 employees and a primary office in Warwick, and is a long-standing partner to Airbus, the AMRC at the University of Sheffield, and Cranfield University.

## Products and solutions

- **CATIA** - 3D design and engineering platform; the established standard tool across the Airbus supply chain and used by BAE Systems, Rolls-Royce, and UK defence primes.
- **SIMULIA Aerospace and Defence** - multi-physics simulation covering structural, aerodynamic, aeroacoustic, and electromagnetic analysis for rotorcraft, ground systems, fighter aircraft, and missiles.
- **DELMIA** - digital manufacturing and operations management, including Factory of the Future capability demonstrated at AMRC Cymru.
- **ENOVIA** - product lifecycle and programme management.
- **3DEXPERIENCE platform** - cloud-based integration layer for digital engineering and virtual twin programmes; marketed for defence programme management and sovereign cloud deployment.
- **Sovereign cloud for defence** - a secure, certified cloud collaboration environment for next-generation defence programmes, partnered with Dassault Aviation for FCAS-adjacent work and NATO-aligned customers.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001:2015 (design, development, deployment, and support of 3DEXPERIENCE, SIMULIA, and SOLIDWORKS); ISO/IEC 27001:2022 (information security); ISO 27701 (privacy information management); SOC 2 Type II; ASME NQA-1:2022 (nuclear-grade software quality for SIMULIA).
- **Memberships:** ADS Group; North West Aerospace Alliance.

## Recent news

- **2026-07** - Confirmed participant at Farnborough Airshow 2026 with a "3D UNIVERSES" theme around continuity across products and generations. [3ds.com](https://www.3ds.com)
- **2025** - Airbus and Dassault Systèmes announced a five-year Memorandum of Agreement for collaborative 3D design, engineering, manufacturing, simulation, and intelligence. [ADS Group](https://www.adsgroup.org.uk)
- **2024-07** - Renewed and extended 10-year partnership with the University of Sheffield AMRC at Farnborough Airshow 2024, committing software, training, and support to UK aerospace innovation including virtual twin development. [3ds.com](https://www.3ds.com/newsroom/press-releases/euronorth/dassault-systemes-and-university-sheffield-amrc-enter-new-partnership-support-innovation-aerospace-manufacturing-uk)

## Links

companies.name: Databricks UK Ltd
companies.summary: UK and EMEA subsidiary of Databricks, Inc., providing a unified data lakehouse and AI platform to government, defence, and enterprise customers.
companies.body:
# Databricks UK Ltd

> UK and EMEA subsidiary of Databricks, Inc., providing a unified data lakehouse and AI platform to government, defence, and enterprise customers.

## What they do

Databricks UK Ltd (registered as Databricks U.K. Limited) is the British subsidiary of Databricks, Inc., founded in 2013 in San Francisco by the original creators of Apache Spark. The company offers a cloud-native Data Intelligence Platform combining data engineering, machine learning, SQL analytics, and generative AI on a unified lakehouse architecture, running natively on AWS, Microsoft Azure, and Google Cloud. More than 20,000 organisations globally use the platform, including over 50% of the FTSE 100. The UK entity serves as the EMEA hub; a March 2026 commitment of over $850m to UK expansion includes quadrupling the London office footprint and doubling UK and Ireland headcount from 500 to over 1,000. Databricks holds ADS Group membership and G-Cloud 14 listings, and the platform has achieved US DoD Impact Level 5 authorisation on AWS GovCloud, indicating security credentials relevant to defence-grade workloads.

## Products and solutions

- **Data Intelligence Platform** - unified data lakehouse for data engineering, SQL analytics, machine learning, and AI at scale; runs on AWS, Azure, and GCP.
- **Databricks SQL** - SQL analytics and business intelligence on the lakehouse.
- **MLflow and AutoML** - open-source machine learning lifecycle management and automated model training.
- **Unity Catalog** - data governance, lineage, and access control across the platform.
- **Data Intelligence for Cyber Defense** - threat detection, SIEM augmentation, and security analytics capability; announced June 2025.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** G-Cloud 14 (Crown Commercial Service) -- two service listings (Data Intelligence Platform; cloud support).
- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials Plus (Azure Databricks); ISO/IEC 27001:2022; ISO 27017; ISO 27018; ISO 27701; SOC 2 Type II; US DoD IL5 provisional authorisation (AWS GovCloud, November 2024); FedRAMP High Agency ATO (AWS GovCloud, February 2025).
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2026-03** - Databricks announced an $850m investment in UK expansion over three years, including a new 137,000 sq ft EMEA headquarters in Fitzrovia, doubling UK/Ireland headcount to over 1,000, and a commitment to train 100,000 people in data and AI skills by 2028. [Databricks](https://www.databricks.com/company/newsroom/press-releases/databricks-announces-850m-uk-investment-accelerate-enterprise-data)
- **2025-10** - Databricks joined the UK Department for Science, Innovation and Technology "Get Tech Certified this Autumn" programme, delivering free AI and machine learning training to public sector employees. [Databricks](https://www.databricks.com/company/newsroom/press-releases/databricks-advances-data-and-ai-innovation-uk-public-sector)
- **2025-02** - Databricks achieved FedRAMP High Agency ATO for AWS GovCloud, following the DoD IL5 authorisation of November 2024. [Databricks](https://www.databricks.com/blog/announcing-general-availability-aws-govcloud-fedramp-high-agency-ato-and-department-defense)
- **2024-11** - Databricks achieved US Department of Defense Cloud Computing Security Requirements Guide Impact Level 5 provisional authorisation on AWS GovCloud. [Databricks](https://www.databricks.com/company/newsroom/press-releases/databricks-achieves-authorization-dod-il5-aws-govcloud)

## Links

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/databricks

# Datactics

Datactics develops low-code, self-service data quality and matching software designed for non-technical users across financial services and government. Datalink Electronics is a UK contract electronics design and manufacturing company established in 1983. The company specialises in low to medium volume, high mix product profiles, with services spanning PCB assembly layout, fast-turnaround new product introduction, cable and box builds, production testing, and final product assembly. companies.name: Dataminr UK Ltd
companies.summary: UK entity of the New York-headquartered AI platform for real-time event detection, threat intelligence, and risk management, with confirmed UK MOD contracts and government clients globally.
companies.body:
# Dataminr UK

> UK entity of the New York-headquartered AI platform for real-time event detection, threat intelligence, and risk management, with confirmed UK MOD contracts and government clients globally.

## What they do

Dataminr develops AI-powered real-time event and risk intelligence software. Its platform synthesises text, image, video, audio, and sensor signals across more than one million public data sources to deliver early-warning alerts on breaking events, emerging threats, and physical and cyber risks. The UK entity (company number 09232100, incorporated 2014) is the commercial and operational presence serving UK government and commercial clients.

## Products and solutions

- **Dataminr for Public Sector** - real-time intelligence and alerting for government agencies, supporting situational awareness and crisis response.
- **Dataminr for Cyber Defense** - AI-powered cyber threat intelligence fusing external threat signals with internal telemetry, including client-tailored threat intelligence (CTTI) and autonomous threat and exposure management.
- **Physical Security Intelligence** - early detection of physical threats, critical events, and emerging risks to people, assets, and operations.

# Datum Tool Design

> Northern Ireland aerospace tooling specialist designing and manufacturing composite tooling and assembly fixtures for major airframe programmes, including BAE Systems and Airbus.

## What they do

Datum Tool Design is an independent design and manufacturing company based in Lisburn, providing technical design consultancy services and precision tooling to major airframe manufacturers and their supply chains. The company specialises in tooling for composite parts ranging from simple fairings to primary structures such as integrally stiffened wings and fuselage sections. Its work spans assembly fixtures, trimming and drill tooling for both manual and automated operations, and build-to-print manufacturing.

## Products and solutions

- **Composite tooling** - design and manufacture of tooling for composite aerospace structures, from fairings to primary wing and fuselage components.
- **Assembly and ICY fixtures** - precision fixtures for airframe assembly operations.
- **Trimming and drill tooling** - tooling for manual and automated trimming and drilling in high-tolerance aerospace environments.

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

companies.body:
# David Brown Santasalo UK

> Specialist in mechanical power transmission systems for land and naval defence platforms.

## What they do

David Brown Santasalo designs, manufactures, tests, and provides through-life support for gear systems and drivetrain solutions serving land and naval defence customers. Operating from Huddersfield, the company supplies transmissions for armoured fighting vehicles and propulsion gearboxes for surface ships and submarines, with over 10,000 gear systems delivered globally across defence programmes. The David Brown brand in defence dates to 1860; the Santasalo merger completed in 2016. The company is owned by Stellex Capital Management (US private equity, defence-focused) following acquisition in March 2023.

## Products and solutions

- **TN54E Automatic Transmission** - fully automatic transmission fitted to the Challenger 2 main battle tank and CRAARV recovery vehicle.
- **BOXER MIV Powerpack** - powerpack assembly (engine, transmission, cooling) for the UK Army's BOXER Mechanised Infantry Vehicle, supplied under a 10-year programme with WFEL and KMW.
- **Naval propulsion gearboxes** - propulsion gearboxes for frigates, destroyers, aircraft carriers, and submarines.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001, ISO 14001:2015, ISO 45001:2018
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

- **2023-03** - Acquired by Stellex Capital Management LLC from N4 Partners. [source](https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20230308005201/en/Stellex-Capital-Management-LLC-Completes-Acquisition-of-David-Brown-Santasalo)

# Day 1 People

> Defence and national security programme and bid management consultancy based in Wiltshire.

## What they do

Day 1 People is a small consultancy providing programme management, bid and capture management, and PMO support to clients across defence, national security, and aerospace. The company operates from Chippenham, Wiltshire, in the Defence Digital and MOD Corsham cluster. Its client base spans government departments and prime defence industry contractors. The founding team includes personnel with service backgrounds and defence procurement experience. The company was incorporated in 2017 as EH3 Group Limited and renamed Day 1 People Limited in August 2021.

companies.body:
# DBD

> Engineering and advisory consultancy specialising in nuclear defence and civil nuclear programmes.

## What they do

DBD (trading as DBD International) is an independent engineering and advisory consultancy focused on complex, highly regulated environments, with a particular emphasis on nuclear defence and civil nuclear. Services span front-end design, process and systems engineering, commissioning and decommissioning, waste management, safety assurance, and programme and project management. The company is headquartered at Birchwood Park, Warrington, with a further UK office at Westlakes Science Park in West Cumbria and US operations in South Carolina, Washington state, and Idaho. DBD was incorporated in 1995 as Different by Design Limited and renamed in 2009.

## Products and solutions

- **Nuclear defence engineering** - design, safety, and programme support on UK nuclear deterrent infrastructure, including work embedded in the AWE Manufacturing Programme Partnership alongside Mace and BakerHicks.
- **Decommissioning and waste management** - technical consultancy for nuclear site decommissioning and radioactive waste treatment.
- **Safety and assurance** - regulatory assurance, hazard analysis, and nuclear safety case development.
- **Programme management consultancy** - project controls, PMO, and programme delivery support for major nuclear programmes.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

companies.name: DEA Aviation Limited
companies.summary: Specialist airborne operations provider offering ISR, aerial survey, flight calibration, and maritime surveillance services.
companies.body:
# DEA Aviation

> Specialist airborne operations provider offering ISR, aerial survey, flight calibration, and maritime surveillance services.

## What they do

DEA Aviation operates a fleet of fixed-wing aircraft from its base at Retford (Gamston) Airport, Nottinghamshire, delivering persistent airborne ISR for European border and security agencies, aerial survey and data acquisition, flight path validation and navigation aid calibration, and maritime surveillance. Over 30% of its workforce are former Armed Forces personnel. The company holds a CAA Air Operator's Certificate, EASA, and FAA approvals, and a Part 145 Maintenance Organisation Approval. In June 2025 it opened an R&D facility in Lincoln within the Greater Lincolnshire Defence and Security Cluster. DEA has secured two tranches of UK Export Finance-backed financing from Santander UK, specifically tied to ISR capability and export growth (2023 and 2025). The company was incorporated in 2006 as Diamond Executive Aviation Limited and renamed in December 2017.

## Products and solutions

- **Airborne ISR** - persistent 24/7/365 surveillance missions for European border agencies; intelligence, surveillance, and reconnaissance using multi-sensor airborne platforms.
- **Aerial survey and data acquisition** - multi-sensor imaging including a long-running contract with Ordnance Survey to capture national geographic imagery, extended through 2026.
- **Flight calibration** - ground navigation aid calibration covering ILS, VOR, NDB, and related systems.
- **Maritime and border surveillance** - dedicated sensor fits and operational procedures for maritime patrol and border monitoring tasks.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** CAA Air Operator's Certificate; EASA approval; FAA approval; Part 145 Maintenance Organisation Approval; Armed Forces Covenant signatory
- **Memberships:** ADS Group, Greater Lincolnshire Defence and Security Cluster

## Recent news

- **2025-06** - Opened new R&D office in Lincoln within the Greater Lincolnshire Defence and Security Cluster. [source](https://www.adsgroup.org.uk/knowledge/industry-member-news/dea-aviation-opens-lincoln-office/)
- **2025-01** - Secured second tranche of UKEF-backed export finance from Santander UK, supporting continued ISR and export growth; workforce had grown to over 220. [source](https://www.gov.uk/government/news/dea-aviation-secures-new-multi-million-pound-export-finance-package)
- **2024** - Ordnance Survey extended aerial imaging contract with DEA through 2026 following a successful season covering over 80,000 sq km. [source](https://www.adsadvance.co.uk/os-extends-dea-aviation-contract.html)

## Links

- Website: https://dea.aero
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/diamond-executive-aviation-ltd

## Sources

Company website (dea.aero), ADS members directory (adsgroup.org.uk/members/dea-aviation-limited-2/), Companies House (no. 05728943), GOV.UK UKEF announcement, GOV.UK Armed Forces Covenant register, ADS Advance (OS contract extension), ADS industry news (Lincoln office).

# Decision Lab

> AI-powered decision support, digital twins, and drone control systems for defence, national security, and industrial clients.

## What they do

Decision Lab is a technology company specialising in mathematical modelling, optimisation, simulation, data science, and artificial intelligence. For defence and national security clients, the company develops mission-ready decision support systems, secure AI digital twins powered by Agentic AI and Reinforcement Learning, and drone control systems. Clients include Babcock International, Leonardo, Thales, Rolls-Royce, the Defence Science and Technology Laboratory (Dstl), the Royal Navy, and Cranfield University.

## Products and solutions

- **Secure AI Digital Twins** - simulation and digital twin environments powered by Agentic AI and Reinforcement Learning, providing quantitative assurance for mission-critical decisions.
- **Drone Control Systems** - autonomous drone control development using AI and reinforcement learning.
- **Mission-Ready Decision Support Systems** - decision intelligence platforms supporting defence manufacturing, supply chain, and sustainment planning.
- **Munitions and Platform Ramp-Up Analytics** - modelling to de-risk critical production scaling for munitions and defence platforms.

# Defence Dynamics

> Manufacturer of anti-vibration and shock isolation mounting solutions for military, marine, aerospace and commercial applications.

## What they do

Defence Dynamics manufactures anti-vibration and shock isolation mounting products for military, naval, aerospace and commercial customers. The company's Admiralty range of naval mountings is the preferred and recommended choice of the UK MoD and is used by navies worldwide. Mounts are manufactured in the UK to defence industry specifications and comply with relevant international standards. The company uses proprietary calculation software to verify mounting selection and predict the response of mounted systems to shock and vibration, providing design guidance alongside its products.

## Products and solutions

- **Admiralty range naval mountings** - shock and anti-vibration mounts for naval vessels; recommended by the UK MoD and in service with multiple navies.

# Defence Holdings PLC

> London-listed, software-led defence-technology holding company building and acquiring sovereign defence capability.

## What they do

Defence Holdings PLC is a London-listed, software-led defence-technology holding company building and acquiring sovereign defence and national-security capability for the UK and European markets. It positions itself as a listed, software-led defence platform developing and acquiring AI-enabled sensing, secure communications, autonomous drone systems and cyber-defence across land, sea, air, space and cyber domains. It operates as a platform and holding model and runs a defence technology accelerator, rather than as a single point-solution vendor. The entity was formerly the cash shell Cassell Capital Plc and rebranded to Defence Holdings PLC in May 2025.

## Products and solutions

- **Stated capability pillars** - drone warfare and aggregation, AI agents for defence operations, information and influence warfare, critical infrastructure defence, and a national security pillar.
- **Defence Tech Accelerator** - programme for early-stage defence and national-security startups.

companies.name: DefendTex Limited
companies.summary: Australian-owned manufacturer of multi-domain asymmetric warfare solutions, including autonomous drone munitions, armour systems and precision guided weapons.
companies.body:
# DefendTex

> Australian-owned manufacturer of multi-domain asymmetric warfare solutions, including autonomous drone munitions, armour systems and precision guided weapons.

## What they do

DefendTex is an Australian-owned company with offices in Australia, the United States and the United Kingdom. Incorporated in the UK in 2017, its UK registered office is in London. The UK operating base is in Salcombe Regis, Devon. The company develops cost-effective capabilities designed to increase the strike range, survivability and lethality of existing platforms. Its products are in service with British Army and other Five Eyes partner forces.

## Products and solutions

- **Drone40 (D40)** - 40mm grenade-launched autonomous mini quadcopter; weighs 190g; range of over 12 miles; flight time up to one hour; available with ISR, strike and kinetic payloads; capable of swarm operations and multiple munitions simultaneous impact.
- **Drone60 / Drone81 / Drone155** - extended range and payload variants of the Drone40 family covering 60mm, 81mm and 155mm calibres.
- **Armour systems** - personal protection and vehicle armour solutions.
- **Precision guided weapons** - energetics and propulsion-based precision munitions.
- **Responsive access to space** - small satellite and space access capabilities.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

companies.body:
# Delian Alliance Industries UK

> AI-first defence technology company building autonomous surveillance and counter-UAS systems for NATO and allied governments.

## What they do

Delian Alliance Industries develops autonomous systems for defence mission-critical applications, including surveillance towers, loitering munitions, electronic warfare and GPS-denied navigation. The company was originally founded in Athens, Greece in 2021 as Lambda Automata, with a UK entity (Delian Alliance Industries UK Ltd) incorporated in August 2024 and registered in St. Albans, Hertfordshire. It serves clients in the United Kingdom and Greece, with plans to expand across Europe.

## Products and solutions

- **LAST (Autonomous Surveillance Tower)** - Portable and static surveillance tower in civilian, marine and multi-domain configurations, fusing and geolocating data from multiple sensors.
- **Jericho** - Portable intelligence, communications and autonomy suite, interoperable with commercial drones and legacy sensor platforms.
- **OSIRIS** - GPS-denied navigation module for operations in contested environments.
- **M4K15** - Electronic warfare system for counter-UAS protection.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

## Recent news

companies.name: Delkia Ltd
companies.summary: Specialist engineering and technology company delivering assured C4ISR, mission systems and platform integration for defence and nuclear sectors.
companies.body:
# Delkia

> Specialist engineering and technology company delivering assured C4ISR, mission systems and platform integration for defence and nuclear sectors.

## What they do

Delkia provides specialist control, engineering and instrumentation for safety-related and mission-critical systems across defence and nuclear. The company delivers C4ISR, tactical data links, combat systems, platform and propulsion engineering, and secure communications. In November 2024 Delkia acquired SyntheSys Defence Systems, a provider of Tactical Data Link and secure communications solutions with over 30 years of experience, which now operates as a subsidiary. Delkia is headquartered at the Delkia Nexus Centre in Haydock, St. Helens, where it operates an 18,000 sq ft production and testing facility.

## Products and solutions

- **Tactical Data Link (TDL) systems** - Interoperability and secure real-time data transmission solutions, delivered through SyntheSys Defence Systems.
- **Mission systems integration** - Platform and propulsion engineering for aerospace and maritime defence applications.
- **Defence digital systems** - Cybersecurity for mission-critical systems, data and mission management solutions.
- **Production build and power/propulsion systems** - Assembly, testing and storage of power and propulsion systems across aerospace, maritime and nuclear sectors.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships
