companies.body:
# Dellner Glass Solutions

> UK manufacturer of ballistic and blast-resistant glazing for military vehicles, armoured platforms and critical infrastructure.

## What they do

Dellner Glass Solutions is a specialist glass processor and manufacturer supplying protective glazing to the global transport, security and defence markets. Formed in 2021 through the consolidation of Dellner Romag (Consett, County Durham), Dellner Percy Lane (Tamworth, Staffordshire) and Dellner Wizard (Luton), the business brings over 150 years of combined manufacturing experience. It is a wholly owned subsidiary of Dellner Group, a Swedish privately held industrial group headquartered in Borlänge, Sweden. The company has supplied military glazing for over seven decades and operates its own indoor ballistic range and air cannon for live-fire testing.

## Products and solutions

- **Military vehicle glazing** - Windscreens and vision panels for armoured and military vehicles, tested to STANAG 4569 (ballistic) and DIN 52290 Part 5 (blast); certified from STANAG Level 1 to Level 3.
- **Transparent armour composites** - Ballistic glass for high-risk military installations, government buildings, embassies and VIP protection.
- **Infrastructure security glazing** - Protected windows and partitions for strategic military sites, guard houses and transport security.
- **Cash-in-transit and armoured vehicle glazing** - Specialist glass for security vehicles requiring ballistic protection.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group; Rail Forum UK

companies.name: Delta Mobrey Ltd
companies.summary: UK manufacturer of precision process instrumentation for defence, nuclear, oil and gas, and safety-critical industrial applications.
companies.body:
# Delta Mobrey

> UK manufacturer of precision process instrumentation for defence, nuclear, oil and gas, and safety-critical industrial applications.

## What they do

Delta Mobrey designs and manufactures process instrumentation for the measurement and control of fluids and gases, with a heritage in the field spanning over 100 years. The company was formed when Delta Controls Ltd acquired the Mobrey range of instruments from Emerson in 2019; all products are manufactured in the UK at its Camberley, Surrey site. Delta Mobrey has supported UK defence programmes since 1947, supplying instrumentation to land facilities and mobile weapons platforms including naval vessels and military vehicles. The company is JOSCAR accredited.

## Products and solutions

- **Pressure and differential pressure transmitters** - High-accuracy instruments for safety-critical and mission-critical environments including weapons systems and fuel management.
- **Level measurement systems** - Fuel tank measurement and fluid level monitoring for military vehicles, naval vessels and fixed installations.
- **Flow and temperature measurement** - Industrial instrumentation designed for harsh environments with high vibration and electromagnetic interference tolerance.
- **Switches and gauges** - Process monitoring and control devices with proven in-service longevity for defence applications.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** JOSCAR
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

companies.summary: UK manufacturer of waterproof, military-grade FPV drones and counter-drone payloads.
companies.body:
# Delta Tango

> UK manufacturer of waterproof, military-grade FPV drones and counter-drone payloads.

## What they do

Delta Tango designs and manufactures FPV UAS and associated payloads for defence, public safety, and export markets. Products are IP67-rated waterproof with extended operational ranges, positioned for attack and reconnaissance scenarios. The company exhibits at DroneX in London and markets an Africa export product line alongside its core range.

## Products and solutions

- **10-inch FPV Drone** - Waterproof (IP67), 25 km stated flight range, 5.8 GHz video at 30 W; positioned for attack and defence scenarios.
- **Three-axis Thermal Camera Drone** - Combined thermal infrared and full-HD low-light camera with dimmable LED illuminator.
- **50 W Onboard Jamming System** - Counter-drone payload stated effective to approximately 6 metres; controlled under the Wireless Telegraphy Act 2006 in the UK.
- **Drone-mounted Megaphone** - Stated audio range up to 5 km; marketed at public safety and emergency response.
- **Object Detection Software** - Real-time target tracking and analysis.

## Links

companies.name: Delta XD Limited
companies.summary: Precision metrology and engineering consultancy providing aerospace-grade 3D scanning, inspection and Digital Image Correlation services to defence, aerospace and related sectors.
companies.body:
# Delta XD Limited

> Precision metrology and engineering consultancy providing aerospace-grade 3D scanning, inspection and Digital Image Correlation services to defence, aerospace and related sectors.

## What they do

Delta XD provides precision metrology and engineering measurement services across aerospace, defence, security, energy and transport. The company specialises in 3D optical scanning, dimensional inspection, reverse engineering, fixture design, and full-field structural testing using Digital Image Correlation (DIC). It operates as ZEISS Certified Metrology Partner for the UK and Ireland, responsible for the sale, training and aftercare of ARAMIS, TRITOP, PONTOS and ARGUS systems across industry, research and academia.

## Products and solutions

- **3D Scanning and Inspection** - high-resolution non-contact dimensional measurement and production verification using optical scanning systems.
- **Digital Image Correlation (DIC)** - full-field, non-contact strain and deformation analysis for structural testing and validation.
- **Reverse Engineering** - mesh-to-CAD reconstruction and digital twin creation from physical components.
- **Fixture Design and Manufacture** - custom fixtures enabling repeatable, production-ready inspection workflows.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** AS9100 (aerospace quality management)
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

companies.body:
# Denchi Group Limited

> UK-based designer and manufacturer of mission-critical lithium-ion batteries and charging systems for defence, aerospace and adjacent sectors.

## What they do

Denchi Group is a UK-owned battery specialist based in Thurso, Caithness, Scotland. The company designs and manufactures batteries and charging systems for defence and security applications, with origins tracing to the late 1950s and strong links to the UK Ministry of Defence and defence prime contractors. Denchi supplies products for military radios, vision systems, manned military vehicles, unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs), unmanned underwater vehicles (UUVs) and unmanned ground vehicles (UGVs). All design and manufacture is carried out within the UK.

## Products and solutions

- **6T Lithium-Ion Battery** - NATO 6T format drop-in replacement for lead-acid batteries in 24V military ground vehicles, covering main battle tanks, armoured personnel carriers and light armoured vehicles; rated for over 4,000 recharge cycles.
- **BB-2590 Smart Battery** - rugged lithium-ion smart battery for military radios and mission-critical portable equipment.
- **UAV/UAS Battery Packs** - specialist cells and packs for commercial and military unmanned aerial systems.
- **UUV and Subsea Battery Systems** - high-reliability battery solutions for underwater unmanned systems.
- **Battery Chargers** - intelligent charging systems designed alongside battery products for defence and security use.

companies.body:
# Denodo Technologies Limited

> Data virtualisation platform vendor with a UK entity serving public sector and defence-adjacent customers through the G-Cloud framework and partnership with UK government-cleared cloud providers.

## What they do

Denodo Technologies develops and licenses a data virtualisation and integration platform that provides a logical abstraction layer across disparate data sources, enabling fast data access without physical replication. The company was founded in 1999 in A Coruña, Spain, and is headquartered in Palo Alto, California, with offices in London and approximately 764 employees globally. Its UK entity, Denodo Technologies Limited, is registered at 5 New Street Square, London. Denodo's platform is used across UK central government departments, and the company has partnered with UKCloudX to deliver data virtualisation capability to defence and government customers operating in secure cloud environments.

## Products and solutions

- **Denodo Platform** - data virtualisation and integration platform enabling unified data access across relational databases, cloud stores, APIs and legacy systems without data movement.
- **Denodo Enterprise Plus** - enterprise-tier licensing available through the UK G-Cloud Digital Marketplace.
- **Data Fabric** - logical data delivery layer with embedded data governance, quality and policy management.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

companies.body:
# Denroy Plastics Limited

> Northern Ireland injection moulding manufacturer supplying precision plastic components for civil and military aerospace and defence programmes.

## What they do

Denroy Plastics Limited is a privately owned injection moulding manufacturer based in Bangor, County Down, founded in 1972 by the Rainey family. The company operates from two factories covering 7,500 square metres and supplies precision moulded components to civil and military aerospace, defence, automotive and other sectors. Customers include Airbus, BAE Systems, Boeing, Bombardier and Thales. Denroy took over all injection moulding from British Aerospace during a restructuring in 1995 and has since supplied major programmes including Airbus A320, Hawk, Tornado and the Airbus A220 (formerly Bombardier C-Series). The company specialises in lightweighting materials including PEEK and PPS.

## Products and solutions

- **Injection Moulded Structural Components** - precision thermoplastic parts for airframe, wing, centre wing-box and fuel-tank applications, replacing machined aluminium and titanium brackets to reduce weight.
- **Thermoplastic Composites** - advanced moulded components for aerospace and defence using high-performance polymers.
- **Custom Mouldings** - design, tooling and manufacture of moulded components across aerospace, defence and adjacent sectors.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** AS/EN 9100, ISO 9001, SC21 Gold (ADS 21st Century Supply Chains, held for five consecutive years), EFQM 6 Star for organisational performance
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

companies.name: Destinus UK Limited
companies.summary: European aerospace and defence company developing hypersonic and supersonic drones, cruise missiles and AI-enabled autonomous systems; UK entity registered in London.
companies.body:
# Destinus UK Limited

> European aerospace and defence company developing hypersonic and supersonic drones, cruise missiles and AI-enabled autonomous systems; UK entity registered in London.

## What they do

Destinus is a European aerospace and defence manufacturer focused on unmanned strike, interceptor and reconnaissance systems across the subsonic to hypersonic speed range. The company was founded in 2021 in Payerne, Switzerland and relocated its headquarters to Amsterdam, Netherlands in late 2024. Destinus UK Limited, incorporated in March 2024 and registered at 21 Holborn Viaduct, London, is the UK entity. The group has raised nearly 400 million euros in equity and debt financing and completed the acquisition of AI avionics specialist Daedalean in January 2026 for approximately 225 million US dollars. Destinus and Rheinmetall announced a joint venture, Rheinmetall Destinus Strike Systems, in April 2026, with Rheinmetall holding 51 per cent and Destinus 49 per cent; the JV intends to manufacture and deliver its first RUTA Block 3 cruise missiles before the end of 2026.

## Products and solutions

- **Ruta (B1/B2/B3)** - cruise missile family; Block 2 has a range up to 450 kilometres and a 250-kilogram payload; Block 3 extends range to 2,000 kilometres powered by the T220 turbojet engine.
- **Hornet Block 2** - dual-role electric interceptor for subsonic threats, with a range of 75 to 150 kilometres; tested by the French Army.
- **Lord** - long-range reconnaissance and strike UAS with a range exceeding 1,000 kilometres.
- **T150 Turbojet Engine** - in-house turbojet powering the Ruta B1 and B2 family; Destinus completed its 1,000th unit in June 2026, reaching industrial-scale production.
- **Daedalean AI Avionics** - AI-enabled flight systems for autonomous and safety-critical aviation applications, acquired January 2026.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2026-06-18** - Destinus announced completion of its 1,000th T150 turbojet engine, marking industrial-scale cruise missile propulsion production in Europe. [source](https://www.prnewswire.co.uk/news-releases/engine-no-1000-destinus-reaches-industrial-scale-turbojet-production-in-europe-302803526.html)
- **2026-04-13** - Rheinmetall and Destinus formally announced the Rheinmetall Destinus Strike Systems joint venture for missile system manufacture. [source](https://www.rheinmetall.com/en/media/news-watch/news/2026/04/2026-04-13-rheinmetall-and-destinus-form-joint-venture-for-missile-systems)
- **2026-01-05** - Destinus completed the acquisition of Daedalean, Zurich-based AI avionics specialist, for approximately 225 million US dollars. [source](https://www.prnewswire.co.uk/news-releases/destinus-completes-acquisition-of-daedalean-accelerating-next-generation-ai-for-defense-and-civil-aviation-302652183.html)

companies.name: Detego Global (Mobile Content Management Solutions Limited)
companies.summary: UK developer of digital forensics, case management and endpoint monitoring software for military, law enforcement and intelligence agencies.
companies.body:
# Detego Global

> UK developer of digital forensics, case management and endpoint monitoring software for military, law enforcement and intelligence agencies.

## What they do

Detego Global is the trading name of Mobile Content Management Solutions Limited, a British company founded in 2003 and headquartered in Horsham, West Sussex. The company develops digital forensics, case management and endpoint monitoring software for military units, law enforcement teams, intelligence agencies and enterprise organisations. Its solutions are used in more than 70 countries and are the de facto standard within the Five Eyes community for digital data acquisition and triage. The company holds patented technology and is an active community member of the Accelerated Capability Environment (ACE) network.

## Products and solutions

- **Detego Unified Digital Forensics Platform** - end-to-end suite of modular tools for field-based data acquisition and triage as well as lab-based automated analysis, covering computer forensics, mobile forensics, remote acquisition and AI-assisted analysis.
- **Military Deployment Pack** - ruggedised field kit designed for document and media exploitation (DOMEX), sensitive site exploitation (SSE) and tactical media exploitation (TME) operations.
- **Detego Case Manager for DFIR** - purpose-built case management platform for digital forensics and incident response workflows, launched as a standalone product in November 2025.
- **Detego Endpoint Monitor** - endpoint monitoring solution for enterprise and government environments.
- **Ballistic Imager** - high-speed forensic imaging tool for field and lab use, launched December 2025.
- **Mission Darkness Faraday Products** - RF shielding bags and solutions for device isolation during evidence handling.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001, ISO 27001:2022 (achieved March 2026), Cyber Essentials, Cyber Essentials Plus; Accelerated Capability Environment (ACE) network member
- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR registered
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2026-04-29** - Sole digital forensics finalist at UK Security and Policing Awards 2026. [source](https://detegoglobal.com/2026/04/29/detego-global-stands-out-as-sole-digital-forensics-finalist-at-uk-security-policing-awards/)
- **2026-03-05** - Launched Artefact_Compare tool for rapid device integrity verification. [source](https://detegoglobal.com/2026/03/05/detego-global-launches-artefact_compare-for-rapid-device-integrity-verification/)

companies.name: Deva Technologies Limited
companies.summary: North Wales engineering design company specialising in safety-critical electronics, motor control and electromechanical actuation for aerospace and defence applications.
companies.body:
# Deva Technologies

> North Wales engineering design company specialising in safety-critical electronics, motor control and electromechanical actuation for aerospace and defence applications.

## What they do

Deva Technologies Limited is an independent engineering design and manufacturing company established in 1993 and based in Wrexham, North Wales. The company designs, develops and manufactures bespoke electromechanical actuators, motor control electronics, electronic sub-assemblies and contactless position sensors for flight control surfaces and secondary actuation systems. It serves first and second tier customers across UK, European and international aerospace and defence markets (civil and military, land, sea and air). The team provides DO-254 electronics and DO-178 safety-critical software design and verification, as well as pre-qualification EMI/EMC screening services.

## Products and solutions

- **Electromechanical actuators** - bespoke actuators for flight control surfaces and secondary actuation systems, including UAV and drone flight surface actuation systems, qualified for harsh environments.
- **Motor control and drive systems** - precision embedded servo motor drives and power electronics for aerospace and defence platforms.
- **DO-254/DO-178 design and verification services** - safety-critical electronics hardware and software design, documentation and pre-qualification EMI/EMC screening for development and production programmes.
- **Bespoke electronic test equipment** - custom test and interface boxes built to customer requirements; legacy electronics assembly upgrade reviews.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001
- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR registered
- **Memberships:** ADS Group; Aerospace Wales Forum

## Links

- Website: https://www.devatec.co.uk

companies.body:
# Dewar Brothers

> Scotland's only commercially MPAS-accredited specialist packaging manufacturer, designing and producing bespoke packaging to MOD standards for defence and aerospace customers.

## What they do

Dewar Brothers Limited is a specialist packaging manufacturer established in 1973 and based in Tillicoultry, Clackmannanshire. The company designs and manufactures corrugated, foam, timber and flight-case packaging for defence, aerospace, medical, industrial, electronic and oil and gas customers. It is the only commercial company in Scotland accredited to the Military Packer Approval Scheme (MPAS), which gives it the facility to design, approve and manufacture packaging to MOD standards. Dewar Brothers is Scotland's sole appointed supplier of SKB cases and the European distributor of Spacecase modular containers, and provides a Kanban/JIT delivery service to key customers.

## Products and solutions

- **MOD-standard defence packaging** - bespoke packaging designed, approved and manufactured to Ministry of Defence standards under MPAS accreditation; covers corrugated, foam, timber and composite formats.
- **Flight cases** - custom-built flight cases with bespoke cut-foam interiors for sensitive defence and aerospace equipment.
- **SKB cases** - Scotland's sole appointed SKB distributor; watertight, dust-proof military-grade protective cases.
- **Spacecase modular containers** - European distributor of rotationally moulded Spacecase modular container systems.
- **Foam engineering** - bespoke foam engineering using CNC router technology for protective equipment interiors.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001:2015; Military Packer Approval Scheme (MPAS); Wood Packing Material Programme (WPMP, ISPM15 56/30); SC21 registered
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Links

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Sources: dewarbrothers.com/defence, dewarbrothers.com/accreditations, dewarbrothers.com/about-us; ADS Group member profile (adsgroup.org.uk/members/dewar-brothers-limited); Companies House record SC135296.

companies.name: DHELTA Limited
companies.summary: Defence software startup developing a unified software supply chain to accelerate prototype warfare for high-performance edge systems.
companies.body:
# DHELTA Limited

> Defence software startup developing a unified software supply chain to accelerate prototype warfare for high-performance edge systems.

## What they do

DHELTA describes itself as a prototype warfare accelerant, focused on reducing three bottlenecks in high-performance defence systems: complexity, latency, and integration cost. Engineers write high-level logic in Fluxtion, which DHELTA's Optimiser compiles into machine code deployed on the company's ruggedised Mongoose hardware platform. The company also fuses high-volume data streams into a single decision framework to support real-time situational awareness and faster targeting in high-threat environments.

DHELTA was incorporated in July 2025 and is registered in Cheltenham. Its Companies House SIC codes include both business software development and defence activities.

## Products and solutions

- **Fluxtion** - a high-level logic language for writing safe, optimised defence software.
- **Optimiser** - compiles Fluxtion logic into hyper-efficient machine code for low-power edge devices.
- **Mongoose** - standardised, ruggedised hardware platform for edge deployment in defence environments.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Links

- Website: https://dhelta.net

companies.body:
# DHL Global Forwarding (UK) Limited

> UK entity of Deutsche Post DHL Group providing air, ocean, road and rail freight forwarding with a dedicated public sector and defence logistics capability.

## What they do

DHL Global Forwarding (UK) Limited is the freight forwarding arm of Deutsche Post DHL Group in the United Kingdom, registered at Staines-upon-Thames. The company is an ADS Group member and holds SC21 Bronze and SC21 OE accreditations, reflecting supply chain performance standards relevant to the aerospace and defence sector. DHL Global Forwarding operates dedicated aerospace and aviation logistics services including time-critical AOG solutions, engine transport and hazardous materials handling for defence industry suppliers and government clients. Its public sector practice provides tailored logistics for international governments and defence manufacturers, with stated close collaboration with Western-led Ministries of Defence.

The UK entity previously traded as DHL Logistics (UK) Limited and, before that, as Danzas Limited. The parent group Deutsche Post DHL is headquartered in Bonn, Germany; this is a foreign-headquartered entity with a UK-registered subsidiary.

## Products and solutions

- **Aero AOG** - 24-hour emergency freight for Aircraft on Ground situations, available around the clock.
- **Aero Critical** - next-available-flight service for time-sensitive aerospace and defence parts.
- **Aero Engines** - dedicated transport for high-value, shock-sensitive aircraft engines by air.
- **Public Sector and Defence Logistics** - tailored freight forwarding for governments and defence industry suppliers, covering hazardous materials, out-of-gauge transport, charter services and customs clearance.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** SC21 Bronze, SC21 OE
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

companies.summary: Manufacturer of lifting, hoisting and mechanical handling equipment for defence, civil aerospace and industrial markets, supplying ground support equipment to defence organisations globally.
companies.body:
# Didsbury Engineering Co.

> Manufacturer of lifting, hoisting and mechanical handling equipment for defence, civil aerospace and industrial markets, supplying ground support equipment to defence organisations globally.

## What they do

Didsbury Engineering has designed and manufactured ground support equipment for over 80 years, serving the defence, civil aviation and industrial safety sectors worldwide. The company specialises in lifting and handling devices for aircraft engines, landing gear, APUs, actuators and other high-value components. It supplies equipment directly to defence organisations and is specified by major airframe manufacturers including Airbus, Boeing, Embraer, Fokker, Dassault and Sukhoi. Didsbury Engineering was acquired by Swedish group Lifco AB in March 2023 and sits within Lifco's Systems Solutions business area.

## Products and solutions

- **Defence Hoist Kits** - modular, portable hoist kits for engine changes and component removal in field and maintenance environments.
- **Purge Air Military** - purge air systems for safe working within aircraft fuel tanks, adapted for military applications.
- **Bespoke military transport packaging** - custom packaging for missiles, armour and other sensitive military loads.
- **Ground Support Equipment (GSE)** - off-the-shelf and bespoke kits for aircraft engine removal, vehicle ancillary handling and sensitive equipment movement.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2023-03-03** - Lifco AB acquires Didsbury Engineering; company consolidated into Lifco's Systems Solutions division. [Lifco press release](https://lifco.se/investors/press-releases/lifco-acquires-didsbury-engineering-in-the-uk/)

# Didsbury Engineering Co. Limited

> Manufacturer of specialist ground support equipment for the defence and civil aerospace sectors, with over 80 years of design and production experience.

## What they do

Didsbury Engineering designs and manufactures lifting and mechanical handling equipment for the defence, civil aerospace and industrial safety markets, operating from Wilmslow, Cheshire. The company works directly with military procurement offices and aircraft manufacturers, supplying ground support equipment for the safe handling of aircraft engines, weapons, personnel and other high-value loads. Products are used worldwide and the company has a service presence in Dallas, Texas, alongside global service centres. Didsbury holds Cyber Essentials certification and is a subsidiary of Lifco AB (a Swedish listed group), as evidenced by the Lifco tax statement on its website.

- **Purge Air Military** - a dedicated purge air system for efficient and safe working within aircraft fuel tanks, developed with Airbus and adapted for military applications.

# Diegesis Limited

> UK technology consultancy delivering IT integration, legacy system modernisation, GIS, AI and cyber security services to government and defence organisations.

## What they do

Diegesis is a London-based business and technology consultancy founded in 2007, focused on helping organisations manage, modernise and migrate legacy IT systems and databases. The company combines experience in legacy database technologies (Ingres, Informix, Db2) with capability in cloud platforms, AI, GIS and cyber security. Government and defence are stated core markets: the company's website describes it as "trusted for decades to deliver and support systems for government and defence organisations." Partners include IBM, Red Hat, Hexagon and SCC. The company holds Cyber Essentials and IASME accreditations.

## Products and solutions

- **Manage, Modernise, Migrate** - structured approach to extending the life of legacy systems, planning modernisation, and executing migration to cloud platforms including AWS, Azure and GCP.
- **GIS Services** - creation, management, analysis and mapping of geospatial data using Hexagon and other platforms.
- **AI Services** - applied AI and machine learning to extract insight from existing data assets.
- **Cyber Security** - risk management and cyber security advisory for government and public sector clients.

# DIEM Analytics

> UK defence analytics consultancy specialising in decision support, simulation, and capability investment analysis.

## What they do

DIEM Analytics helps defence stakeholders from tactical to strategic level make better decisions about capability investment and operational planning. Their method combines visual modelling of the problem space with structured stakeholder interviews, producing simulation tools, decision aids, and evidence bases for evaluating courses of action. The company is entirely defence-focused; its client and domain list covers Dstl, Raytheon UK, Roke Manor Research, and Cohort plc subsidiaries, across the UK MOD and prime contractor community.

## Products and solutions

- **Decision Support Modelling** - Visual modelling of problem spaces combined with structured small-group stakeholder interviews; produces evidence bases for option analysis.
- **Simulation and Synthetic Environments** - Custom simulation tools for operational planning and capability development; domains include Close Combat, Air Defence, End-to-End Targeting, and Joint Logistics.
- **Data Science and Transformation** - AI and machine learning applied to defence analytical problems; modelling and synthetic environment generation.

companies.body:
# Digica Solutions

> AI and software engineering company with a dedicated defence practice, covering ISR, autonomous systems, sensor fusion and computer vision.

## What they do

Digica builds AI and software solutions in cloud, IoT and embedded systems for industries including defence, automotive, healthcare and semiconductors. Its defence practice focuses on mission-critical AI that operates with sparse data, covering intelligence, surveillance and reconnaissance, autonomous systems, chemical analysis and fault prediction. The company holds offices in the UK, Poland and the USA, and describes itself as owner-led.

## Products and solutions

- **Military-grade DPV detectors** - deep-learning training pipeline capable of detecting and differentiating drones, people and vehicles from petabytes of sensor data.
- **Target tracking and re-identification** - integrated surveillance system combining thermal cameras, visual-light cameras and motion detectors for multi-source target tracking.
- **Automatic payload monitoring** - GPU-accelerated method that detects which equipment payloads (fuel, ammunition) are being loaded onto a UGV.
- **Unified battlefield system** - fuses visual-light and thermal camera feeds, radar, motion detectors and target classifiers into a single surveillance and observation interface.
- **Chemical analysis module** - ML segmentation model trained to detect reacted surfaces indicating chemical contamination on military vehicles, with display via military-grade VR helmet.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO-certified (ISOQAR); Google Cloud Partner Advantage.

# Digital Concepts Engineering

> UK SME designing and manufacturing robotic control systems and uncrewed ground vehicles for defence, nuclear and hazardous-environment applications.

## What they do

Digital Concepts Engineering (DCE) specialises in the design, development and production of robotic control systems and unmanned vehicles. Its products are used across defence, nuclear, health and agriculture sectors where keeping people out of hazardous environments is the primary objective. The company is based in the Midlands and has supplied government defence agencies, laboratories, prime contractors and industry partners; it participated in the British Army's 2018 Army Warfighting Experiment.

## Products and solutions

- **Marionette Universal Control System** - modular, vehicle-agnostic applique robotics toolkit providing bolt-on low-latency external control. Deployed on platforms from 250 kg to 30,000 kg including the FV510 Warrior armoured fighting vehicle, HMMWV, RMMV HX60 tactical truck, Wheelbarrow Mk7 EOD robot and the Ghost Vision-60 Q-UGV. Interfaces with cameras, weapon systems, CBRNe sensors and manipulator arms.
- **X Series** - range of high-capability, affordable, tracked all-terrain uncrewed ground vehicles covering amphibious and multi-domain roles.
- **UGV Operator Course** - training programme combining theory, legal considerations and hands-on practical demonstration for UGV operators.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials; ISO 9001.

[source](https://ukdefencejournal.org.uk/british-army-picks-dce-for-first-operational-ugv-fleet/)

companies.body:
# Dionach

> CREST-approved cybersecurity consultancy with a dedicated defence and aerospace practice; now part of the Nomios Group.

## What they do

Dionach is a CREST-approved cybersecurity consultancy with over 25 years of experience delivering assurance, compliance and incident response services. It holds NCSC CHECK company status for penetration testing and serves defence contractors, aerospace manufacturers and government and MoD suppliers, helping them manage cyber risk across IT, OT and embedded environments. In October 2024, Dionach was acquired by Nomios, a European cybersecurity and network-services group. The company retains its UK offices in Oxford and Glasgow.

## Products and solutions

- **Penetration testing** - network, web application and threat-led penetration testing; NCSC CHECK-certified.
- **OT/ICS/SCADA testing** - security assessment of operational technology and industrial control systems in defence and aerospace environments.
- **Red team and adversary simulation** - red team assessments, assumed breach exercises and purple teaming.
- **Compliance services** - ISO 27001, ISO 9001, Cyber Essentials, NIST, NIS2 and MoD supplier assurance support.
- **Solas Platform** - proprietary cyber risk management platform.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** CREST (penetration testing, incident response, vulnerability assessment); NCSC CHECK; ISO 27001; ISO 9001; Cyber Essentials Plus; PCI QSA.

# DIS Consulting

> UK defence systems engineering and technical assurance consultancy covering land, air, maritime, and weapons domains.

## What they do

DIS Consulting (Defence and Innovation Systems Consulting) is a Warminster-based technical consultancy providing systems engineering, safety assurance, data science, and quantum technology advisory services to DE&S, UK Front Line Commands, and NATO. The company operates an associate-heavy delivery model, assembling multidisciplinary teams including SQEP consultants and chartership holders. It is independent and supplier-agnostic.

# Disruptive Industries Ltd

> AI-driven threat intelligence and risk identification platform for defence, national security, and critical infrastructure customers.

## What they do

Disruptive Industries builds the Keystone threat discovery engine, which uses behavioural sequencing, geospatial analysis, and real-time anomaly detection to identify threats across proprietary data streams. Its ODDITY product monitors GPS interference and its ORBAT feed consolidates adversarial intelligence from multiple sources into a near-real-time single feed. The company targets defence and national security customers, positioning Keystone across air, land, sea, space, and cyber domains within a C5ISR framework.

## Products and solutions

- **Keystone** - AI-powered threat discovery engine; behavioural sequencing, geospatial analysis, real-time risk and anomaly detection. Listed on the G-Cloud Digital Marketplace.
- **ODDITY** - GPS interference monitoring and overlay feed; counter-UAS and electronic warfare relevance.
- **ORBAT** - Consolidated adversarial intelligence feed with one-hour refresh cadence; listed on the Digital Marketplace.
- **Curated Alerting** - Actionable tactical threat analysis including threats from illicit online communities.
- **Tailored Reporting** - Bespoke weekly or monthly intelligence reports.

companies.name: Distance Technologies
companies.summary: Finnish startup developing glasses-free mixed reality displays that turn transparent surfaces into augmented-reality screens.
companies.body:
# Distance Technologies

> Finnish startup developing glasses-free mixed reality displays that turn transparent surfaces into augmented-reality screens.

## What they do

Distance Technologies is a Helsinki-based startup, founded in 2024, developing glasses-free mixed reality technology that transforms transparent surfaces into augmented-reality displays. The system uses AI and eye-tracking to project layered digital information into the user's natural line of sight without headsets or glasses. In defence it is applied to vehicle windshields and heads-up displays, showing real-time 3D tactical data, terrain mapping and AI-driven insights, including in low-visibility conditions such as darkness and smoke. The company initially targeted automotive use to prove low-cost mass production before extending into defence.

## Products and solutions

- **Glasses-free mixed reality display** - turns windshields and transparent surfaces into 3D AR displays driven by AI and eye-tracking, with defence applications in military vehicle heads-up displays.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** Member of the Patria-led eALLIANCE collaboration on next-generation mixed reality HUDs.

## Recent news

companies.body:
# DMG MORI UK

> UK subsidiary of the global precision machine tool manufacturer DMG MORI, supplying high-precision machining solutions to the aerospace, defence and space sectors.

## What they do

DMG MORI UK Limited is the British sales and service entity of DMG MORI, a Japanese-German machine tool manufacturer with operations in 45 countries and 128 locations worldwide. The UK entity is based in Coventry and provides the full DMG MORI product portfolio alongside training, maintenance and spare-parts support. The global group employs approximately 13,500 people across 18 production plants; the UK operation is a sales, service and demonstration centre rather than a manufacturing site.

## Products and solutions

- **CNC turning and milling machines** - multi-axis turning and milling centres used in aerospace, defence and space component manufacture.
- **Lasertec additive manufacturing systems** - laser deposition welding and hybrid additive/subtractive machining platforms for complex metal parts.
- **Automation and digital integration solutions** - end-to-end automation cells, digital manufacturing (DX) software and Green Transformation (GX) energy-monitoring tooling under the Machining Transformation (MX) programme.
- **Aerospace Excellence Centre support** - feasibility analysis, application technology development and turnkey solutions for aviation and space customers.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Links

- Website: https://uk.dmgmori.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/dmg-mori-uk-limited

companies.body:
# DMG MORI UK Limited

> UK subsidiary of the global DMG MORI group, providing high-precision CNC machine tools and manufacturing solutions to the aerospace, defence and space sectors from its Coventry base.

## What they do

DMG MORI UK Limited is the British sales, service and technology centre for DMG MORI, a Japanese-German machine tool manufacturer with operations in 45 countries and approximately 13,500 employees globally. The UK entity is based in Coventry and provides the full DMG MORI product portfolio to British and Irish customers alongside training, maintenance, spare-parts support and application engineering. The global group supplies precision turning, milling, grinding, ultrasonic and additive manufacturing systems, with a dedicated focus on aviation and space, automotive, die and mould, medical, and semiconductor sectors.

## Products and solutions

- **CNC turning and milling centres** - multi-axis turning and milling machines used in aerospace, defence and space component manufacture, including engine housings, landing gear and structural parts.
- **LASERTEC additive manufacturing systems** - hybrid laser deposition welding and 5-axis milling platforms for complex metal components in finished-part quality.
- **Automation and digital integration solutions** - end-to-end automation cells, digital manufacturing software and energy-monitoring tooling under the Machining Transformation (MX) programme.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2024** - DMG MORI held an Open House at its Coventry headquarters demonstrating machine tools and digital solutions for aerospace and precision manufacturing customers. [source](https://event.dmgmori.com/en/events/open-house-coventry-2024)

## Links

- Website: https://uk.dmgmori.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/dmg-mori-uk-limited

## Notes

DMG MORI UK Limited (Companies House 01030108, incorporated 1971) is a wholly owned subsidiary of the DMG MORI group, headquartered in Nagoya, Japan. The German entity DMG MORI AG is listed on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange. The UK operation is a sales, service and demonstration centre; manufacturing takes place at the group's overseas production plants.

companies.body:
# DMS technologies

> Hampshire-based manufacturer of military-grade battery packs, engine-start systems and bespoke portable power solutions for defence, aviation and security customers worldwide.

## What they do

DMS technologies designs, manufactures and supplies portable and static power solutions from its 18,000 sq ft facility in Romsey, Hampshire. Founded in 1986 and ADS Group member, the company serves military, aviation, marine, rail and industrial markets. Its defence work covers engine-start systems for armoured fighting vehicles, helicopters and aircraft, as well as bespoke battery packs for body-worn equipment, generators and crew-served weapons systems. The company holds ISO 9001 accreditation.

## Products and solutions

- **Red Flash Portable Power Pack** - rugged AGM-based ground power unit designed to start military vehicles including helicopters, battle tanks, armoured fighting vehicles and light aircraft in extreme conditions.
- **Mini-Gun Slave Battery Mk2** - purpose-designed battery system to power the 6-barrel Dillon Aero M134D Mini-Gun, in service with the Royal Navy.
- **Custom battery packs** - bespoke lithium and AGM battery assemblies for body-worn equipment, field generators, aircraft starting and portable field power applications.
- **Charging systems** - military-specification standby charging and management systems to support in-service battery maintenance.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

# DNASTREAM Limited

> Guildford-based IFS specialist consultancy delivering enterprise resource planning, asset management and digital transformation services to defence and defence-sector organisations.

## What they do

DNASTREAM Limited is an independently owned IT consultancy founded in 2006, specialising in the implementation, upgrade and support of IFS enterprise software. The company holds Specialized Partner status within the IFS partner programme, with a stated focus on defence, energy and utilities, resources, service industries and enterprise asset management. Its services cover programme and project management, technical and solution architecture, system implementation, managed support and change adoption. DNASTREAM operates from Surrey Technology Centre in Guildford and has exhibited at the Defence Procurement, Research, Technology and Exportability (DPRTE) event alongside IFS.

## Products and solutions

- **ASCEND AMS** - DNASTREAM's own suite of managed services for IFS application support, including pro support, lifecycle assurance, insights and analytics, and UK sovereign hosting.
- **IFS Applications implementation** - full delivery of IFS ERP, enterprise asset management, field service management and defence-relevant modules including aviation maintenance.
- **Transformation services** - programme management, stakeholder engagement, training and adoption work to support enterprise technology deployments.

companies.name: Dominion Dynamics
companies.summary: Canadian defence technology startup building an Arctic autonomy and sensing stack for NATO and allied nations.
companies.body:
# Dominion Dynamics
> Canadian defence technology startup building an Arctic autonomy and sensing stack for NATO and allied nations.

## What they do
Dominion Dynamics develops an integrated stack combining Arctic-optimised sensing, autonomous systems and networked platforms. The stated goal is to provide Canada with a domestic defence capability at scale, reducing dependence on large US primes such as Lockheed Martin and Raytheon. The company completed an Arctic deployment of its sensor technology at an early stage and is positioning for Canadian military procurement.

The advisory board includes former Chief of the Defence Staff General Wayne Eyre and former Vice Chief of the Defence Staff Lieutenant-General Mike Rouleau, providing direct access into Canadian defence procurement. Dominion raised CAD 21 million in seed funding led by Georgian Partners, with BCI and Bessemer Venture Partners participating.

## Products and solutions
- **Arctic autonomy stack** - integrated sensing, autonomy and networked platform capability for NATO's Arctic operating environment.

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/dominiondynamics/

companies.name: Domo Tactical Communications (DTC)
companies.summary: Tactical IP mesh, COFDM and software-defined radio systems for video, voice and data; part of Codan (Australia).
companies.body:
# Domo Tactical Communications (DTC)

> Tactical IP mesh, COFDM and software-defined radio systems for video, voice and data; part of Codan (Australia).

## What they do

Domo Tactical Communications (DTC), a Codan Company, designs and manufactures mission-critical tactical communications systems based on IP mesh and COFDM technologies. Its solutions secure, share and communicate real-time video, voice and data to enable shared situational awareness on land, at sea and in the air, serving military, law enforcement, counter-terror, government, broadcast, commercial and NGO users. DTC was acquired by Australia-headquartered Codan Limited in 2021; the UK registered entity is Domo Tactical Communications (DTC) Limited in Whiteley, Hampshire.

## Products and solutions

- **NETNode IP mesh radios** - IP mesh radio family, with the Phase 5 generation offering dual HD video encoders and MIMO capability.
- **BluSDR family** - software-defined radios for long-range mission-critical connectivity with MANET networking, including unmanned-platform variants.
- **SDR-H2 and SDR-M** - software-defined radio transceivers.
- **Vidar** - video compression solution for real-time streaming in low-bandwidth, contested environments.

## Recent news

- **2026-06-17** - DTC selected for a US Army communications infrastructure contract. [source](https://www.dtccodan.com/)
- **2026-05** - DTC launched the BluTrak-90-D, a self-contained system that autonomously tracks UAVs for stable long-range data links. [source](https://www.dtccodan.com/)
- **2025** - DTC introduced SafeSignal, a long-range wireless imaging solution shown at SOF Week 2025 (with Cuattro), and the BluSDR-90-UL software-defined radio module for unmanned platforms. [source](https://www.unmannedsystemstechnology.com/company/dtc-codan/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.dtccodan.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/domo-tactical-communications

companies.name: Domo Tactical Communications (DTC) Limited
companies.summary: UK-based designer and manufacturer of tactical IP mesh communications, software-defined radios, and covert audio and video surveillance solutions for defence, law enforcement, and unmanned systems markets.
companies.body:
# Domo Tactical Communications (DTC)

> UK-based designer and manufacturer of tactical IP mesh communications, software-defined radios, and covert audio and video surveillance solutions for defence, law enforcement, and unmanned systems markets.

## What they do

DTC develops and manufactures mission-critical communications and surveillance technology for demanding operational environments. Its products span tactical IP mesh radio networks, software-defined radios, covert audio and video equipment, and command-and-control software. The company has operated in this space for over 50 years and serves customers in more than 150 countries across military, law enforcement, intelligence, and unmanned vehicle platforms on land, sea, and air.

DTC is owned by Codan Limited, an Australian publicly-listed company, with the UK entity registered in Whiteley, Hampshire.

## Products and solutions

- **NETNode IP Mesh Radios** - multi-role tactical mesh radio nodes for fixed, mobile, and unmanned vehicle installations, supporting real-time video, voice, and data sharing across distributed networks.
- **Software-Defined Radios (SDRs)** - compact transceivers operating across UHF to 5 GHz, carrying DTC's MeshUltra and MeshUltra-X MIMO MANET waveforms; designed for UGV, UAV, and USV integration.
- **Covert Audio and Video Solutions** - surveillance-grade audio and video capture and transmission equipment for intelligence and law enforcement operations.
- **Command and Control Software** - strategic C2 software for managing surveillance and communications networks.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2026-06-05** - Awarded a USD 9.8 million sole-source US Army contract for improvements to a classified telecommunications intercept and exploitation system, running to June 2031. [GlobalSecurity.org](https://www.globalsecurity.org/military/library/news/2026/06/dod-contracts_4510415.htm)
- **2021-05** - Acquired by Codan Limited (ASX-listed) for approximately USD 88 million. [Armada International](https://www.armadainternational.com/2021/06/codan-limited-has-acquired-domo-tactical-communications/)

companies.body:
# Donite Plastics Ltd

> Northern Ireland thermoforming manufacturer producing large-format vacuum-formed plastic parts and assemblies for aerospace, defence, and space customers.

## What they do

Donite Plastics specialises in batch manufacture of heavy-duty plastic mouldings using vacuum forming and CNC trimming processes. It holds AS9100 certification for the design, manufacture, and assembly of thermoformed products for the aviation, space, and defence industries, and is the first vacuum forming company in the UK and Ireland to hold both AS9100 and ISO 14001. The company operates one of the largest vacuum formers in Ireland and the UK, capable of producing parts up to 2.5 x 2 metres, and has expanded capacity significantly through recent machinery investment.

## Products and solutions

- **Vacuum-formed aerospace interiors components** - large and small-dimension moulded parts for aircraft interior programmes, produced to AS9100 standards.
- **5-axis and 3-axis CNC trimming and machining** - precision finishing of thermoformed parts, including toolmaking, with machines capable of working up to 4.8 x 1.8 x 1.2 metres.
- **Mould, trim tooling, fabrication, and assembly** - end-to-end manufacturing from design and prototyping through to finished assemblies.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** AS9100, ISO 9001, ISO 14001
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

[Donite Plastics](https://www.donite.com/news/2024/05/20/donite-plastics-receives-certification-for-environmental-performance/)

# Dontaur Engineering Limited

> Northern Ireland precision CNC machining company producing detailed aerospace and defence components and assemblies to AS9100 standard, with customer approvals from Airbus, GE Aviation, and Bombardier.

## What they do

Established in 1976, Dontaur Engineering manufactures quality-assured precision components, assemblies, and kits for the aerospace, defence, and security sectors. The company holds AS9100:2016 and ISO 9001:2015 approval and has maintained SC21 Silver status since 2013. Its core machining capabilities cover 3, 4, and 5-axis milling, multi-axis turning, grinding, thread rolling, and assembly, working in aluminium, steel, titanium, and Inconel. In 2002 Dontaur opened its sister company Aerospace Metal Finishers, providing surface treatment and becoming one of the few one-stop-shops for manufacturing, treating, and assembling aircraft parts in the UK.

## Products and solutions

- **Precision machined components and assemblies** - detailed components, kits, and assemblies manufactured to AS9100 standard for aerospace and defence customers.
- **5-axis machined parts** - complex geometries in titanium, Inconel, and aluminium using DMG/Mori and similar 5-axis centres.
- **Surface treatment and finishing** - via sister company Aerospace Metal Finishers, providing an integrated supply offering for treated and assembled aerostructure parts.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** AS9100:2016 (Approval No. Q06221), ISO 9001:2015, SC21 Silver
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

# Doyle Shipping Group Belfast

> Port services, stevedoring, customs clearance, warehousing, and freight forwarding operating out of Belfast, Larne, and Foyle.

## What they do

Doyle Shipping Group (Belfast) is the Northern Ireland operation of the Doyle Shipping Group (DSG), an Irish family-owned shipping and logistics company founded in 1886. The Belfast entity offers ship agency, stevedoring and heavy lifting, customs clearance, warehousing, and project freight forwarding across Belfast, Larne, and Foyle ports. DSG Belfast played a prominent role in Brexit-related customs and trade matters for the group and carries particular expertise in project freight forwarding for complex cargo movements.

## Services

- **Ship Agency** - port agency and vessel husbandry services at Belfast, Larne, and Foyle.
- **Stevedoring and Heavy Lifting** - cargo handling, loading, and unloading of client vessels.
- **Customs Clearance** - import and export customs management, including post-Brexit NI protocol matters.
- **Warehousing and Storage** - bulk and general warehousing at Belfast port.
- **Project Freight Forwarding** - worldwide logistics for project and abnormal cargo.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

companies.body:
# DRAKON Group Ltd

> UK specialist in Explosive Ordnance Disposal, providing operational EOD/IEDD deployment, IMAS-accredited training, and specialist equipment development.

## What they do

DRAKON Group Ltd is a Bicester-based specialist founded in 2016. It delivers operational EOD and IEDD services including battle area clearance and explosive threat intelligence, and runs IMAS-accredited EOD training courses (Levels 1/2, 3, and 3+) at a purpose-built facility near Belgrade in partnership with the Serbian Mine Action Centre and in Cornwall, UK. The company also develops and manufactures specialist equipment including Hook and Line kits and tactical medical kit, both in operational use.

## Products and solutions

- **Hook and Line equipment** - specialist EOD operator equipment developed and manufactured by DRAKON, in operational use in Eastern Europe.
- **Tactical medical kit** - developed and supplied by DRAKON, in use in West Africa and Eastern Europe.
- **IMAS EOD training courses** - Levels 1/2, 3, and 3+ (advanced bulk demolitions), conducted in compliance with IMAS Test and Evaluation Protocols, delivered in the UK and at SMAC's facility near Belgrade.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group; Counter EO UK (ADS Special Interest Group).

## Recent news

# DRE Digital Ltd

> UK data platform and AI company with an active British Army engagement, delivering equipment readiness and lethality measurement capability through its DDx platform.

## What they do

DRE Digital is a Winchester-based technology company incorporated in 2012. Its core product is the DDx platform, a data curation, cataloguing and exchange system designed to create a trusted single source of truth for data at scale. The company also offers data strategy, AI maturity, data ethics and IoT systems integration consultancy. In defence, it is working with the British Army on Project Eligius, an AI-powered Equipment Support Lethality Index (ESLI) that measures equipment readiness; the solution has been deployed in 6 Battalion REME with rollout under way across 3 UK Armoured Division.

## Products and solutions

- **DDx platform** - proprietary data curation, cataloguing and exchange platform for enterprise-scale data management, designed to provide a trusted single source of truth.
- **Equipment Support Lethality Index (ESLI)** - AI-powered capability measure for Army equipment readiness, developed under Project Eligius with REME.

companies.name: DRISQ Ltd
companies.summary: Malvern-based software verification specialist applying formal mathematical proof techniques to safety-critical and mission-critical embedded software in aerospace, defence, autonomous systems, and space.
companies.body:
# D-RisQ

> Malvern-based software verification specialist applying formal mathematical proof techniques to safety-critical and mission-critical embedded software in aerospace, defence, autonomous systems, and space.

## What they do

D-RisQ Ltd was incorporated in 2011, drawing on over 30 years of government-backed formal methods research. The company develops and applies automated verification tools that generate machine-checkable mathematical proof of software correctness, replacing or substantially reducing the testing burden required by civil and military certification standards including DO-178C (with the DO-333 Formal Methods Supplement) to Level A (highest integrity). Customers span aerospace, defence, autonomous systems, automotive, marine, nuclear, medical, robotics, and space. The company is based at Malvern Hills Science Park, Worcestershire.

## Products and solutions

- **Kapture** - requirements authoring tool producing unambiguous, verifiable, and traceable natural-language requirements.
- **Modelworks** - automated formal verification of Simulink and Stateflow designs against requirements.
- **CLawZ** - proves that C code generated from a Simulink/Stateflow model is a complete and correct implementation of the design; eliminates downstream unit testing at that stage.
- **FEVER** - proves that binary code correctly implements source code, catching errors introduced by the compiler.
- **System Kapture** - system-level requirements management for multi-stakeholder environments.

Known application: Eurofighter Typhoon auto-throttle and auto-pilot verification (QinetiQ-led programme).

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials; Cyber Essentials Plus; ISO 9001
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2026-04** - Soil Machine Dynamics (SMD) selects D-RisQ's automated verification tools to generate safety-case evidence for their autonomous underwater vehicle programme. [ADS Advance](https://www.adsadvance.co.uk/smd-selects-d-risq-to-advance-autonomous-systems.html)
- **2025** - D-RisQ selected for the Mobilise innovation accelerator, funded by the Department for Business and Trade and the Centre for Connected and Automated Vehicles; grant of up to £180,000 to commercialise the Proof Tool Suite across automotive, aerospace, MedTech, and space. [D-RisQ](https://www.drisq.com/d-risq-uk-government-funded-mobilise-innovation-accelerator)

## Links

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/d-risq-ltd

companies.name: Drone Band Ltd
companies.summary: UK start-up producing a physical, non-kinetic counter-drone capture device for security and defence use in environments where jamming or explosive methods are unsuitable.
companies.body:
# Drone Band Ltd

> UK start-up producing a physical, non-kinetic counter-drone capture device for security and defence use in environments where jamming or explosive methods are unsuitable.

## What they do

Drone Band Ltd is a London-based start-up incorporated in January 2023. It has developed the Crown, a 3D-printed, drone-mounted mechanical capture device that intercepts hostile or unauthorised multi-rotor drones mid-flight using a patent-pending physical mechanism with no propellants or pyrotechnics. An interceptor drone deploys the Crown, which entangles the target drone's rotors on contact; the captured drone separates and descends under a parachute for safe recovery and forensic examination. The system is positioned as a terminal layer within wider layered counter-UAS architectures, suited to urban areas, critical infrastructure, prisons, events and sensitive environments.

## Products and solutions

- **The Crown** - 3D-printed mechanical counter-drone capture device; patent pending; fits a range of FPV carrier drones; recovers the captured drone under parachute; no propellants, no pyrotechnics; reusable; combined system weight approximately 500g in the lightest configuration.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2025-09** - Drone Band exhibited the Crown at International Security Expo 2025, Olympia, London. [source](https://www.internationalsecurityexpo.com/news/drone-band-showcases-the-crown-at-ise-2025-a-safe-cost-effective-physical-counter-drone-solution)

companies.name: Drone Defence Services Ltd
companies.summary: UK counter-UAS company delivering drone detection, tracking, identification and mitigation systems.
companies.body:
# Drone Defence Services Ltd

> UK counter-UAS company delivering drone detection, tracking, identification and mitigation systems.

## What they do

Drone Defence Services Ltd is a UK counter-UAS company incorporated in 2017, based at the Drone Innovation Centre, West Carr Business Park, Retford. It uses proprietary technologies to detect, track and identify drones across wide areas on land or at sea using multi-sensory technology, and to disrupt drone command and navigation radio transmissions in any weather, day or night. The company states its systems are intended for qualified defence, government and security organisations and are subject to UK export controls.

## Products and solutions

- **AeroStrike** - high-speed kinetic drone interceptor reaching up to 270 km/h, with an intercept envelope of 100-200 km/h, up to 10 minutes endurance and a 13 km operating range; non-explosive and recoverable architecture.
- **AeroTracker** - flight monitoring, tasking and intercept management platform, integrating with radar, RF and EO/IR detection systems.
- **Detection and mitigation systems** - multi-sensory wide-area drone detection, tracking and identification, plus RF disruption of drone command and navigation links.

## Recent news

- **2026-02-02** - Unveiled AeroStrike, a high-speed kinetic drone interceptor for high-threat environments. [source](https://www.dronedefence.co.uk/news/dd-unveils-high-speed-drone-interceptor)

- LinkedIn: https://uk.linkedin.com/company/drone-defence

companies.body:
# Drone Evolution Ltd

> Welsh UAS manufacturer developing the Scimitar FPV strike and ISR range and the Sentinel tethered surveillance UAV, with an active MoD training contract and Ukraine theatre testing.

## What they do

Drone Evolution Ltd is a Caerphilly-based UAS developer incorporated in 2018 and backed by Investment Fund for Wales funding. Starting as a commercial drone services and tethered-power systems provider, it has pivoted to defence manufacture. Its Scimitar FPV range covers 7", 10", 13" and 15" quadcopters for one-way strike and ISR missions, built to approximately 95% UK-sourced components with the company's own flight controller, batteries, radios and frames; the stated goal is to eliminate all Chinese components as a sovereign supply chain measure. It holds an MoD contract for intensive FPV pilot training delivered on Salisbury Plain and has had Scimitar systems tested by Ukrainian FPV pilots in theatre.

## Products and solutions

- **Scimitar FPV range** - 7", 10", 13" and 15" quadcopters for one-way strike and ISR; the 10" variant carries up to 7 kg payload to 5 km or 3 kg to 25 km on dual battery; approximately 95% UK-sourced components.
- **Sentinel** - tethered quadcopter UAV carrying up to 5 kg ISR, communications or electronic warfare payloads to 50 m altitude for extended endurance; launched at DSEI 2023.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group; Armed Forces Covenant signatory (Defence Employer Recognition Scheme Bronze Award).

## Recent news

- **2025-09** - Unveiled the Scimitar FPV range at DSEI 2025, confirming MoD Salisbury Plain training contract and plans for swarming capability and export markets. [source](https://www.shephardmedia.com/news/air-warfare/dsei-2025-droneevolution-eyes-uk-and-export-markets-with-scimitar-fpv-drone/)
- **2025-07** - Euro-SD interview covering the Scimitar FPV range, sovereign supply chain approach, Ukraine testing and MoD engagement. [source](https://euro-sd.com/2025/07/major-news/45355/drone-evolution-fpv-solutions/)

companies.summary: Independent UAS and counter-UAS consultancy, procurement adviser and marketplace operator, serving defence, government and critical national infrastructure customers.
companies.body:
# Drone Major Ltd

> Independent UAS and counter-UAS consultancy, procurement adviser and marketplace operator, serving defence, government and critical national infrastructure customers.

## What they do

Drone Major Ltd is a London-based specialist incorporated in September 2016, operating as a division of Drone Major Group. It provides strategic consultancy, market intelligence, procurement advisory and test and evaluation services across the drone and counter-drone sector, connecting buyers to suppliers from a vetted global network of over 7,000 suppliers via its marketplace platform. Sectors served include MOD, defence primes, government and critical national infrastructure operators across land, maritime and air domains. In June 2025 it received the first CAA Operational Authority to fly long-range BVLOS drones over active UK critical national infrastructure in non-segregated airspace, in partnership with Network Rail.

## Products and solutions

- **Procurement advisory and supplier matching** - independent advisory connecting buyers to vetted drone and counter-drone suppliers.
- **Drone and counter-UAS consultancy** - strategic consultancy, capability design, rapid prototyping support and project management for UAS and C-UAS programmes.
- **Drone Major marketplace** - buyer/supplier platform covering over 7,000 global drone and autonomous systems suppliers.
- **Digital Tethering** - system for assured BVLOS operations in complex environments; trialled on Network Rail routes for long-range drone navigation and safety.
- **Test and evaluation** - independent test and evaluation services for drone and autonomous systems.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials; Cyber Essentials Plus.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2025-06** - Received first CAA Operational Authority for long-range BVLOS drone flights over UK critical national infrastructure (Network Rail, Wolverhampton to Sandwell and Dudley, 12 km). [source](https://emergencyservicestimes.com/2025/06/17/uk-caa-gives-green-light-to-long-range-drone-flights-over-critical-national-infrastructure/)
- **2025-04** - Network Rail announced partnership with Drone Major to develop the UK's first drone assured navigation and safety system across its 20,000 miles of track. [source](https://www.newcivilengineer.com/latest/network-rail-trialing-bvlos-drone-asset-inspections-as-government-invests-20m-in-research-01-04-2025/)

companies.body:
# DroneTector Limited

> Glasgow firm building millimetre-wave radar to detect and track small, low-signature drones. Trading as Milliray.

## What they do

DroneTector, now trading as Milliray, builds high-frequency millimetre-wave radar systems designed to detect and track small, low-signature drones that conventional detection systems miss, from single nano or consumer drones to autonomous swarms. It positions cheap consumer drones as a security threat to airports, critical infrastructure, venues, VIP protection and defence, and offers a suite of sensors built around its millimetre-wave radar.

## Products and solutions

- **Millimetre-wave radar** - high-frequency radar purpose-built to detect and classify small and nano drones that other systems struggle with.
- **Sensor suite** - a broader set of sensors for drone detection and tracking.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

# Druid Software

> Private 4G and 5G cellular core network software provider, with a dedicated defence offering for tactical and welfare communications.

## What they do

Druid Software develops private cellular core network technology, operating in the space since 2000. Its Raemis platform delivers 2G through 5G private network capability for defence, enterprise, healthcare, ports, and utilities customers across more than 35 countries. The company raised $20 million in January 2025 to accelerate growth in defence, shipping, and utilities markets. The UK registered entity, Druid Software NI Limited, is based in Belfast and was incorporated in October 2025.

## Products and solutions

- **Raemis** - A private cellular core network platform supporting 2G, 3G, 4G, and 5G. Deployable on commodity hardware; manages provisioning, reporting, and network management from a single software platform. Configurable for rapid field deployment including vehicular and backpack configurations for mobile patrols.
- **Mesh Networking** - An extension of Raemis allowing multiple patrol deployments to operate as a single network, with dynamic expansion and contraction as units join and leave.
- **Welfare Calling** - A managed mobile basecamp service for defence personnel deployed overseas, providing secure voice and data access on personal devices via SIM provisioning.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

# Drumgrange Ltd

> Independent British engineering company specialising in maritime mission systems, C5ISR, and VLF communications for defence.

## What they do

Drumgrange is a family-owned British engineering company established in 1979, operating from sites in Chertsey, Surrey and Portland, Dorset. It designs, develops, integrates, and supports electronic and communication systems for naval and defence customers. The company delivers end-to-end engineering from concept and research through to obsolescence management, with products in service with UK Armed Forces, NATO forces, and foreign militaries.

- **Maritime Mission Systems** - Bespoke systems for naval applications including signature management, positioning and navigation, sonar systems and signal processing, and integration services.
- **C5ISR** - Scalable command, control, communications, computers, cyber, intelligence, surveillance, and reconnaissance solutions. Covers deployable tactical communications, capture solutions, and platform systems integration.
- **VLF Communications** - VLF demodulator and modulator equipment, RED REM processors, and associated broadcast chain infrastructure. Compliant with NATO STANAGs 4724 and 5065. Installed at communication centres, transmitter sites, and submerged platforms.
- **Diamond Intercom and Radio Combiner System** - A radio and intercom integration product.
- **Generic ComSim** - An RF simulator product for training and testing.

## What they do

DTM Global designs and supplies simulation and training software for naval and maritime applications, operating from Ivybridge, Devon. The company holds JOSCAR registration, Cyber Essentials certification, and ISO 9001:2015 UKAS accreditation. Its fire control trainer is installed at HMS Collingwood for Royal Navy small calibre weapon operator training. The company trades as DT Media Ltd t/a DTM Global.

- **Mobile Fire Control Trainer** - A Peli-case packaged version of the Fire Control Trainer, self-contained and requiring only a power outlet, for remote weapon operator training anywhere. Launched at World Defence Show 2024.
- **Insight Recognition Trainer** - Target recognition and identification training software covering aircraft, land vehicles, and sea vessels. Supports EW, C2, air defence, special forces, and intelligence organisation training, including pre-deployment theatre familiarisation.

companies.name: DXC Technology
companies.summary: IT services and solutions provider with over four decades of UK aerospace and defence experience, delivering mission-critical systems for the MOD and defence industry.
companies.body:
# DXC Technology

> IT services and solutions provider with over four decades of UK aerospace and defence experience, delivering mission-critical systems for the MOD and defence industry.

## What they do

DXC Technology provides IT services, consulting, and solutions to defence, aerospace, and public sector organisations. In the UK, the company operates through its subsidiary Enterprise Services Defence and Security UK Limited and is the sole organisation accredited by the Military Aviation Authority to design, modify, and sustain the Advanced Mission Planning Aid (AMPA) system for the Royal Air Force. DXC has a presence of more than 6,500 people across the UK and opened a dedicated Aerospace and Defense Hub in Farnborough in June 2025.

## Products and solutions

- **Advanced Mission Planning Aid (AMPA)** - Ground-based mission planning system providing computerised support for Typhoon, Hercules, Storm Shadow, Hawk TMk1, and Hawk TMk2 aircrew for mission planning, rehearsal, and debriefing.
- **Aerospace and Defense IT Solutions** - AI-powered IT modernisation, cloud transformation, and digital engineering services for defence primes and government customers.
- **Military Training and Simulation** - In partnership with Hadean, development of next-generation training, planning, and data exploitation capabilities for defence.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** Military Aviation Authority Design Organisation approval (AMPA)
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2025-08-25** - MOD announces intent to award a £26m, 31-month single-source contract to DXC for AMPA in-service support, running September 2025 to March 2028. [UK Defence Journal](https://ukdefencejournal.org.uk/mod-plans-26m-contract-for-advanced-mission-planning-aid/)
- **2025-06-26** - DXC opens its Farnborough Aerospace and Defense Hub, consolidating teams from Aldershot and Hook into a single purpose-built facility. [DXC Newsroom](https://dxc.com/newsroom/06262025-dxc-opens-farnborough-office-launches-aerospace-defense-hub-in-uk)

## Links

companies.name: Dynamic Aerospace Fabrications Ltd
companies.summary: Precision aerospace and defence metal fabrication and component manufacturer based in Castle Donington, operating under the US-headquartered Dynamic Aerospace and Defense group.
companies.body:
# Dynamic Aerospace Fabrications

> Precision aerospace and defence metal fabrication and component manufacturer based in Castle Donington, operating under the US-headquartered Dynamic Aerospace and Defense group.

## What they do

Dynamic Aerospace Fabrications Ltd supplies precision machined and fabricated metal components to the aerospace, defence, automotive, and nuclear sectors. The company operates from Castle Donington, Derbyshire, and employs around 100 people. It was formed in 2019 following the acquisition of the aerospace division of Paul Fabrications Ltd, which had been manufacturing defence and aerospace components since 1937, including nose cones for Spitfire aircraft and exhaust manifolds for Rolls-Royce Merlin engines during the Second World War. The parent group, Dynamic Aerospace and Defense, is headquartered in Michigan, USA.

## Products and solutions

- **Precision Metal Fabrication** - 6-axis laser cutting, 3-, 4-, and 5-axis CNC milling, CNC turning, hot and cold forming, resistance and fusion welding, and heat treatment for aerospace and defence applications.
- **Aerospace Engine Components** - Internal LPT honeycombed seal assemblies, finger seals, shrouds, and cases for commercial and military aircraft engines.
- **Defence Structural Components** - Sheet metal and fabricated assemblies for military and civil aircraft programmes.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR
- **Accreditations:** AS/EN 9100:2018, ISO 9001:2015, ISO 45001, ISO 14001:2015, Fit for Nuclear (Nuclear AMRC), Nadcap (multiple in-house processes), Rolls-Royce SABRe approval
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

companies.name: Dynamic Devices Ltd
companies.summary: Liverpool embedded systems consultancy developing satellite-enabled casualty tracking and hardware security technology for dual-use defence and emergency services applications.
companies.body:
# Dynamic Devices Ltd

> Liverpool embedded systems consultancy developing satellite-enabled casualty tracking and hardware security technology for dual-use defence and emergency services applications.

## What they do

Dynamic Devices is an embedded systems consultancy with over two decades of experience in embedded Linux, RTOS, and IoT integration. Its most defence-relevant work is INST (Instantly Networked Smart Triage), an ESA-funded satellite-enabled casualty tracking system that uses low-cost IoT tags and a multi-bearer mesh network, including satellite links, to give commanders real-time visibility of casualty location, number, and triage urgency. The company also contributed to the UKRI Digital Security by Design programme, integrating CHERI/Morello memory-safe processor architecture into the Yocto Embedded Linux build system.

## Products and solutions

- **INST (Instantly Networked Smart Triage)** - Satellite-enabled mass casualty tracking system; IoT tags transmit triage data via mesh and satellite bearers to a digital-twin command map. Site Acceptance Test completed February 2026.
- **meta-cheri (Yocto layer)** - Open-source Yocto/OpenEmbedded layer adding CHERI/Morello build support for hardware-enforced memory safety; contributed to the UKRI DSbD Technology Access Programme.

## Recent news

- **2026-02-01** - INST Site Acceptance Test completed and stakeholder demonstration held at STFC Daresbury. [ESA Space Solutions](https://business.esa.int/projects/inst)
- **2025-06-18** - INST team attended Blue Light Show, Olympia London. [Dynamic Devices](https://www.dynamicdevices.co.uk/inst-team-attends-blue-light-show-2025/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.dynamicdevices.co.uk
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/dynamic-devices-limited
