companies.name: Dynatrace
companies.summary: Observability, AI-powered automation, and security software platform, listed on NYSE, with a UK subsidiary based in Maidenhead and active public sector and defence customers.
companies.body:
# Dynatrace

> Observability, AI-powered automation, and security software platform, listed on NYSE, with a UK subsidiary based in Maidenhead and active public sector and defence customers.

## What they do

Dynatrace provides a unified software intelligence platform combining full-stack observability, AI-powered analytics, application performance monitoring, log management, digital experience monitoring, and security. The company serves government and defence organisations seeking to monitor and secure complex, cloud-native and hybrid IT environments. Its UK subsidiary, Dynatrace Limited, is registered in Maidenhead and has supplied platform subscriptions to UK public sector bodies via the G-Cloud framework. Dynatrace's platform can operate in air-gapped architectures, which is relevant to classified defence environments.

## Products and solutions

- **Dynatrace Platform** - Unified observability, AIOps, and security platform with full-stack monitoring across applications, infrastructure, and user experience.
- **Threat Observability** - Security analytics combining runtime vulnerability detection with observability telemetry to support security operations.
- **Government and Public Sector Solutions** - Tailored deployment options for regulated environments, including air-gapped and protected hosting, with compliance enablement for government security standards.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** G-Cloud (Digital Marketplace)
- **Accreditations:** ISO 27001
- **Memberships:** ADS Group, techUK

companies.name: DZP Technologies
companies.summary: Cambridge advanced-materials company developing printable conductive inks and flexible electronics for robotics, sensors, and autonomous systems.
companies.body:
# DZP Technologies

> Cambridge advanced-materials company developing printable conductive inks and flexible electronics for robotics, sensors, and autonomous systems.

## What they do

DZP Technologies develops water-based conductive inks, graphene dispersions, and electrically conductive adhesives that can be printed or deposited onto flexible and heat-sensitive substrates including textiles, paper, and polymers. The materials underpin flexible and stretchable electronics for wearables, sensors, energy storage, and embedded circuits. In 2025, ARIA selected DZP under its Robot Dexterity programme to develop printed electronics components enabling dexterous robotic manipulation.

## Products and solutions

- **Silver conductive inks** - printable silver formulations for flexible circuit traces and antennas on polymer and textile substrates.
- **Graphene inks and dispersions** - carbon-based conductive materials for supercapacitors, sensors, and 3D-printed electronics.
- **Electrically conductive adhesives** - low-temperature-cure bonding agents for component attachment on flexible assemblies.
- **Thermal management materials** - heat-dissipation pastes for compact embedded electronics.

## Recent news

- **2025** - Selected by ARIA (Advanced Research + Invention Agency) for funded work under the Robot Dexterity programme, developing printed electronics components for dexterous robotic hands. [ARIA funded projects](https://aria.org.uk/opportunity-spaces/smarter-robot-bodies/robot-dexterity/funded-projects)

## Links

- Website: https://dzptechnologies.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/dzp-technologies-ltd

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Companies House (06764280); ARIA funded projects page; DZP Technologies website.

companies.name: e2e-assure Ltd
companies.summary: UK-owned managed threat detection and response provider, specialising in 24/7 SOC-as-a-service for defence, government, and critical national infrastructure.
companies.body:
# e2e-assure

> UK-owned managed threat detection and response provider, specialising in 24/7 SOC-as-a-service for defence, government, and critical national infrastructure.

## What they do

e2e-assure delivers Security Operations Centre services to defence, government, and critical infrastructure organisations, using exclusively SC-cleared UK-based analysts. The company operates its proprietary CUMULO platform, which connects IT and OT monitoring, AI-driven threat detection, and real-time response under a single sovereign capability. It has over a decade of experience securing defence and government environments and holds JOSCAR registration, Cyber Essentials Plus, and G-Cloud 14 accreditation. BGF backed the company with a Series B investment in February 2025.

## Products and solutions

- **CUMULO** - Sovereign AI-driven SOC platform for IT and OT environments, supporting zero-day threat detection through behaviour-based rules and live threat intelligence, with Standard and Enterprise tiers.
- **Managed Threat Detection and Response (MDR)** - 24/7 SOC-as-a-service with SC-cleared UK analysts, covering endpoint, cloud, identity, and OT telemetry.
- **OT Security Monitoring** - Passive network monitoring for SCADA, ICS, and industrial control systems, delivering compliance support for NIS2, CAF, and IEC 62443.
- **Vulnerability Scanning and Monitoring** - Continuous vulnerability management integrated with the SOC service.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR, G-Cloud 14
- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials Plus, ISO 27001
- **Memberships:** ADS Group, techUK

## Recent news

- **2026-06-18** - e2e-assure launches Cumulo, described as the UK's only sovereign AI-driven zero-day SOC platform for IT and OT environments, in response to GCHQ's call for AI-driven national cyber defence. [Intelligent CISO](https://www.intelligentciso.com/2026/06/18/e2e-assure-launches-cumulo-the-uks-only-sovereign-ai-driven-zero-day-soc-platform-for-it-and-ot-security/)
- **2025-02-04** - BGF completes Series B investment in e2e-assure. [BGF](https://www.bgf.co.uk/bgf-invest-10-5m-in-cyber-security-business-e2e-assure/)

companies.body:
# Eagle Eye Innovations

> UK-based RPAS training, operations and consultancy company serving commercial and defence customers globally.

## What they do

Eagle Eye Innovations (EEI) specialises in Remotely Piloted Aircraft Systems (RPAS) training, turn-key operational services, security services, independent consultancy, and research and development for commercial and defence customers. Founded in 2013, EEI was the UK's longest-running CAA-approved drone training provider and the first organisation accredited to deliver the CAA Remote Pilot Certificate Level 1. Its team draws heavily on former military aviation personnel.

## Products and solutions

- **EEI Academy** - CAA-accredited RPAS training programme covering regulatory compliance, airspace, and practical operations across all UAS weight classes.
- **Defence and Security Services** - mission-ready training, operational support, and tailored drone solutions for military and government security customers.
- **Turn-key RPAS Operations** - end-to-end drone services including survey, inspection, and persistent security operations for civil and defence clients.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

companies.name: Eagle Ray Robotics Ltd
companies.summary: Edinburgh startup building cooperative autonomy and distributed sensing for uncrewed subsea systems.
companies.body:
# Eagle Ray Robotics Ltd

> Edinburgh startup building cooperative autonomy and distributed sensing for uncrewed subsea systems.

## What they do

Eagle Ray Robotics Ltd is an Edinburgh-based startup, incorporated in 2023, developing technologies that let autonomous systems operate more effectively in the subsea domain. Its work focuses on distributed sensing, cooperative autonomy and intelligent underwater systems supporting defence, offshore energy and environmental monitoring. The company develops a distributed autonomy platform that enables underwater vehicles to operate as a coordinated sensing network, sharing updates while submerged.

## Products and solutions

- **ConstelX (Constellation OS)** - a fleet intelligence operating system that connects heterogeneous autonomous underwater vehicles into cooperative subsea sensing networks, integrating with onboard vehicle software so operators can add cooperative sensing to existing platforms.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** Member of the Ocean Autonomy Cluster.

# Easol

> Innovation-as-a-service partner helping defence and government organisations turn early-stage ideas into market-ready products and services.

## What they do

Easol is a Gosport-based innovation consultancy working across a spectrum of government and private-sector projects. The company uses a proprietary methodology called HeadStarts to move clients from strategy and early-stage concepts through to functional, deployable outcomes. It has worked as a supplier to the Accelerated Capability Environment (ACE) on multiple commissions, including market analysis and technology evaluation work for policing applications. Approximately half its project mix is government and defence.

## Products and solutions

- **HeadStarts methodology** - structured process for moving innovation concepts through feasibility, market analysis and deployment planning.
- **Bullfrog** - a breakout product in development: automated composite non-destructive testing (NDT) inspection and analysis using thermography and AI, targeting aerospace and defence manufacturing applications.

companies.summary: Specialist supplier of chemical intermediates and energetics raw materials to defence and high-hazard manufacturers.
companies.body:
# East Harbour Group

> Specialist supplier of chemical intermediates and energetics raw materials to defence and high-hazard manufacturers.

## What they do

East Harbour Group supplies raw materials to manufacturers in the energetics and high-hazard industries, including the civil and defence sectors. The company distributes chemical intermediates used in the production of explosives, propellants and pyrotechnics, alongside a broader range of industrial and speciality chemicals. It operates from Colchester, Essex, and has additional operations in India, with logistics arrangements certified to UKWA, BIFA and FTA standards.

## Products and solutions

- **Energetics raw materials** - supply of materials including PETN (pentaerythritol tetranitrate) and ammonium perchlorate (primary oxidiser in solid rocket motors and composite propellants) to manufacturers in the defence and civil sectors.
- **Chemical intermediates** - distribution of speciality and industrial chemicals including propellant stabilisers such as ethyl centralite, and process chemicals for energetics manufacturing.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001, ISO 14001; EcoVadis Silver (top 25% for sustainability)

# Easyfairs UK

> UK operating entity of the Easyfairs Group, a pan-European events company that organises Advanced Engineering, the UK's leading aerospace, defence and engineering supply-chain exhibition.

## What they do

Easyfairs UK Limited is the British subsidiary of the Brussels-headquartered Easyfairs Group, which runs over 110 market-leading events across 12 countries. In the UK, the principal defence-relevant event is Advanced Engineering, held annually at the NEC Birmingham, which brings together OEMs and engineering supply-chain professionals across aerospace, defence, space, composites, automotive and adjacent sectors. ADS Group is a headline partner for the defence and security strand. For 2026, Make UK and Make UK Defence are launching a joint pavilion at the event.

# Ebeni

> Independent safety and engineering assurance consultancy for defence, aerospace, nuclear and rail; MoD Safety Adviser on several large aircraft programmes.

## What they do

Ebeni is an independent specialist engineering company focused on the assessment and assurance of safety, mission and business-critical systems. Its core work spans defence, air traffic management, nuclear and rail. In defence, Ebeni works across air, land, maritime and C4ISTAR domains, providing engineering and management expertise for safety-critical and mission-critical applications. The company is Safety Adviser to the UK MoD on several large aircraft programmes and is Independent Technical Evaluator for the GA-ASI Protector RPAS being delivered to the RAF.

## Products and solutions

- **Safety assurance and certification** - independent safety case development, review and certification for defence platforms, aircraft and complex systems under MoD and civil regulatory frameworks.
- **Airworthiness and regulatory support** - regulatory compliance, airworthiness substantiation and independent technical evaluation for military and civil aviation programmes.

companies.body:
# Echosec Systems UK

> OSINT and geospatial intelligence platform for national security, defence, and law enforcement, operating as part of Flashpoint.

## What they do

Echosec Systems UK Ltd is the UK subsidiary of Echosec Systems, a Canadian-originated open-source intelligence and geospatial intelligence platform company acquired by Flashpoint in August 2022. The platform aggregates real-time data from social media, fringe networks, messaging applications, news sources, and dark web forums, then maps it geospatially to support physical threat intelligence, situational awareness, counterterrorism, and geopolitical risk assessment. The product is now delivered as "Echosec by Flashpoint" within the Flashpoint Ignite unified intelligence platform. The UK operational office is in Cardiff, Wales.

## Products and solutions

- **Echosec by Flashpoint** - geospatial OSINT platform providing real-time social and dark web data mapped to an interactive interface, with geofencing and proximity alerting.
- **Flashpoint Ignite** - unified intelligence platform integrating Echosec capabilities with cyber threat intelligence, vulnerability data, and OSINT.
- **Echosec Assist** - AI summarisation assistant within the Echosec platform, launched May 2024.
- **Echosec Optimize** - AI-powered location-based keyword generation for geospatial OSINT searches, launched December 2025.
- **APIs** - data delivery for integration into customer SIEM, SOAR, and GIS systems.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2025-12** - Flashpoint launched Echosec Optimize, an AI-powered keyword generation tool for location-based OSINT searches. [source](https://flashpoint.io/resources/product-updates/echosec-optimize/)
- **2024-05** - Flashpoint introduced Echosec Assist, an AI summarisation assistant within the Echosec platform. [source](https://flashpoint.io/resources/product-updates/introducing-echosec-assist/)

## Links

- Website: https://flashpoint.io/ignite/echosec-by-flashpoint/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/echosec-systems

companies.name: Eclipse Digital Solutions Ltd
companies.summary: Physical security systems integrator serving Ministry of Defence, government, justice sector, and critical national infrastructure clients.
companies.body:
# Eclipse Digital Solutions

> Physical security systems integrator serving Ministry of Defence, government, justice sector, and critical national infrastructure clients.

## What they do

Eclipse Digital Solutions designs, installs, and maintains integrated electronic security systems for government, defence, justice, and critical national infrastructure clients. The company works across MOD installations, HM Prison Service sites, UK Border Agency facilities, and CPNI-advised organisations. In June 2025 it launched a dedicated Custodial Division to formalise its justice sector presence. It holds a strong accreditation stack including Cyber Essentials Plus, ISO 27001, and SSAIB certification, and is a signatory to the Armed Forces Covenant.

## Products and solutions

- **Perimeter Intrusion Detection Systems (PIDS)** - perimeter detection integrated with thermal CCTV and video analytics.
- **Drone detection and mitigation** - RF-based detection systems with a range of up to 500 metres.
- **Under-vehicle scanning** - deployed at high-security entry points.
- **CCTV and video management systems** - design, installation, and maintenance across secure sites.
- **Access control** - installation and managed maintenance of access control infrastructure.
- **ANPR** - automatic number plate recognition systems.
- **Control room design and integration** - integrated security control room design for government and defence clients.
- **Managed maintenance and support** - ongoing support services for installed security systems.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials Plus, ISO 9001:2015, ISO 27001:2017, ISO 14001, ISO 45001, SSAIB, Armed Forces Covenant signatory
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

# Ecolog International UK

> Global provider of integrated base support and life support services to military and government customers in remote and austere environments.

## What they do

Ecolog International delivers the full suite of base and life support services that keep military personnel operational: accommodation, catering, laundry, facilities management, supply chain, modular construction, engineering, waste and environmental services, healthcare, fuel, water supply, and air service. The company was founded in 1999 following identification of unmet support needs during NATO KFOR operations in Kosovo. Defence and government are its primary markets, with confirmed military customers including the UK Ministry of Defence, US Army, Bundeswehr, NATO, French Army, and the United Nations.

The UK entity (incorporated 2017) is the delivery vehicle for UK and European military contracts. The operational base is in Harlow, Essex. Ecolog has signed the UK Armed Forces Covenant and exhibits regularly at DSEI.

## Products and solutions

- **Life support** - integrated accommodation, catering, food service, and laundry for deployed military personnel.
- **Base and facilities management** - full site management services for military installations in remote and austere environments.
- **Supply chain and logistics** - end-to-end supply chain management for operational and contingency deployments.
- **Modular construction and engineering** - design, build, and maintenance of modular infrastructure for forward operating bases.
- **Healthcare services** - medical support and healthcare provision for deployed forces.
- **Environmental services** - waste management, water supply, and environmental compliance in operational settings.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR
- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials, Cyber Essentials Plus, ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 27001:2022
- **Memberships:** ADS Group; Armed Forces Covenant signatory

companies.name: ECS Special Projects Ltd
companies.summary: Designer and manufacturer of maritime and sub-sea explosive ordnance disposal systems, with products in service with the Royal Navy.
companies.body:
# ECS Special Projects

> Designer and manufacturer of maritime and sub-sea explosive ordnance disposal systems, with products in service with the Royal Navy.

## What they do

ECS Special Projects designs, manufactures, and supplies maritime EOD systems for military and commercial UXO clearance operations. Its flagship Cobra MDS (Mine Disposal System) is a modular sub-sea EOD system in service with the UK Royal Navy and used commercially on offshore wind farm and pipeline projects. The company also manufactures non-lethal security systems and inert training mine targets. It trades as Cobra MDS.

Engineering design is ISO 9001 certified. The company works through a network of strategic partners including Atlas Elektronik GmbH, Ocean Modules, and VideoRay for system integration.

## Products and solutions

- **Cobra MDS** - modular sub-sea mine disposal system; in service with the UK Royal Navy for mine investigation and neutralisation; used commercially on North Sea wind farm and pipeline UXO clearance projects.
- **Viper MDS** - twin-shot disruptor integrated onto the VideoRay Defender ROV for military and commercial EOD operations.
- **Cobra MASTT** - command and control system for Cobra MDS.
- **MX series (MX-50, MX-100, MX-150)** - self-fill, transportable IED and UXO mine disposal tools rated to 300 m depth.
- **LX range** - self-fill low-order deflagrators and disruptors for controlled IED and UXO neutralisation.
- **VAL (Vessel Arrest Launcher)** - pneumatic non-lethal vessel arrest system; deployed by Marine Security Services at the London 2012 Olympics and at the 2013 G8 Summit.
- **Inert mine targets** - replica training mines for Royal Navy validation and training.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Links

- Website: https://cobramds.co.uk
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/ecs-special-projects-limited

companies.body:
# EDM Limited

> Manchester manufacturer of high-performance training simulators and emergency-training equipment for the civil aviation, defence and rail sectors.

## What they do

EDM designs and manufactures training simulators and emergency-training equipment, describing itself as the world's leading supplier of training simulators to the civil aviation and defence markets. Product lines span full-scale cabin crew trainers, maintenance rigs, fire and smoke devices, and defence procedure and maintenance trainers. It is a JOSCAR-registered first-tier supplier and a UK, USA and NATO defence-approved supplier.

## Products and solutions

- **Cabin Emergency Evacuation Trainers (CEETs)** - fuselage-based trainers for cabin crew SOP, SEP and CRM drills, including smoke, fire and evacuation scenarios, in static or motion-based configurations.
- **Door trainers, cabin service trainers and full-size mockups** - civil aviation cabin and crew training devices.
- **Defence procedure trainers, maintenance trainers, ejection seats, simulators and full-size replicas** - synthetic training and maintenance simulators plus ground support equipment.
- **Virtual Slide Trainer** - a recently launched training product.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001:2015, ISO 14001:2015, AS9100D, Cyber Essentials Plus, JOSCAR registered, RISQS verified (rail). Approved supplier to UK, USA and NATO defence, and to Airbus, Boeing, BAE Systems, Rolls-Royce, Martin Baker and Lockheed Martin.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group, Make UK, North West Aerospace Alliance, BSI, National Training and Simulation Association.

## Recent news

- **2025-2026** - Acquired Safety Training Systems, Inc. (STS) of Tulsa, USA, combining aviation and defence training capability. [source](https://edmgroupltd.com/)
- **2025-2026** - Won a Boeing 787 and 777 combination Cabin Emergency Evacuation Trainer order from a major US airline. [source](https://www.aero-mag.com/edm-wins-cabin-emergency-evacuation-trainer-order-us-airline/)

# Efficio

> Procurement and supply chain consultancy serving the UK Ministry of Defence and defence supply chain organisations.

## What they do

Efficio is an independent procurement and supply chain consultancy, operating across 14 offices in Europe, the Middle East, North Africa, and North America. It works with public sector clients including the UK MOD on procurement transformation, commercial capability development, and supply chain resilience. Its public sector practice has more than 150 practitioners.

Defence-specific work includes supporting UK Defence Medical Services with sourcing and delivery of medical equipment to the Armed Forces of Ukraine, advising on MOD commercial capability gaps, and publishing a series of insights for UK Defence leaders on strategy, commercial skills, and SME engagement. Efficio has signed the Armed Forces Covenant.

## Products and solutions

- **Procurement transformation** - advisory and implementation services to restructure procurement functions and improve commercial outcomes.
- **Supply chain resilience** - supply chain risk assessment, mapping, and resilience programmes for defence and government clients.
- **Spend analysis and category management** - data-led category strategies across complex spend portfolios.

# Eficode UK

> DevSecOps and software lifecycle consultancy with a dedicated defence and aerospace service line and security-cleared staff.

## What they do

Eficode is a European DevOps and software lifecycle consultancy, headquartered in Helsinki with operations across ten countries. The UK entity, headquartered in Southampton and originally trading as Clearvision, was acquired by Eficode in 2022. Eficode provides Atlassian tooling (Jira, Confluence), GitLab, GitHub, DevSecOps, scaled Agile, managed DevOps platforms (Eficode ROOT), ITSM, and AI-assisted software development.

The company has a dedicated "Agile and DevOps in Defence and Aerospace" service line, employs security-cleared staff, and has experience working in air-gapped environments. It is a member of Team Defence Information, the MOD-industry-academia collaboration body, and holds JOSCAR registration alongside ISO 27001 and Cyber Essentials.

## Products and solutions

- **Eficode ROOT** - a managed DevOps toolchain platform; available on G-Cloud.
- **Atlassian services** - implementation, migration, and support for Jira, Confluence, and the Atlassian product suite.
- **GitLab and GitHub services** - advisory, implementation, and managed services; Eficode is an Atlassian Platinum and GitHub partner.
- **DevSecOps for defence and aerospace** - secure software pipeline design, implementation, and operation in regulated and classified environments.
- **Agile and scaled Agile** - coaching, tooling, and transformation for Agile adoption on complex defence programmes.

companies.body:
# Egis UK

> Engineering and consulting firm with active UK defence-nuclear work including the Sellafield decommissioning programme and Sizewell C civil design.

## What they do

Egis is a French engineering, project management, and mobility services group with approximately 23,500 employees across more than 100 countries. The UK entity, headquartered in London at Valentine Place in Southwark, employs approximately 1,000 people across offices in London, Bristol, Farnborough, Edinburgh, Glasgow, and Oakham.

UK work spans civil and defence nuclear engineering, aviation advisory and engineering, rail and urban transit, and roads. Defence-relevant work is concentrated in the nuclear domain: Egis holds positions on the £4.6bn Sellafield Decommissioning and Nuclear Waste Partnership (Lot 1, through the Amentum-led DNWP consortium), the Sizewell C civil design contract (extended September 2025), and through its subsidiary Galson Sciences Ltd, a 10-year appointment as Major Permissions Delivery Partner for Nuclear Waste Services' Geological Disposal Facility programme. The parent group holds explicit defence infrastructure capability including naval bases, air bases, and secure environments, primarily for the French Ministry of Armed Forces.

## Products and solutions

- **Defence and civil nuclear engineering** - safety case, civil design, and decommissioning engineering for nuclear sites including Sellafield, Hinkley Point C, and Sizewell C.
- **Nuclear waste and geological disposal** - technical and permitting support for the UK Geological Disposal Facility programme (Galson Sciences subsidiary).
- **Aviation engineering and advisory** - airport operations, airspace design, and engineering services; long-standing base at Farnborough.
- **Rail and transport engineering** - digital rail transformation and transit infrastructure; client includes Transport for London.
- **Infrastructure and buildings** - civil and structural engineering, including roads (M25, M40 operations).

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR; Sellafield Decommissioning and Nuclear Waste Partnership (Lot 1, October 2025); Transport for London Professional Services Framework (April 2025)
- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials, Cyber Essentials Plus, ISO 9001, ISO 27001:2022
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2026-03** - Thomas and Adamson rebrands as Egis following acquisition, expanding the UK headcount to approximately 1,000. [source](https://www.egis-group.com/all-news/thomas-adamson-rebrands-as-egis-following-acquisition)
- **2025-10** - Egis awarded positions on the multi-billion-pound Sellafield Decommissioning and Nuclear Waste Partnership framework (Lot 1, Amentum-led consortium). [source](https://www.egis-group.com/all-news/egis-awarded-positions-on-sellafield-decommissioning-framework)

Egregious builds AI-powered analysis tools to detect and counter disinformation, malign influence operations, and AI-driven deception. # EIZO

## What they do

EIZO Corporation develops high-end display solutions across professional, healthcare, maritime, and defence markets. Its dedicated defence subsidiary, EIZO Rugged Solutions Inc. (Orlando, Florida), has over 30 years' experience in military ISR display and embedded processing, supplying rugged LCD monitors and GPGPU cards qualified to MIL-STD-810 and TEMPEST standards. The UK entity, EIZO Limited (Companies House 07738824, Ascot, Berkshire), handles commercial and professional display distribution; defence-specific UK sales are supported by Sarsen Technology as a UK integration partner.

## Products and solutions

- **Talon rugged LCD monitors** - MIL-STD-810 qualified, TEMPEST-compliant, sunlight-readable monitors in 24-, 28-, and 32-inch formats for vehicle, shipborne, and ground station applications.
- **Embedded GPGPU and video processing** - SOSA-aligned XMC and VPX cards for OpenVPX C4ISR integration, including H.264/265 encoders and video splitters.
- **Sonar and radar display variants** - specialist 2K×2K and stereoscopic display configurations for sonar visualisation, radar, and chart table navigation.

# Elastic
> US-listed search and analytics platform with a defined UK Defence and Public Sector practice, deployed across MOD, intelligence and central government workloads.

## What they do
Elastic produces the Elasticsearch engine and the wider Elastic Stack (Elasticsearch, Kibana, Beats, Logstash), used for search, observability, security and generative AI workloads at scale. In the UK, Elastic operates a dedicated Defence and Public Sector practice and supports government-aligned deployments including air-gapped and on-premises options. The platform underpins log search, threat detection (Elastic Security / SIEM) and observability of mission systems across MOD and intelligence customers.

Elastic is listed on the NYSE (ESTC) and has significant UK presence alongside its Mountain View headquarters.

# Elbit Systems UK

> UK subsidiary of Israeli defence prime Elbit Systems, delivering UAS, electronic warfare, optronics, battle management, and military training systems to the UK Armed Forces.

## What they do

Elbit Systems UK Limited is the UK holding entity for Elbit Systems' British operations, comprising six subsidiaries and two joint ventures across sixteen sites and approximately 680 employees. The company is engaged in multiple major UK defence programmes spanning uncrewed aerial systems, electronic warfare, optronics, command and control, and military flight training. It operates manufacturing, design, and support facilities in England.

## Products and solutions

- **Watchkeeper WK450 UAS** - tactical uncrewed aerial system delivered to the British Army through UAV Tactical Systems Ltd (UTacS), which Elbit fully acquired in January 2026.
- **MORPHEUS Battle Management Application** - command and control software for British Army headquarters and tactical units, based on the TORC2 H platform.
- **MEWSIC (Maritime Electronic Warfare Systems Integrated Capability) Increment 1** - electronic warfare suites for the Royal Navy, provided under a 13-year, £100 million contract with Babcock and QinetiQ.
- **UK Military Flying Training System (MFLTS)** - elementary and basic fast-jet training aircraft and simulators delivered through the Affinity Flying Training Services joint venture with KBR.
- **Night Vision Goggles** - produced at a Centre of Excellence for electro-optics in Kent, supplying the British Army and allied nations.
- **Joint Fires Synthetic Training (JFST)** - simulators supporting Joint Terminal Attack Controller and Fire Support Team training for the British Army.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

## Recent news

companies.name: Electric Twin
companies.summary: AI startup building synthetic audiences that model how populations think and behave, with stated applicability to military campaign planning and strategic influence operations.
companies.body:
# Electric Twin

> AI startup building synthetic audiences that model how populations think and behave, with stated applicability to military campaign planning and strategic influence operations.

## What they do

Electric Twin combines large language models with real-world survey data and social science research to generate synthetic human populations. Clients run simulations against these audiences to predict how real people will respond to messages, policies, or decisions. Independent validation by the London School of Economics found the platform achieves 95% accuracy across 40,000 evaluations in 155 countries. Co-founder Alex Cooper is a former British Army officer and has explicitly positioned the capability for military planning. Simon Case, former Cabinet Secretary and Non-Executive Director at the Ministry of Defence, sits on the company's ethics board.

## Products and solutions

# Electrogear

> Fareham-based electro-mechanical and RF electronics manufacturer serving aerospace, defence, maritime, and energy sectors.

## What they do

Electrogear (Fareham) Ltd is a small engineering business providing electro-mechanical, electrical, electronic, and radio frequency design and manufacturing services. The company covers the full product lifecycle from prototype development through to manufacturing, installation, and commissioning. It serves sectors including aerospace, defence, nuclear, automotive, and maritime. In December 2024, Electrogear entered a strategic collaboration with Barnbrook Systems Ltd to develop opportunities in defence, energy, and hydrogen.

## Products and solutions

- **PCB Assembly and Cable Harness** - board-level assembly through to full cable harness and on-site installation.
- **Prototype and Low-Volume Manufacturing** - rapid prototyping, testing, troubleshooting, and commissioning support.

# Electropak

> Preston-based precision engineering and busbar manufacturer with AS9100 certification and BAE Systems approval, supplying aerospace and defence programmes including Eurofighter, Tornado, Hawk, and F-35.

## What they do

Electropak Limited is a precision engineering and busbar manufacturer established in 1986 and based in Preston, Lancashire. The company holds AS9100 Rev D and ISO 9001 certifications and is approved by BAE Systems. It provides CNC machining, sheet metal fabrication, busbar manufacture, aerospace engraving, painting, and surface finishing services to the aerospace, defence, energy, medical, and rail sectors. Electropak is a subsidiary of UKC Group and exhibited at DSEI 2025.

## Products and solutions

- **Precision CNC Machining** - close-tolerance machined components for aerospace and defence platforms.
- **Busbar Manufacture** - custom busbar assemblies for aerospace, defence, and energy applications.
- **Aerospace Engraving** - engraving of labels, panels, and tools for aircraft including Eurofighter, Tornado, Hawk, and F-35 Joint Strike Fighter.
- **Defence Painting and Surface Finishing** - AS9100-certified powder coating and painting for defence and aerospace components.
- **Sheet Metal Fabrication** - bespoke fabricated structures and assemblies for defence and aerospace programmes.

companies.name: Electrosciences Ltd
companies.summary: UK materials science consultancy specialising in piezoelectric, ferroelectric, and multifunctional materials, with applications in military sensors, sonar, and structural materials.
companies.body:
# Electrosciences Ltd

> UK materials science consultancy specialising in piezoelectric, ferroelectric, and multifunctional materials, with applications in military sensors, sonar, and structural materials.

## What they do

Electrosciences provides scientific consultancy and contract R&D in multifunctional materials, covering piezoelectric, ferroelectric, pyroelectric, multiferroic, magnetoelectric, and thermoelectric systems. Services include measurement, characterisation, metrology, standards development, and the development of bespoke instruments. The company also supplies commercial instruments for piezoelectric materials characterisation.

## Products and solutions

- **Piezoelectric Materials d33 Analyser** - instrument for measuring piezoelectric coefficients in materials and components.
- **LIMM Analyser** - laser intensity modulation method instrument for pyroelectric and piezoelectric profiling.
- **StressCell (Multifunctional Stress Rig)** - test rig for combined mechanical and electrical characterisation of materials.
- **ESPY33** - piezoelectric measurement tool developed in collaboration with aixACCT Systems GmbH.
- **Contract R&D and characterisation services** - testing and modelling of multifunctional materials for defence, aerospace, and industrial clients.

## Defence and aerospace applications

The company's publicly stated military and defence applications include sonar transduction, adaptive camouflage materials, self-healing structural materials, sensor and actuator arrays for military platforms, functionally graded armour materials, and super-hydrophobic surface coatings for military equipment.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001:2015 (certificate FS 736994)
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Recent news

- **2025-03-26** - EURAMET case study published on accurate piezoelectric coefficient determination using the ESPY33 tool. [source](https://electrosciences.co.uk/2025/03/26/euramet-case-study/)
- **2024-10-05** - Electrosciences and aixACCT Systems demonstrated new ESPY tools. [source](https://electrosciences.co.uk/2024/10/05/espytools1/)

companies.name: Element Materials Technology
companies.summary: The world's largest independent provider of testing, inspection, and certification services to the aerospace and defence sector, headquartered in London and owned by Temasek (Singapore).
companies.body:
# Element Materials Technology

> The world's largest independent provider of testing, inspection, and certification services to the aerospace and defence sector, headquartered in London and owned by Temasek (Singapore).

## What they do

Element Materials Technology provides testing, inspection, and certification services across aerospace, defence, and advanced industrial supply chains. Their defence capability spans materials testing, product qualification testing, non-destructive testing, environmental and EMC testing, vibration and shock testing, calibration, and space simulation testing. The company operates over 270 laboratory locations worldwide and has supported programmes including F-35, F-22, A400M, CH-53K, Challenger MBT, Mastiff, and Husky.

UK laboratory locations with defence relevance include Hitchin, Hull, Malvern, Skelmersdale, Warwick, and Wimborne. The company also operates Element Defense (elementdefense.com) as a dedicated US Space and Defense division.

## Products and solutions

- **Materials testing** - destructive and non-destructive testing of metals, composites, coatings, and structural components to aerospace and defence standards.
- **Product qualification testing (PQT)** - environmental, EMC, vibration, shock, and climatic testing to military specifications across six UK sites.
- **Space simulation testing** - thermal-vacuum, vibration, and acoustic testing for space programmes.
- **Calibration services** - traceable calibration across mechanical, electrical, and dimensional measurement disciplines.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR (UK Product Qualification Testing laboratories; recognised by BAE Systems, Babcock, QinetiQ, NATS, Leonardo, Meggitt, and the MOD)
- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001:2015 (multiple UK sites)
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Ownership note

Element Materials Technology is operationally headquartered in London. Ultimate ownership is Temasek, the Singaporean state investment fund, which acquired the business from Bridgepoint in July 2022 for approximately $7 billion. The company is a substantive UK-headquartered business, not a thin UK entity of a foreign firm.

## Recent news

- **2026-05-19** - Announced $20M+ investment to expand the Charlotte, North Carolina aerospace and defence materials testing facility, adding stress rupture, tensile, metallurgical, and miniature testing capacity. [source](https://www.element.com/about-element/news/2026/05/19/element-materials-technology-invests-more-than-20-million-in-charlotte-facility-to-expand-aerospace-and-defense-materials-testing-capacity)
- **2025-12** - Acquired CETECOM (USA), expanding US wireless and connectivity testing capacity. [source](https://tracxn.com/d/acquisitions/acquisitions-by-element-materials-technology)
- **2024-10** - Acquired Issinspection. [source](https://tracxn.com/d/acquisitions/acquisitions-by-element-materials-technology)

## Links

- Website: https://www.element.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/element-materials-technology

companies.name: Elesa (UK) Ltd
companies.summary: UK subsidiary of Elesa S.p.A. (Italy), supplying certified standard machine elements and industrial components to the defence, aerospace, and advanced manufacturing sectors.
companies.body:
# Elesa (UK) Ltd

> UK subsidiary of Elesa S.p.A. (Italy), supplying certified standard machine elements and industrial components to the defence, aerospace, and advanced manufacturing sectors.

## What they do

Elesa (UK) Ltd is the UK subsidiary of Elesa S.p.A., established in 1991 and based in Metheringham, Lincolnshire. The company supplies standard machine elements in plastic and metal, including knobs, handles, levers, hinges, fasteners, clamps, levelling elements, and position indicators, marketed to defence and aerospace manufacturers and MRO suppliers.

Defence and aerospace-relevant product lines include ATEX-certified control elements for explosive-atmosphere environments, INOX stainless steel ranges (AISI 303, 304, 316L) for corrosive and naval environments, Visual Detectable (VD) components for inspection-critical applications, and vibration-damping parts for platform-mounted equipment. Elesa (UK) exhibited at DSEI 2025 to market these product lines directly to the defence and security sector.

## Products and solutions

- **ATEX-certified components** - IECEx/ATEX zone 1 and zone 21 certified control elements, knobs, and levers for explosive-atmosphere defence and offshore applications.
- **INOX stainless steel range** - AISI 303, 304, and 316L components for naval, offshore, and aerospace environments requiring corrosion resistance.
- **Visual Detectable (VD) components** - safety-oriented components designed for inspection visibility in defence and critical-industry applications.
- **Vibration-damping elements** - components for mobile and platform-mounted military and industrial equipment.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001:2015
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Ownership note

Elesa (UK) Ltd is a subsidiary of Elesa S.p.A., headquartered in Monza (Milan), Italy, founded 1941. The UK entity was established in 1991 with operational facilities at Metheringham, Lincolnshire.

## Recent news

- **2025-09** - Exhibited at DSEI 2025, ExCeL London (Stand N4-245), showcasing ATEX, INOX, VD, and vibration-damping components for defence applications. [source](https://www.elesa.com/en/CatalogoMediaServicesUK/news---1/elesa-uk-to-showcase-dsei-2025)
- **2025-10** - Confirmed exhibitor at Advanced Engineering 2025, NEC Birmingham. [source](https://www.advancedengineeringuk.com/exhibitor/elesa-uk-ltd/)

companies.body:
# Elite Electronic Systems Ltd

> Northern Ireland-based contract electronics manufacturer specialising in high-reliability PCB assembly, cable and harness assembly, and box-build for the aerospace and defence sector.

## What they do

Elite Electronic Systems is a contract electronics manufacturing services (EMS) provider focused on high-reliability and regulated markets, with aerospace and defence as a primary sector. The company offers PCB assembly, cable and harness assembly, high-level and box-build assembly, and control panels, serving OEMs from prototype and NPI through to production scale. It operates three UK manufacturing sites: Enniskillen (Northern Ireland), Livingston (Scotland), and Chesterfield (England), totalling approximately 150,000 sq ft of manufacturing space. The company is backed by private equity investor Lonsdale Capital Partners.

## Products and solutions

- **PCB assembly (PCBA)** - high-reliability surface-mount and through-hole assembly for aerospace, defence, medical, and industrial OEMs.
- **Cable and harness assembly** - from prototype to volume production for complex defence and aerospace wiring systems.
- **Box-build and systems integration** - high-level assembly including panel wiring, mechanical assembly, and functional test.
- **NPI and prototype services** - new product introduction support from design for manufacture through to first articles.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** JOSCAR
- **Accreditations:** AS9100D (all three sites; Livingston achieved AS9100D June 2026), ISO 9001:2015, ISO 13485:2016, ISO 27001:2022
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

- **2025-12** - Acquired Kingfield Electronics (Chesterfield), a high-reliability EMS provider with 40+ years in aerospace and defence. [source](https://www.lonsdalepartners.com/news/lonsdale-backed-elite-electronics-completes-bolt-on-acquisition-of-kingfield-electronics/)

companies.body:
# Elma Electronic UK

> UK subsidiary of the Swiss Elma Electronic group; designs and manufactures rugged chassis, backplanes, and embedded computing sub-systems for defence C5ISR, EW, and SIGINT applications.

## What they do

Elma Electronic UK Ltd is the British trading entity of the Elma Electronic group, headquartered in Switzerland, with over 35 years of experience in rugged embedded computing hardware for defence and aerospace. The Bedford-based UK operation supplies and supports chassis, backplane, and enclosure products deployed across Royal Navy submarines and surface ships, as well as land and air platforms. The company holds SC21 Bronze status and is an active ADS Group member. The wider Elma group operates across the USA, UK, Germany, Switzerland, and other regions.

## Products and solutions

- **Rugged VPX and OpenVPX chassis** - VITA 46/65, SOSA-aligned, CMOSS and HOST-compatible chassis for C5ISR and EW applications.
- **Backplanes and enclosures** - VME, CPCI, CPCI Serial, VNX+ backplane and sub-system designs for land, naval, and air platforms.
- **Custom embedded sub-systems** - configured and integrated computing systems for radar, SIGINT, and sensor processing.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

companies.name: Emberion Limited
companies.summary: Cambridge-based developer of colloidal quantum dot infrared sensors and cameras for surveillance, drone-based imaging, and defence ISR; acquired by French electro-optical company Exosens in April 2026.
companies.body:
# Emberion

> Cambridge-based developer of colloidal quantum dot infrared sensors and cameras for surveillance, drone-based imaging, and defence ISR; acquired by French electro-optical company Exosens in April 2026.

## What they do

Emberion Limited is a deep-technology sensor company that designs and manufactures shortwave infrared (SWIR) and broadband visible-to-thermal cameras using colloidal quantum dot technology and graphene transducers integrated with proprietary CMOS readout ICs. Founded in 2016 as a spinout from Nokia with R&D operations in Cambridge (UK) and Espoo (Finland), the company targets defence surveillance, portable imaging, and drone-based ISR markets. In April 2026 Emberion was acquired by Exosens (Nasdaq: EXOSENS), a French electro-optical group, to expand Exosens's defence and surveillance imaging portfolio. The Emberion brand and Cambridge operation remain active post-acquisition.

## Products and solutions

- **VS20 Vis-SWIR camera** - 400-2000 nm broadband camera combining visible and shortwave infrared in a single sensor, suited to night vision, surveillance, and laser range finding.
- **Ultra-wide band Vis-SWIR-Thermal sensors** - broad-spectrum sensors spanning visible, SWIR, and thermal bands for multi-domain ISR.
- **Graphene quantum dot transducers** - proprietary sensing element technology underpinning the product range; covered by 25 protected patent families worldwide.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2026-04-24** - Acquired by Exosens (Nasdaq: EXOSENS) to expand the group's defence and surveillance imaging portfolio, with specific focus on portable and drone-based imaging systems. [source](https://www.emberion.com/exosens-acquires-emberion/)

## Links

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/emberion

companies.body:
# EMI Seals & Gaskets Ltd

> UK manufacturer of custom sealing, shielding and thermal components for defence, aerospace, nuclear and space applications.

## What they do

EMI Seals & Gaskets Ltd designs and manufactures custom sealing and EMI/RF shielding components, including seals, gaskets, O-rings, bonded washers, thermal management products, foams, extrusions and mouldings. The company supplies the defence, aerospace, nuclear, space and industrial sectors, and holds a long-standing position in the UK defence supply chain with products embedded in named platforms including the BOXER Armoured Fighting Vehicle, Type 26 Frigate and nuclear submarine programmes.

## Products and solutions

- **EMI/RF shielding components** - custom shielded gaskets and seals for electromagnetic compatibility in defence and aerospace platforms.
- **Sealing solutions** - O-rings, bonded washers, moulded seals and extrusions for aerospace, nuclear and defence applications.
- **Thermal management products** - thermal interface materials and associated components for use in demanding environments.

# Eminent Crisis Management Group Ltd

> Security risk management, investigations and counter-terrorism training provider, delivering to government, legal and private sector clients worldwide.

## What they do

Eminent Crisis Management Group Ltd provides investigation, security risk management, intelligence and advisory services through two operating subsidiaries: Eminent Security Ltd and Eminent Investigations Ltd. The company serves government, legal, industry and private clients internationally, with an international presence in South Africa and the United States. Its training arm delivers Protect Duty and Active Threat courses delivered by former UK Special Forces personnel.

## Products and solutions

- **Security risk management and advisory** - risk assessment and advisory services for government and corporate clients.
- **Investigations** - business intelligence and investigations services; ranked by Chambers and Partners (2022, 2023) as one of the leading UK-wide Business Intelligence and Investigations practices.
- **Counter-terrorism and active threat training** - Protect Duty and Active Threat certified training delivered by former UK Special Forces-trained instructors.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 27001, Cyber Essentials Plus, CPD-certified training
- **Memberships:** ADS Group; Armed Forces Covenant signatory

# Enable Strategic Consulting Ltd

> Defence and public sector bid consultancy, specialising in capture management, Position-to-Win analysis and bid writing for suppliers to MOD and government.

## What they do

Enable Strategic Consulting Ltd provides business-to-government growth advisory services focused on the UK defence and public sector. The company works with suppliers seeking to win MOD and government contracts, offering capture management, Position-to-Win analysis, bid writing and bid team capability development. It has also published analysis on the impact of the Procurement Act on contract award evaluation and post-award processes.

## Products and solutions

- **Capture management and bid advisory** - structured support across the capture and bid lifecycle for defence and public sector suppliers, including SMEs.
- **Position-to-Win analysis** - competitive positioning analysis to improve bid win probability.
- **Bid team development** - training and process optimisation for in-house bid functions, including AI-assisted bid delivery.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group (listed under Defence Consultancy Services)

companies.name: Energetics Technology Ltd
companies.summary: Specialist energetics and pyrotechnics company designing, developing, testing and manufacturing explosive, propellant and blast protection products for defence and security customers.
companies.body:
# Energetics Technology Ltd

> Specialist energetics and pyrotechnics company designing, developing, testing and manufacturing explosive, propellant and blast protection products for defence and security customers.

## What they do

Energetics Technology Ltd (ETL) researches, develops and manufactures energetic materials products and blast mitigation equipment. Capability areas include high-explosive and pyrotechnic compositions, pyrotechnic payloads and actuators, rocket propellants, cable cutters, gas generators, igniters and delays, and IED-resistant containment and mitigation products. Customers include defence manufacturers, EOD teams, police and special forces. ETL is part of the Etienne Lacroix Group, a French defence and pyrotechnics group.

## Products and solutions

- **Pyrotechnic payloads and actuators** - designed for integration into ordnance and weapons systems.
- **Cable cutters** - electrically initiated cutters for braided steel, armoured cabling and fibre-optic lines.
- **Rocket propellants** - melt-castable, low-cost formulations designed for high-volume production.
- **Blast mitigation products** - IED isolation units, bomb-resistant litter bins and detonator containment units for use in public spaces and by EOD and police teams.
- **CIED training and EOD equipment** - training aids and equipment for counter-IED and explosive ordnance disposal roles.
- **40mm medium-velocity ammunition** - design and evaluation of medium-velocity ammunition for small arms and support weapons.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

## Links

- Website: https://www.energetics-technology.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/energetics-technology-ltd

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Sources: energetics-technology.com; ADS Group member listing https://www.adsgroup.org.uk/members/energetics-technology-ltd/; Companies House company number 07446614.

# Engage Technical Solutions

> Independent UK defence technical consultancy delivering logistics information systems support and programme management inside DE&S and the wider MoD supply chain.

## What they do

Engage Technical Solutions is a defence and security technical consultancy providing expert advice and support to the MoD and its supply chain. Its core specialisms are logistic information systems, engineering management across the CADMID cycle, and programme and portfolio management. The firm has been structured as an Employee Ownership Trust since March 2022. SIC code 84220 (Defence activities) on Companies House.

## Products and solutions

- **Information Systems and Services** - architecture, data analytics, service delivery management and requirements elicitation for UK Defence logistic IS, including MJDI, JAMES, LOGFAS, BIWMS+, DEEAMS and DFMS. The team holds ITIL qualifications and manages full service delivery lifecycles.
- **Engineering Management** - Integrated Logistic Support, safety and environmental engineering, and systems engineering across the CADMID cycle.
- **Programme, Project and Portfolio Management (P3M)** - lead Delivery Agent for DE&S Digital, including the Bridging the Gap (BtG) programme and the Defence Equipment Engineering Asset Management System (DEEAMS) project. Also supports the Business Modernisation for Support (BMfS) Programme.

companies.name: Entrust (Europe) Ltd
companies.summary: UK and European entity of Entrust Corporation, providing digital identity, PKI, hardware security modules and border-control technology to government and defence-adjacent customers.
companies.body:
# Entrust (Europe)

> UK and European entity of Entrust Corporation, providing digital identity, PKI, hardware security modules and border-control technology to government and defence-adjacent customers.

## What they do

Entrust (Europe) Ltd is the UK and European legal entity of Entrust Corporation, a US-headquartered digital security company. Through this entity the Entrust portfolio is delivered to UK government, financial services, and critical national infrastructure customers. The UK product footprint includes hardware security modules, PKI and certificate lifecycle management, AI-powered identity verification, and government credential and travel-document issuance platforms. The registered UK office is in London; principal operational presence is in Reading.

## Products and solutions

- **nShield Hardware Security Modules** - physical cryptographic devices certified to FIPS 140-3 Level 3 and Common Criteria EAL4+, used to protect PKI, encryption keys and classified infrastructure. Acquired from Thales (nCipher) in 2019.
- **PKI and certificate lifecycle management** - TLS/SSL, code signing and document signing certificates and management platforms.
- **Digital identity verification** - AI-powered biometric IDV and document verification, expanded through the acquisition of Onfido in April 2024.
- **Government credential and border-control solutions** - ePassport and national identity card issuance, biometric smart corridors, eGates, and the Electronic Travel Authorisation platform deployed for the UK Home Office.
- **Identity and access management** - enterprise authentication, MFA and zero-trust enablement.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO/IEC 27001:2022 (Entrust Corporation organisation-wide); nShield HSMs certified to FIPS 140-3 Level 3 and Common Criteria EAL4+.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2026-01** - UK ETA and eVisa milestones reported; 19.6 million ETAs and 2.2 million visas issued since October 2023, with biometric algorithms reducing manual verifications by over 50%. [source](https://www.biometricupdate.com/202601/uk-eta-evisa-milestones-position-entrust-to-expand-citizen-identity-footprint)
- **2025-07** - Entrust received the US Midsize Investment in the UK award at the Transatlantic Growth Awards 2025. [source](https://www.entrust.com/company/newsroom/entrust-receives-tag-award)

## Links

- Website: https://www.entrust.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/entrust

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Entrust corporate website (entrust.com), ADS Group member profile, Companies House (03403634), ICO data controller register (Z1987264), UK Home Office ETA case study and press release (entrust.com), Biometric Update, Wikipedia (Entrust). Entrust (Europe) Ltd is the UK/European subsidiary of Entrust Corporation (Shakopee, Minnesota, USA; private). The registered office is 9 Devonshire Square, London; operational UK office at Abbey Gardens, Reading.

companies.body:
# Entrust Security Solutions UK

> UK operating subsidiary of Entrust Corporation, with roots in the Datacard physical credential issuance business, supplying secure card and document issuance systems, encryption hardware and identity infrastructure to government and defence-adjacent customers.

## What they do

Entrust Security Solutions UK Ltd is a UK-registered operating subsidiary of Entrust Corporation, a US-headquartered digital security company. The entity traces its lineage to Datacard Corporation (founded 1969), which was acquired by Entrust Inc. to form Entrust Datacard in 2013 and rebranded as Entrust in 2020; the UK entity was renamed to its current form in 2021. It sits within the Entrust portfolio alongside Entrust (Europe) Ltd, which holds the European software and services activity. The SIC code is 46520 (wholesale of electronic and telecommunications equipment). The registered office is at 9 Devonshire Square, London.

## Products and solutions

- **Card and credential issuance systems** - hardware and software platforms for printing and personalising government identity cards, military credentials, smart cards and passports. Rooted in the Datacard card-printing heritage.
- **nShield Hardware Security Modules** - FIPS 140-3 Level 3 and Common Criteria EAL4+ certified cryptographic devices for key management and PKI, shared across the Entrust group following the nCipher acquisition from Thales in 2019.
- **ePassport and national identity document infrastructure** - secure credential issuance platforms used by governments for travel documents and national ID schemes.
- **PKI and encryption** - certificate lifecycle management and encryption infrastructure.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO/IEC 27001:2022 (Entrust Corporation organisation-wide); nShield HSMs certified to FIPS 140-3 Level 3 and Common Criteria EAL4+.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2026-01** - UK ETA and eVisa milestones reported across the Entrust group; 19.6 million ETAs and 2.2 million visas issued since October 2023. [source](https://www.biometricupdate.com/202601/uk-eta-evisa-milestones-position-entrust-to-expand-citizen-identity-footprint)
- **2025-07** - Entrust announced CEO succession: Tony Ball to succeed Todd Wilkinson, effective 31 March 2026. [source](https://www.entrust.com/company/newsroom/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.entrust.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/entrust

Entrust corporate website (entrust.com), ADS Group member profile (adsgroup.org.uk/members/entrust-security-solutions-uk-ltd-1/), Companies House (03056930), open.endole.co.uk, Wikipedia (Entrust), Secure ID News (rebrand reporting), Cambridge Network (nCipher/Entrust announcement), Biometric Update. Entrust Security Solutions UK Ltd is a UK subsidiary of Entrust Corporation (Shakopee, Minnesota, USA; private). Incorporated 1995 as Glanco (34) Ltd, renamed Data Card 1995 Ltd, then Data Card Ltd, then current name in 2021.

companies.name: Environmental Defence Systems Limited
companies.summary: Huddersfield manufacturer of blast protection, explosive ordnance disposal support equipment and aviation fire containment products, serving the British MoD, EOD departments and commercial aviation operators worldwide.
companies.body:
# Environmental Defence Systems

> Huddersfield manufacturer of blast protection, explosive ordnance disposal support equipment and aviation fire containment products, serving the British MoD, EOD departments and commercial aviation operators worldwide.

## What they do

Environmental Defence Systems Limited, trading as EDS Limited, invents, manufactures and supplies protective products used by military forces, emergency services and commercial aviation operators. Its BlastSax product is in active service with the British MoD and EOD departments; its AvSax product has become the world's best-selling aviation lithium battery fire containment bag. The company holds ADS Group and Counter EO UK membership.

## Products and solutions

- **BlastSax** - sandless sandbags that absorb water to form a blast and fragmentation protection barrier. Deployed by the British MoD and EOD departments, and used by police forces worldwide to contain small explosive devices during detonation, including two World War Two bombs disposed of by Hong Kong Police.
- **AvSax** - fire containment bags for in-flight lithium battery emergencies. Carried on more than 15,373 aircraft operated by 80 airlines. Winner of the Queen's Award for Enterprise (Innovation) in 2018.
- **FloodSax** - alternative sandbags for civil flood protection and liquid spill absorption.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group; Counter EO UK (listed under Personal Protection Equipment).

## Links

- Website: https://edslimited.co.uk

# Envitia

> UK geospatial and data software and services firm serving defence, national security and central government.

## What they do

Envitia is an IT services and consulting company specialising in complex data challenges. Its consultancy and technical engineering teams deliver data solutions that enable defence, national security and central government customers to make better decisions. Stated specialties include software engineering, mapping and geospatial, data modelling, data quality, data governance, analytics, and AI and machine learning. The operating entity is Envitia Ltd, under holding company Envitia Group Limited.

## Products and solutions

- **MapLink Pro** - a cross-platform suite of geospatial software development toolkits used as a foundation for command and control, ISR, situational awareness, and training and simulation applications. MapLink Pro 11 was released in 2025. Publicly named integrators include BAE Systems, Lockheed Martin, Northrop Grumman, General Dynamics and IBM.
- **Data Discovery Platform (DDP)** - a modular geospatial data discovery, cataloguing and processing platform with open-standards APIs to discover, harvest, transform and visualise data, used in UK and US military systems.
- **Service lines** - AI and machine learning, architecture, cloud services, data analytics and visualisation, data quality and management, digital and data strategy, geospatial, and software engineering.

## What they do

EP90 Group operates across three practices: security and intelligence, automotive cyber security, and mobile telecoms. Its founders bring backgrounds in UK government interception agencies and complex security investigations, and its client portfolio spans military, policing, government, and adjacent industries. # Epiq Design Solutions UK

> Commercial off-the-shelf software-defined radio platforms for electronic warfare, signals intelligence, and counter-UAS applications.

## What they do

Epiq Design Solutions is the UK subsidiary of Epiq Solutions Inc., a US defence-technology company founded in 2009 with heritage from the former radio division of G3 Technologies. The company designs and manufactures COTS software-defined radio transceivers and rugged embedded computing platforms for RF sensing, signal processing, electronic warfare, and uncrewed platform payloads. The UK entity, registered in February 2023, serves as the company's UK and European market presence. The parent holds a portfolio of SDR product families addressing SWaP-constrained defence mission requirements, electronic attack, spectrum awareness, direction finding, and signals intelligence.

## Products and solutions

- **Matchstiq Z4** - Compact SDR transceiver targeting small uncrewed platform payloads, electronic attack and jamming, and counter-UAS applications; announced January 2026.
- **Matchstiq X40** - SDR platform combining Analog Devices AD9084 MxFE with AMD Versal Adaptive SoC, supporting up to 2 GHz instantaneous bandwidth for AI/ML applications at the RF edge.
- **Matchstiq V40** - High-bandwidth SDR variant for advanced signal processing.
- **SOSA/MOSA-aligned VPX solutions** - Open-architecture embedded computing for defence integration.
- Spectrum awareness, signal classification, direction finding, and geolocation software.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

companies.summary: Electric motors, hybrid starter-generators, and power management systems for defence uncrewed aerial, ground, and maritime platforms.
companies.body:
# ePropelled

> Electric motors, hybrid starter-generators, and power management systems for defence uncrewed aerial, ground, and maritime platforms.

## What they do

ePropelled designs and manufactures high-performance electric motors, hybrid starter-generators, electronic speed controllers, and intelligent power management systems for uncrewed platforms in defence and allied applications. The company holds 36 patents in advanced magnetics, electric drive, and energy management. The UK entity, originally ElectronicaUK Ltd (incorporated 1998 and acquired by ePropelled in 2018), operates from a Global Innovation Centre in Coventry opened in March 2026, targeting production of one million propulsion systems annually by 2027. The US parent is headquartered in Laconia, New Hampshire, with additional R&D and operations in Chennai, India.

## Products and solutions

- **Sparrow Series** - Brushless motors from micro-class (APM 1404) to 7,000W for small tactical UAVs, loitering munitions, and ISR drones.
- **Falcon Series** - Higher-power motors up to 10 kW (iAPM600) for larger uncrewed aerial platforms.
- **Hercules Series** - Hybrid starter-generators up to 14 kW for hybrid-electric propulsion architectures; supports mission ranges over 1,000 km and heavy-fuel (jet-fuel-compatible) configurations for military UAV applications.
- **ePConnect** - Onboard service manager and telemetry platform for real-time monitoring, control, and analytics on uncrewed platforms.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group; ARPAS-UK

## Recent news

- **2026-03** - Global Innovation Centre opened in Coventry, targeting 1 million propulsion systems annually by 2027. [source](https://dronelife.com/2026/03/23/epropelled-opens-uk-hub-to-scale-uav-propulsion/)
- **2026-03** - Largest expansion of electronic speed controllers and intelligent power systems announced. [source](https://dronelife.com/2026/03/05/epropelled-esc-intelligent-power-systems-expansion/)
- **2026-01** - Strategic partnership with Hirth Engines to develop hybrid UAV propulsion combining Hirth two-stroke engines with ePropelled starter-generators for heavy-fuel military UAV applications. [source](https://dronelife.com/2026/01/13/hirth-engines-epropelled-partner-for-hybrid-uav-power-systems/)
- **2025-12** - Sparrow motor line expanded specifically for mission-critical defence UAVs. [source](https://dronelife.com/2025/12/09/epropelled-expands-sparrow-motor-line-for-mission-critical-defense-uavs/)
- **2025-08** - US manufacturing expansion to meet rising demand for drone components. [source](https://dronelife.com/2025/08/22/epropelled-expands-u-s-manufacturing-to-meet-rising-demand-for-drone-components/)

## Links

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/epropelled

Escend has over 22 years of expertise in cyber security, data protection, and governance, risk and compliance (GRC). The company delivers consultancy services to clients across defence, space and government, with a stated focus on enhancing security frameworks and implementing advanced cybersecurity protocols to safeguard critical assets. companies.body:
# ESET UK

> Global cybersecurity company with a dedicated defence, military and government tier and a UK office in Bournemouth.

## What they do

ESET is a Slovak-headquartered cybersecurity company, founded in 1992, with a UK entity (ESET Software UK Limited) based in Bournemouth since 2004. The UK office is ESET's regional head sales office. The company provides endpoint protection, managed detection and response (MDR), extended detection and response (XDR), and threat intelligence products to home, SME, enterprise and public-sector clients. ESET PRIVATE, launched globally in 2026, is a dedicated tier for defence organisations, military, government agencies and critical national infrastructure operators, supporting air-gapped, on-premise and restricted-bandwidth environments.

## Products and solutions

- **ESET PRIVATE** - custom-engineered security solutions for defence, military, government and CNI clients; supports air-gapped and fully isolated deployments.
- **ESET PROTECT** - XDR platform for extended detection and response across endpoints, cloud and network; ranked in G2 Winter 2026 XDR Report.
- **Threat Intelligence** - ESET is recognised as a leading publisher of APT research, particularly on state-sponsored groups targeting critical infrastructure in Europe.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ECSO "Cybersecurity Made in Europe" label; VB100 (100+ awards)
- **Memberships:** ADS Group; NATO Strategic Partnership (formalised May 2026)

[source](https://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2026/05/27/3302178/0/en/eset-enters-a-strategic-partnership-with-nato-alongside-leading-industry-partners.html)

companies.body:
# Esoteric

> Counter-espionage and Technical Surveillance Countermeasures (TSCM) specialist serving defence, government and high-profile clients; a wholly-owned subsidiary of Mitie since November 2021.

## What they do

Esoteric is a specialist counter-espionage and TSCM company with over 20 years of experience, founded in 1998 and now operating within Mitie Intelligence Services. The company provides TSCM sweeps (bug detection and electronic surveillance countermeasures), RF-shielded room installation, cyber TSCM, physical security penetration testing, insider threat services and accredited covert surveillance training. Esoteric's engineers are drawn exclusively from government agency or military backgrounds and cleared to the highest government security levels. The company serves defence, transportation, financial, pharmaceutical and government clients.

## Products and solutions

- **TSCM (Technical Surveillance Countermeasures)** - detection and removal of covert listening devices and electronic surveillance threats.
- **TRAICE** - integrated offering spanning TSCM, Risk Assurance, Insider Threat and Counter-Espionage.
- **Cyber TSCM and penetration testing** - technical assessment of cyber and physical security posture.
- **Covert surveillance training** - accredited courses for government and law enforcement personnel.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001 (NSI-approved); ISO 27001 (BSI-certified); Cyber Essentials Plus (IASME-certified); NSI accreditation for electronic sweeping and covert investigations; BS 7858:2019 (all staff)
- **Memberships:** ADS Group

# Espanaro

> Veteran-founded defence engineering consultancy specialising in autonomous system security, C5I architecture and the Consilium command orchestration platform.

## What they do

Espanaro is a systems engineering and software engineering company based in Newtown, Wales, incorporated in 2020 and founded by a veteran-led team with backgrounds in mathematics, theoretical physics and computer science. The company delivers systems integration and secure engineering solutions to the UK defence sector, with stated clients including the Ministry of Defence, Defence Science and Technology Laboratory (Dstl) and the Nuclear Decommissioning Authority (NDA). Capability areas include autonomous system security, life-critical systems security, data-centric security, cyber security and C5I solutions and architectures.

## Products and solutions

- **Consilium** - automated technology policy management system providing decision support and command orchestration, integrating cameras, fixed sensors, autonomous drones and UGVs into a sense-reason-decide-effect capability. Deployed on a 12-month T&E programme for a UK Government CNI client and completed final acceptance testing with the NDA.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

[source](https://www.border-security-report.com/espanaro-demonstrates-autonomous-multi-system-orchestration-for-remote-monitoring/)

# ESRI (UK) Limited

> UK distributor and services partner for Esri's ArcGIS platform, and the MOD's Strategic Geospatial Partner.

## What they do

Esri UK provides geographic information system (GIS) software, location intelligence and mapping services to public sector, defence and commercial customers across the United Kingdom. It is the authorised distributor and services arm of Esri Inc (US parent) in the UK and Ireland. The company holds a long-standing strategic relationship with the UK Ministry of Defence, most recently confirmed under a £46 million enterprise agreement covering the full suite of ArcGIS products across the MOD's information architecture, including land, maritime and air domains.

## Products and solutions

- **ArcGIS platform** - full suite of Esri GIS products covering field operations, mapping, data science, imagery, situational awareness and data collection across MOD domains.
- **Defence and National Security services** - professional services, integration and support for defence customers including battle management, ISR, air operations and maritime operations use cases.
- **Strategic Geospatial Partnership** - managed GIS technology access, licencing and support under the MOD enterprise agreement, enabling location-based intelligence and digital transformation across the Armed Forces.

# ESS - Compass Contract Services (UK)

> Defence and government soft facilities management provider, delivering catering, cleaning and support services to over 250 UK military establishments.

## What they do

ESS is the defence, government and offshore division of Compass Group UK and Ireland. It provides catering, cleaning and a broad range of soft facilities management services to the UK Armed Forces, government agencies, and critical national infrastructure sites. ESS has served the UK defence estate for over 40 years and supports Army, Royal Navy, Royal Marines, RAF and Strategic Command establishments, as well as the Defence Training Estate and a number of private finance initiative sites.

## Products and solutions

- **Defence catering** - food service operations across more than 250 military establishments, delivering over 16.5 million meals annually including range packed meals and operational ration support.
