# Hypermotive

> UK specialist in electrical systems for electrification, hybrid and hydrogen platforms across defence, automotive, motorsport and aerospace.

## What they do

Hypermotive designs and manufactures high-performance electrical systems for battery-electric, fuel-cell and hydrogen platforms, working since 2016 across automotive, defence, motorsport and aerospace. Its products include low and high voltage wiring harnesses, power distribution units, DC-DC converters and EMC/EMI filters. The company operates a manufacturing facility in Northampton optimised for low to medium volume production. In defence it is active in land vehicle electrification and in subsea applications including uncrewed surface vehicles.

## Products and solutions

- **Wiring harnesses** - low and high voltage harnesses for electrified platforms.
- **Power Distribution Units (PDU)** - power distribution for electric and hybrid systems.
- **DC-DC converters** - voltage conversion for electrified platforms.
- **EMC/EMI filters** - electromagnetic compatibility and interference filtering.

## Recent news

## What they do

i3Secure is a cyber security and information assurance consultancy working to protect the confidentiality, integrity and availability of information and data across the defence, public and private sectors. Its consultants design, develop and implement information security management systems to recognised frameworks and guide organisations to certification. The company signed the Armed Forces Covenant on 3 November 2021.

companies.name: iCOMAT
companies.summary: Bristol composites manufacturer whose Rapid Tow Shearing technology steers fibres without defects for aerospace, defence and automotive parts.
companies.body:
# iCOMAT

> Bristol composites manufacturer whose Rapid Tow Shearing technology steers fibres without defects for aerospace, defence and automotive parts.

## What they do

iCOMAT is a manufacturer of advanced composite components for the aerospace, defence and automotive industries. It spun out of the University of Bristol in 2019 to industrialise its proprietary Rapid Tow Shearing (RTS) process, which steers composite fibres without defects to enable lighter, optimised structures at high production rate. The company operates a production facility, Factory One, and has been building a further automated facility in Gloucester.

## Products and solutions

- **Rapid Tow Shearing (RTS)** - proprietary fibre-steering process using in-plane shearing rather than bending, enabling defect-free curved fibre paths for optimised composite parts.
- **Advanced composite components** - turnkey supply from tooling to finished parts for aerospace, defence and automotive customers.

## Recent news

- **2024-06** - iCOMAT raised $22.5 million (over £17.5 million) in a Series A round co-led by 8VC and the NATO Innovation Fund, with Syensqo Ventures and Velocity Partners participating. It was the NATO Innovation Fund's first publicly announced investment. [PR Newswire](https://www.prnewswire.co.uk/news-releases/icomat-raises-22-5m-financing-led-by-8vc-and-nato-innovation-fund-to-automate-composites-manufacturing-302164253.html)

## Links

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/icomat

# Igence Software

> UK supplier of bespoke software and systems engineering to defence, aerospace, maritime and radar sectors.

## What they do

Igence Software is a UK supplier of bespoke software and systems engineering, primarily to defence, aerospace, maritime, radar and adjacent industrial sectors. It delivers custom software for proof of concept, bid support, emulators and simulators, prototypes and demonstrators, control systems and systems integration, and also offers associate and contract engineers. The company has delivered defence software since 1999, citing over 200 defence-related projects with the Armed Services and major defence primes.

## Products and solutions

- **Igence Radar** - radar product and capability (separate site igenceradar.com).
- **Autonomy and autonomous systems** - including autonomous maritime work, such as the BAE Systems P38 Nautomate project.
- **Bespoke software engineering** - control systems, remote ground station control, simulation and training systems, and mapping and GIS systems.
- **Associate Contract Engineers** - supply of engineering contractors to defence and industry.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** Delivered on the MOD DART-accredited DISX network to OFFICIAL (including SENSITIVE). Previously held List X certification.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2025-01-17** - Exhibited and engaged at DSEI 2025. [source](https://www.igence.com/)
- **2024-07-03** - Igence autonomy team featured in coverage of the BAE Systems P38 Nautomate autonomous maritime project. [source](https://www.igence.com/news)

## Links

- Website: https://www.igence.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/igence-ltd.

companies.name: Igne UXO Ltd
companies.summary: UK provider of unexploded ordnance survey, risk assessment and clearance services, formerly BACTEC.
companies.body:
# Igne UXO

> UK provider of unexploded ordnance survey, risk assessment and clearance services, formerly BACTEC.

## What they do

Igne UXO Ltd is the unexploded ordnance arm of Igne, a UK subsurface services group formed in 2023 by consolidating several specialist businesses. The UXO business, formerly BACTEC, specialises in unexploded ordnance risk mitigation and explosive ordnance disposal, with land and marine coverage and a nationwide geospatial UXO risk database. It is one of the few UK contractors licensed to acquire and keep ordnance.

## Products and solutions

- **UXO risk assessments** - desk-study preliminary risk assessments using a nationwide UXO risk database, structured to CIRIA C681 guidance.
- **UXO surveys** - non-intrusive, intrusive and drone-borne magnetometer surveys to detect ferrous anomalies.
- **EOD services** - explosive ordnance disposal: search, clearance, disposal and on-site watching briefs.
- **Marine UXO** - offshore, inshore and nearshore UXO and chemical-munition risk mitigation for renewables, cabling and port operators.
- **UXO training** - CPD-accredited UXO safety training and toolbox talks.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 45001, PAS 2080:2023, UKAS-accredited testing.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group, British Drilling Association, plus industry schemes including Constructionline Gold, CHAS and RISQS.

## Recent news

- **2025-10-03** - Launched a new interactive UXO Risk Map for developers, planners and consultants. [source](https://www.igne.com/news/uxo-risk-map-launch)
- **2025-09-11** - Achieved PAS 2080 carbon management certification from BSI. [source](https://www.igne.com/news/pas-2080)
- **2025-04-11** - Published a piece on the UXO unit's lineage from BACTEC to Igne. [source](https://www.igne.com/news/from-bactec-to-igne2)

## Links

- Website: https://www.igne.com/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/ignegroup

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Igne website, LinkedIn company page, ADS members directory (adsgroup.org.uk/members/igne-uxo-ltd-1), Companies House (Igne UXO Ltd 14747649; Igne Group Ltd 14740656).

companies.name: Inova Design Solutions Ltd (trading as Bodytrak)
companies.summary: In-ear wearable that provides real-time physiological monitoring, including core body temperature and heart rate, for workplace and operational safety.
companies.body:
# Inova Design Solutions Ltd (trading as Bodytrak)

> In-ear wearable that provides real-time physiological monitoring, including core body temperature and heart rate, for workplace and operational safety.

## What they do

Bodytrak is a wearable safety solution built around an in-ear earpiece with multiple sensors that capture real-time physiological data, analysed by AI on the device and in the cloud. The ear's proximity to the hypothalamus allows the device to measure core body temperature and heart rate, with reported mean absolute error of 0.18C against the gastro-intestinal pill at elevated temperatures. The company markets the solution across industrial, emergency services, defence and scientific or research sectors.

## Products and solutions

- **Bodytrak 1** - in-ear wearable for real-time physiological monitoring.
- **Bodytrak 1 IS** - intrinsically safe variant for hazardous environments.
- **Smart Safety Solution** - platform covering heat stress monitoring, fatigue monitoring, lone worker safety, musculoskeletal disorder prevention, geolocation and geofencing, alerts and automated reporting.

## Recent news

- **2025-03-25** - Joint Administrators appointed to Inova Design Solutions Ltd (trading as Bodytrak); the company entered administration. [source](https://bodytrak.co/legal-information/)
- **2022-05** - Lakeland Industries extended its strategic investment in Inova Design Solutions to GBP 3.5 million. [source](https://www.setsquared.co.uk/inova-design-solutions-t-a-bodytrak-secures-an-additional-1-5-million-investment-from-lakeland-industries/)

## Links

- Website: https://bodytrak.co
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/bodytrak

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website, Companies House (07513025, insolvency proceedings), SETsquared, public investment announcements.

# Ionic Technologies International Ltd

> Rare earth element processing company producing separated, high-purity rare earths from recycled permanent magnets, supporting domestic supply chains for defence and advanced manufacturing.

## What they do

Ionic Technologies has developed a long-loop process for recycling end-of-life rare earth permanent magnets to produce high-purity, separated rare earth elements including Dysprosium and Terbium. companies.summary: Software-first precision manufacturing company reshoring component production for aerospace, defence and energy.
companies.body:
# Isembard

> Software-first precision manufacturing company reshoring component production for aerospace, defence and energy.

## What they do

Isembard is a software-first precision manufacturing company that produces high-precision metal components and assemblies for critical industries including aerospace, defence and energy. It operates a network of its own and franchised factories run on its proprietary AI-driven platform, MasonOS, using advanced CNC machining and automation to move customers quickly from prototype to production. Its stated mission is to reshore and rebuild Western industrial manufacturing capacity, with plans to scale its factory footprint across the UK and into Europe.

## Products and solutions

- **MasonOS** - proprietary AI-driven software platform that runs and standardises its factories.
- **Precision manufacturing** - high-precision CNC machining, metal part production and repair.
- **Distributed factory network** - a model combining owned and franchised factories for rapid prototype-to-production manufacturing.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** AS9100, ISO 9001, ITAR registration, Cyber Essentials.
- **Memberships:** JOSCAR registered.

## Recent news

- **2026-03-09** - Raised a $50m Series A led by Union Square Ventures to open 25 AI-powered factories serving aerospace and defence. [source](https://tech.eu/2026/03/09/uk-manufacturing-startup-isembard-secures-50m/)
- **2025-04-24** - Raised a $9m (£7m) seed round led by Notion Capital to reshore manufacturing for critical industries. [source](https://techcrunch.com/2025/04/24/british-startup-isembard-lands-9m-to-reshore-manufacturing-for-critical-industries/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.isembard.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/isembard

## Sources

companies.name: JET Connectivity
companies.summary: UK developer of secure sovereign 5G mesh networks delivered on floating buoy platforms for maritime and remote environments.
companies.body:
# JET Connectivity

> UK developer of secure sovereign 5G mesh networks delivered on floating buoy platforms for maritime and remote environments.

## What they do

JET Connectivity delivers secure 5G/6G mesh networks with integrated backhaul and positioning, navigation and timing capabilities for maritime and expeditionary environments. The company, spun out from JET Engineering in 2020 and trading under the JET Connectivity name from October 2022, has built its own hardware and software stack. It positions its sovereign networks as land and sea-based alternatives to satellite services for offshore, coastal and remote sites.

## Products and solutions

- **5G connectivity buoys** - floating buoy platforms hosting bespoke 5G networks, sharing coverage between buoys and relaying data to shore.
- **Pop-up 5G IAB mesh** - secure mesh capability designed for littoral, offshore and remote environments, including GPS-denied conditions.
- **Platform range** - a compact buoy for rivers and coastal areas, a mid-size platform for wider maritime zones, and an offshore station for year-round connectivity miles from shore, with onboard sensors collecting sea state, weather and video data.

## Recent news

- **2026-04** - JET Connectivity raised a £1.2m Pre-Series A round led by TRICAPITAL Angels, with The FSE Group and private investors, to scale its sovereign 5G systems through 2026. [source](https://tricapital.co.uk/tricapital-angels-leads-1-2m-investment-into-sovereign-dual-use-5g-solutions/)

## Links

- Website: https://jet-eng.co.uk
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/jet-connectivity

> London-listed digital technology company delivering software, data and AI services to public sector, defence and healthcare.

## What they do

Kainos Group plc is a digital technology company headquartered in Belfast, Northern Ireland, listed on the London Stock Exchange (LSE: KNOS) and a constituent of the FTSE 250. Founded in 1986 as a joint venture between Fujitsu and Queen's University Belfast's business incubation unit, it develops information technology for businesses and organisations. ## What they do

Kraken Technology Group is a UK company applying precision design and advanced engineering to the performance marine market, with a focus on uncrewed surface vessels. It develops cost-effective, open-architecture USVs for surveillance, force protection and multi-domain operations. The company is based in Fareham, Hampshire.

> AIM-listed developer of radiation and biological threat detection technology based on cadmium zinc telluride sensors.

## What they do

Kromek Group supplies and develops radiation detection solutions based on cadmium zinc telluride (CZT) and other materials, for the medical imaging, civil nuclear, security screening and homeland security markets. It also works with OEMs, governments and other agencies to design and build new solutions. The company is headquartered at NETPark in Sedgefield, County Durham, and operates across two continents.

companies.summary: Ukrainian developer and manufacturer of electronic warfare, SIGINT and counter-UAS systems.
companies.body:
# Kvertus

> Ukrainian developer and manufacturer of electronic warfare, SIGINT and counter-UAS systems.

## What they do

Kvertus is a Ukrainian product company specialising in the development and manufacture of signals intelligence and electronic warfare systems designed for UAV detection and suppression. Its products are in service with the Ministry of Defence of Ukraine and are codified to NATO standards. Since the start of the full-scale invasion the company has manufactured over 20,000 EW units deployed across the Ukrainian Defence Forces.

## Products and solutions

- **Atlas** - integrated SIGINT and electronic warfare complex; detects fixed-wing UAVs to around 115 km and neutralises targets to around 30 km. Basis of the "anti-drone wall" concept developed with Brave1.
- **AD Berserk** - mobile EW system on a ground robotic platform; entered serial production July 2025.
- **AD Cerberus** - modular vehicle-mounted EW system protecting vehicles from radio-controlled UAVs.
- **AD Counter FPV** - single-band FPV-drone jammers, including a backpack variant.
- **AD G-6+** - handheld anti-drone jamming gun.
- **MS Azimuth and Aero Azimuth** - electronic intelligence systems locating enemy drone crews, including an airborne variant.
- **LTEJ Mirage** - next-generation EW system presented May 2025.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** products codified to NATO standards and in service with the Ukrainian Ministry of Defence.
- **Memberships:** National Defence Industry Association of Ukraine (NAUDI).

## Recent news

- **2025-07-28** - New AD Berserk robotic EW platform enters production. [source](https://thedefensepost.com/2025/07/25/ukrainian-firm-robotic-vehicle/)
- **2025-07-10** - Atlas system linking thousands of EW units against drones unveiled. [source](https://thedefensepost.com/2025/07/10/ukraine-system-ew-drones/)

## Links

- Website: https://kvertus.ua/en/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/kvertus

## What they do

Since 2019 L7 has built combat training simulators for the Armed Forces of Ukraine, the National Guard of Ukraine and other security forces. The company develops the full simulator development cycle, from concept and software through to physical modelling of combat scenarios. Using laser and VR technologies it simulates a range of combat scenarios in mobile, compact systems deployable at unit locations. The brand was renamed from PSS by Logics7 to L7 Simulators in June 2025.

## Products and solutions

- **LT Laser Simulator** - laser-based live firing simulator.
- **Complex UNITS VR** - VR training complex.
- **Vartovyi (Watchmen)** - training simulator for interceptor drone crews; interface mimics standard ground control stations.

- **Citadele** - multimedia classroom training system.

companies.summary: Italian aerospace, defence and security prime with a large UK presence across helicopters and defence electronics.
companies.body:
# Leonardo S.p.A.

> Italian aerospace, defence and security prime with a large UK presence across helicopters and defence electronics.

## What they do

Leonardo is an Italian multinational specialising in aerospace, defence and security, headquartered in Rome and operating across some 180 sites worldwide. It designs, builds and supports military and civil helicopters, defence electronics, sensors, cyber and security systems, and works across the air, land, sea, space and cyber domains. The company is listed on the Borsa Italiana. In the UK it is one of the largest suppliers of defence and security equipment to the Ministry of Defence, with the British arm Leonardo UK Ltd headquartered at 1 Eagle Place, London, and major sites at Yeovil, Edinburgh and Luton.

## Products and solutions

- **Helicopters** - design, manufacture and support of military and civil rotorcraft at Yeovil, including the AW149, AW159 Wildcat and AW101 Merlin.
- **Defence electronics** - airborne, land and naval sensors, radars, electronic warfare and electro-optic systems; the UK business is a leading manufacturer of sensors and electronic systems for advanced aircraft.
- **Cyber and security** - secure communications, cyber resilience and security solutions.
- **Counter-drone and laser systems** - counter-UAS technology, military communications, lasers, satellite communications and navigation.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group member.

## Recent news

- **2026-03-23** - The UK Ministry of Defence signed a contract worth around 1 billion pounds for the New Medium Helicopter, under which Leonardo will build and deliver 23 AW149 helicopters at Yeovil, sustaining around 3,300 jobs at the site. [source](https://aviationweek.com/defense/aircraft-propulsion/uk-leonardo-sign-new-medium-helicopter-contract)
- **2026-02-25** - Reporting confirmed the UK was set to finalise the long-awaited Leonardo helicopter factory contract after government funding delays. [source](https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-02-25/uk-set-to-announce-leonardo-helicopter-contract-in-coming-days)

## Links

- Website: https://www.leonardo.com/en/home
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/leonardo_company

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website (leonardo.com and uk.leonardo.com), LinkedIn company page, Aviation Week, Bloomberg, Forces News. Companies House (Leonardo UK Ltd, company number 02426132, incorporated 25 September 1989; registered office 1 Eagle Place, St James's, London SW1Y 6AF). Global HQ Rome, Italy; formed 1948 (origins as Finmeccanica, renamed Leonardo in 2016); listed on Borsa Italiana. Global headcount approximately 60,000 per public figures; UK headcount around 8,400.

companies.name: Lobster Robotics
companies.summary: Dutch developer of autonomous underwater drones that produce high-resolution optical maps of the seabed.
companies.body:
# Lobster Robotics

> Dutch developer of autonomous underwater drones that produce high-resolution optical maps of the seabed.

## What they do

Lobster Robotics designs, manufactures and operates fully integrated autonomous underwater drones. A TU Delft spin-out based at RoboHouse in Delft, the company specialises in automated subsea photogrammetry, combining large numbers of seabed photographs into a single high-resolution, georeferenced optical map, an approach distinct from sonar-based survey. It both sells and rents its platforms and runs them as a survey and inspection service for offshore wind, cable and pipeline, scientific and defence customers.

## Products and solutions

- **Scout** - autonomous underwater vehicle that combines manual control with autonomy, operating in murky water, over uneven terrain and in strong currents at depths from around 2 m to 300 m, producing sharp georeferenced optical models of the seabed.
- **Scout 3** - latest generation, unveiled in 2025, surveying large areas per hour at high resolution from a small deployment footprint.
- **Militarised Scout variant** - a defence-specific version under development for the Royal Netherlands Navy to detect, identify and classify seabed objects, mine-like threats and damage to underwater infrastructure.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

companies.name: Lockheed Martin Corporation
companies.summary: Global US aerospace and defence prime spanning air, space, missiles and rotary systems, with established UK operations.
companies.body:
# Lockheed Martin Corporation

> Global US aerospace and defence prime spanning air, space, missiles and rotary systems, with established UK operations.

## What they do

Lockheed Martin is a global aerospace, defence, arms, security and advanced technologies company, formed in 1995 from the merger of Lockheed Corporation and Martin Marietta. It develops and manufactures combat aircraft, missiles and fire control systems, space and satellite systems, rotary and mission systems, and is one of the largest contractors to the US federal government. It is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under ticker LMT, headquartered in Bethesda, Maryland. UK operations run through Lockheed Martin UK Limited, headquartered in London with around 30 sites across the country, including a major facility at Ampthill, Bedfordshire.

## Products and solutions

- **Aeronautics** - combat and military aircraft, including the F-35 Lightning II Joint Strike Fighter.
- **Missiles and Fire Control** - air and missile defence, tactical missiles, fire control and sensor systems; the UK Ampthill site supports land systems and fire control.
- **Rotary and Mission Systems** - rotary-wing aircraft, naval and radar systems, training and logistics.
- **Space** - military and civil space and launch systems; supports the UK Trident strategic missile programme and operates a UK space technology office at Harwell.
- **UK programmes** - delivery of the Trident strategic missile, F-35 work and participation in the Military Flying Training System through the ASCENT team.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group member (Lockheed Martin UK).

## Recent news

- **2026-06-24** - Awarded a multiyear contract reported at around 35 billion dollars for the THAAD missile defence system, among the first major deals under the US Acquisition Transformation Strategy. [source](https://aviationa2z.com/index.php/2026/06/25/lockheed-wins-new-35-billion-contract-for-thaad/)
- **2026-05-31** - Awarded more than 1 billion dollars in military contracts in late May, including an F-35 armaments order. [source](https://fortworthreport.org/2026/05/31/lockheed-martin-awarded-1b-in-military-contracts-as-iran-war-leads-to-buildup/)
- **2026-05-19** - Secured a 991 million dollar contract for F-35 Block 4 upgrade kits manufactured at Fort Worth. [source](https://www.overtdefense.com/2026/05/19/lockheed-martin-secures-991-million-contract-for-f-35-upgrades/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.lockheedmartin.com/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/lockheed-martin

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website (lockheedmartin.com and lockheedmartin.com/en-gb), LinkedIn company page, ADS Group members directory, Aviation A2Z, Fort Worth Report, Overt Defense. Companies House (Lockheed Martin UK Limited, company number 02372738, incorporated 17 April 1989; registered office Building 7000, Langstone Park, Langstone, Havant, Hampshire PO9 1SW). Global HQ Bethesda, Maryland; formed 1995 from the merger of Lockheed and Martin Marietta; NYSE ticker LMT. Global headcount approximately 120,000 per public figures.

companies.name: Logically
companies.summary: AI company providing narrative and threat intelligence to detect and counter mis- and disinformation for government, defence and enterprise.
companies.body:
# Logically

> AI company providing narrative and threat intelligence to detect and counter mis- and disinformation for government, defence and enterprise.

> [!warning] Status
> The original UK legal entity (THELOGICALLY LTD, Companies House 10850644) entered administration on 2025-06-27. Its assets, brand and core technology were sold in a pre-pack administration deal to Kreatur Ltd in July 2025, preserving around 50 roles. The Logically brand continues to trade under the new owner.

## What they do

Logically provides narrative decision intelligence for government and enterprise. It combines AI with human analysis to monitor the online information environment, detect and cluster harmful narratives and disinformation, and deliver alerts, reporting and decision support. The platform is positioned for national security, defence, public safety and government missions, with enterprise risk and communications use cases second.

## Products and solutions

- **Logically Intelligence** - threat-detection platform that monitors public and open-source information, uses machine learning to assess source and content credibility, detects propaganda, and clusters emerging narratives with alerts and reporting.
- **PRISM** - scoped intelligence system offering simulation, action support and integration with customer workflows for missions beyond standard monitoring.

## Recent news

- **2025-07-04** - Assets, brand and core technology sold in a pre-pack administration deal to Kreatur Ltd, preserving around 50 roles. [source](https://www.uktech.news/ai/ai-fact-checker-logically-sold-off-in-administration-deal-20250707)
- **2025-06-27** - THELOGICALLY LTD enters administration. [source](https://find-and-update.company-information.service.gov.uk/company/10850644/insolvency)
- **2025-03-12** - Partners with Databricks to forecast online narrative risk for governments and enterprises. [source](https://www.databricks.com/customers/logically)

## Links

- Website: https://logically.ai/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/logicallyai

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website, LinkedIn company page, Companies House (10850644 including insolvency record), Wikipedia, Sifted, UKTN, BusinessCloud, Databricks customer page.

# MacTaggart Scott

> Scottish naval engineering company making mechanical handling and motion systems for submarines and ships.

## What they do

MacTaggart, Scott & Company is a privately owned Scottish engineering company, founded in 1898 and based in Loanhead near Edinburgh. It specialises in naval mechanical handling equipment, designing and manufacturing systems for surface ships and submarines for navies worldwide. The company supports demanding maritime environments with a long-standing reputation for quality and reliability.

## Products and solutions

- **Aircraft elevators and lifts** - deck lifts for aircraft carriers and ships.
- **Helicopter handling systems** - flight-deck handling and traversing gear.
- **Arresting gear** - a dedicated naval product line.
- **Submarine mast systems** - hoistable and mast-raising systems, including the Quiet Modular Mast.
- **Towed-array handling systems** and **emergency propulsion units** for submarines.
- **Hydraulic power units, pumps and actuators** for surface ships and submarines.

companies.summary: UK designer of all-electric heavy-lift uncrewed aircraft systems for military and commercial logistics.
companies.body:
# Malloy Aeronautics Ltd

> UK designer of all-electric heavy-lift uncrewed aircraft systems for military and commercial logistics.

## What they do

Malloy Aeronautics designs and supplies all-electric uncrewed aircraft systems for civil and military customers. Its heavy-lift quadcopters carry payloads from around 68 kg to several hundred kilograms over short to medium-range missions, with zero-emission operation at point of use. The company is based in Berkshire and is a BAE Systems owned entity within BAE's FalconWorks research and development division.

## Products and solutions

- **T-150** - heavy-lift drone with around 68 kg maximum payload, in service with the UK Royal Navy, Royal Marines and US Marine Corps.
- **T-400** - heavy-lift platform with around 165 kg maximum payload and extended range.
- **T-650** - next-generation aircraft under development for requirement-led concepts.
- **TRV-150** - trials variant of the T-150 used in capability demonstrations.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Ownership:** BAE Systems owned entity, part of the FalconWorks research and development division within the Air sector.

## Recent news

- **2025-10-07** - The Royal Navy and US Army demonstrated T-150 frontline supply delivery in trials in South Korea. [source](https://www.malloyaeronautics.com/article/royal-navy-and-us-army-show-how-t150-could-deliver-supplies-to-the-frontline)
- **2025-09-12** - The Royal Navy declared the T-150 ready for front-line operations. [source](https://www.malloyaeronautics.com/article/royal-navy-declares-t150-ready-for-operations-1757675439947)

companies.summary: Designs, builds and operates fleets of high-speed VTOL drones with AI vessel detection for maritime surveillance, delivered as an end-to-end service.
companies.body:
# Marble Aerospace

> Designs, builds and operates fleets of high-speed VTOL drones with AI vessel detection for maritime surveillance, delivered as an end-to-end service.

## What they do

Marble builds hardware and software to protect maritime environments. It designs, manufactures and operates its own fleet of high-speed vertical take-off and landing drones, paired with computer-vision sensors and AI-assisted vessel detection, and manages the full deployment chain including beyond visual line of sight regulatory approvals, planning and operations. Clients include government agencies, coast guards, maritime police and environmental organisations, with applications across fisheries protection, anti-piracy and drug-trafficking surveillance, infrastructure protection and environmental and ice monitoring.

## Products and solutions

- **MRB5** - fifth-generation proprietary drone. Fixed-wing VTOL lift-and-cruise design with four lift rotors and a single pusher propeller, built for harsh maritime environments and able to break down to fit in regular airline luggage for rapid deployment.
- **Surveillance as a service** - end-to-end managed maritime monitoring offering, covering deployment, BVLOS approvals, AI vessel detection and real-time intelligence.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group.
- **Programmes:** NATO DIANA (Defence Innovation Accelerator for the North Atlantic) participant.

## Recent news

- Greenland ice-monitoring operations capturing daily high-resolution data over the Ilulissat Icefjord, delivered through an ESA Space Solutions project. [source](https://business.esa.int/projects/expanding-ocean-monitoring-high-speed-uavs)

## Links

- Website: https://www.marble.aero/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/marble-aerospace

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website, LinkedIn company page, Companies House (10183391), ADS Group member listing, FlightGlobal, ESA Space Solutions.

METCLOUD provides sovereign cloud, cyber security and managed services built around high-assurance security technologies. # Milanion

> Defence company developing uncrewed ground and surface systems, ISR and loitering munitions.

## What they do

Milanion Group is a vertically integrated defence company that designs, integrates and manufactures autonomous and robotic systems for the tri-service defence and security sectors. Its operating and manufacturing base is in Abu Dhabi, and the group now markets a UK headquarters with a UK registered entity (Milanion Group Ltd) and a London presence. It works across land, maritime, air, communications and munitions, combining autonomy, secure communications and precision effects.

## Products and solutions

- **AGEMA UGV** - modular, multi-mission, amphibious unmanned ground vehicle, with ISR payloads and weaponised or munitions-launcher variants.
- **Unmanned surface vessels** - an Advanced Autonomous Conversion System that converts manned platforms such as fast attack craft to unmanned operation.
- **MSP Warblefly** - precision loitering munition, including a launcher integrated onto the AGEMA UGV.
- **Mortar and indirect fire systems** - mobile mortar carrier and indirect-fire systems (Milanion NTGS), plus remote weapon stations.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

# MilDef Group AB

> Rugged IT systems integrator and full-spectrum provider for defence, government and critical infrastructure.

## What they do

MilDef is a systems integrator and full-spectrum provider specialising in rugged IT for military, government and critical infrastructure sectors. Since 1997 it has designed, tested, qualified, manufactured, sold and supported rugged computing products for military applications in harsh environments. It supplies hardware, software and services across multiple countries including Sweden, Norway, Finland, Denmark, the United Kingdom, Germany, Switzerland, the United States and Australia. MilDef Group AB has been listed on Nasdaq Stockholm since 2021.

## Products and solutions

- **Rugged computers and electronics** - small form factor computers, mobile computers, displays, panel PCs and special electronics for the harshest conditions.
- **19"/2 rugged IT platform** - rack-mounted rugged computing supporting modular defence systems.

- **Integration services** - system design and implementation alongside hardware delivery.

companies.summary: Oxford-spinout applied machine learning company building responsible AI for defence and national security.
companies.body:
# Mind Foundry

> Oxford-spinout applied machine learning company building responsible AI for defence and national security.

## What they do

Mind Foundry develops responsible AI and machine learning solutions for high-stakes applications in defence and national security. It was spun out of the University of Oxford and turns complex, multi-modal sensor data into trusted insight, supporting human operators while preserving human autonomy in mission-critical environments. The company is based in Oxford.

## Products and solutions

- **Sentry: Sensor Fusion** - real-time fusion of data from multiple sensors into a single evolving picture for situational awareness, making existing hardware and command-and-control software smarter.
- **Nightingale: ASW** - acoustic software for anti-submarine warfare, delivering automated tonal analysis and classification to turn maritime sound into actionable intelligence.
- **Continuous Metalearning** - platform approach in which AI adapts its own learning to real-world change.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 27001, Cyber Essentials Plus, JOSCAR registered.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2024-10-08** - Mind Foundry awarded Defence Technology Exploitation Programme (DTEP) funding to develop a unified operating picture capability with BAE Systems. [source](https://www.gov.uk/government/news/dtep-funding-announced-for-three-more-uk-smes)
- **2024-01-24** - Saab UK awarded the LookOut Phase 3 contract in collaboration with Mind Foundry to develop maritime early warning for the Royal Navy, funded through DASA. [source](https://www.saab.com/markets/united-kingdom/stories/saab-uk-awarded-lookout-phase-3-contract)

## Links

- Website: https://www.mindfoundry.ai
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/mind-foundry

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website (mindfoundry.ai), Companies House (Mind Foundry Limited, company number 09882159, incorporated 20 November 2015), ADS Group members directory, Oxford Science Enterprises portfolio (investor), and reputable news. Backed by Oxford Science Enterprises and Parkwalk Advisors.

companies.name: MindLink Software
companies.summary: Ultra-secure chat and messaging platform for classified communication in national security and defence.
companies.body:
# MindLink Software

> Ultra-secure chat and messaging platform for classified communication in national security and defence.

## What they do

MindLink provides a secure mission information-sharing platform that lets organisations and their mission partners establish a global communication backbone for mission execution. It offers encrypted, real-time chat using data classification and user entitlements to restrict access on a need-to-know basis. The platform uses a data-centric, end-to-end encryption approach with attribute-based access control, and is deployed at scale in air-gapped environments. The company is based in London.

## Products and solutions

- **MindLink Platform** - ultra-secure chat and messaging for international and inter-agency mission operations across defence and intelligence.
- **Data-centric security engine** - multi-layered access control based on secret attributes, roles and security clearances.
- **FRNIX federation protocol** - federation protocol designed to share classified information only with those holding the appropriate need-to-know.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** Cyber Essentials Plus.

## Recent news

- **2024** - MindLink achieved Cyber Essentials Plus certification. [source](https://www.mindlinksoft.com/blog/demonstrating-security-in-practice-mindlink-achieves-cyber-essentials-plus)

## Links

- LinkedIn: https://uk.linkedin.com/company/mindlink

# Moog Fernau Ltd

> UK supplier of ground-based navigation aids and defence communications and datalink systems, part of Moog Inc.

## What they do

Moog Fernau, based in Luton, is a supplier of ground-based navigation aids with experience across all aspects of navigation. Its products and systems have been installed for civil aviation, maritime authorities and military forces worldwide, with stated customers including the US Navy, UK MOD, US Air Force and US Marine Corps. Trading as part of Moog Inc, the business descends from Fernau Avionics, which became part of Moog in 2009.

## Products and solutions

- **DME** - distance measuring equipment, a ground-based navigation aid.
- **VHF/UHF DF and Naval DF** - direction-finding systems for aviation and maritime use.
- **Auto-Triangulation (Auto-T)** - automatic triangulation for locating transmissions.
- **TACAN** - fixed tactical air navigation, with man-portable, mobile and deployable variants.
- **Mode-S radar transmitters** - secondary surveillance radar transmitters.
- **Tarsier** - automatic foreign object debris (FOD) detection system for civil and military airfields.

## What they do

MSI-Defence Systems (MSI-DS) is a UK-based land and naval weapon systems specialist and a world leader in small and medium calibre naval gun systems. It is the only UK-based medium calibre system manufacturer. The company supplies lightweight automated weapon mounts to the Royal Navy and to over 40 armed forces worldwide, and traces its engineering heritage back more than a century.

companies.name: Neros Technologies
companies.summary: US drone manufacturer building tactical, attritable one-way attack drones for Western military forces, with a new UK subsidiary.
companies.body:
# Neros Technologies

> US drone manufacturer building tactical, attritable one-way attack drones for Western military forces, with a new UK subsidiary.

## What they do

Neros makes tactical, attritable, one-way drones intended to give Western military forces an asymmetric advantage. The company says it was founded to onshore the manufacturing of drones critical to a modern arsenal, building first-person-view (FPV) systems and AI-enabled mission software with a secure supply chain free of critical Chinese components. It is headquartered in El Segundo, California, with manufacturing in California and additional offices including a UK subsidiary.

## Products and solutions

- **Archer** - mass-produced FPV drone built for modular payloads and resilient communications, with an NDAA-compliant supply chain; selected for the US Defense Innovation Unit's Blue UAS list.
- **Archer Strike** - kinetic-enabled FPV variant for lethal effects at range in contested environments.
- **Archer Fiber** - fibre-optic-controlled FPV drone, jam-resistant with no radio-frequency signature, launched with partner Kela Technologies and marketed as an NDAA-compliant fibre-optic FPV drone.
- **Crossbow** - tactical ground control station with electronic-warfare resistance at range.
- **Flatbow** - ground control system named alongside Archer in the US Army Purpose-Built Attritable Systems selection.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** Blue UAS listed (US Defense Innovation Unit); NDAA-compliant supply chain.

## Recent news

- **2026-03-03** - Launched a UK subsidiary, Neros Technologies UK Ltd, with up to £10m investment over five years and a Swindon headquarters. [source](https://www.neros.tech/articles/neros-launches-uk-subsidiary-with-up-to-ps10m-investment-into-british-defence)
- **2025-12-11** - Unveiled Archer Fiber, an NDAA-compliant fibre-optic FPV drone, with partner Kela Technologies. [source](https://www.unmannedsystemstechnology.com/2025/12/neros-kela-technologies-unveil-ndaa-compliant-fiber-optic-fpv-drone/)

- **2025-11-06** - US Army selected the Neros Archer FPV drone for the Purpose-Built Attritable Systems (PBAS) programme. [source](https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20251106525503/en/)

companies.name: Nexor Limited
companies.summary: UK cyber security company specialising in secure information exchange and cross-domain solutions.
companies.body:
# Nexor Limited

> UK cyber security company specialising in secure information exchange and cross-domain solutions.

## What they do

Nexor is a privately held UK cyber security company based in Nottingham, providing products and services to safeguard government, defence and critical national infrastructure systems. It specialises in secure information exchange, or cross-domain, solutions that enforce the controlled flow of data between separate security domains, applying data validation, sanitisation and policy enforcement so only authorised, clean information is exchanged. Nexor states more than 30 years of work alongside the UK MOD and NATO; the company traces its origins to X-Tel Services Limited, founded in 1989, later renamed Nexor.

## Products and solutions

- **Nexor GuarDiode** - secure, uni-directional data transfer to safely import and filter data from untrusted networks.
- **Nexor Guardian** - reduces risk of malware attacks and data loss across domains.
- **Nexor Data Diode** - hardware-enforced one-way transfer preventing data leaking back to an untrusted network.
- **Nexor Sentinel** - prevents information loss via email and reduces malware risk.

## Recent news

- **2024-07** - SInfoE, developed by Nexor for the UK MOD, was tested during the Acheron trials integrating Royal Navy, British Army and Royal Air Force units with industry unmanned systems. [source](https://www.nexor.com/blog/enabling-the-future-of-uk-defence)
- **2025** - Nexor highlighted its cross-domain and secure information sharing work in the context of the UK Strategic Defence Review 2025. [source](https://www.nexor.com/blog/inside-the-2025-strategic-defence-review)

## Links

- Website: https://www.nexor.com/
- LinkedIn: https://uk.linkedin.com/company/nexor

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Nexor website (nexor.com), Nexor LinkedIn company page, Companies House (company 05152465), Nexor blog, Wikipedia (Nexor).

# NIAXO

> UK data analytics and digital innovation SME delivering secure analytics and software to defence, national security and public-sector customers.

## What they do

NIAXO delivers innovation, process improvement and software solutions using business analysis, data science, software development and business change. The company states it enables organisations to gain insight from data and provides business transformation through technology, covering process, hardware and software. Its work spans UK defence, national security and wider public-sector projects, with a focus on secure analytics platforms and security operations.

## Products and solutions

- **Secure Platform for Analytics (SPA)** - scalable hybrid-cloud, open-architecture analytics platform running across AWS and Azure.
- **Situational Awareness Tool (SAT)** - real-time dashboards for evidence-based decision-making, built with Elastic.
- **Dynamic Intelligence Reporting (DIR)** - automated briefing packs and situational-awareness dashboards drawing on open-source datasets.
- **InkWell** - AI-powered strategy software.

# NightSearcher Ltd

> British designer and manufacturer of portable rechargeable LED lighting and portable power, supplied to the armed forces among other professional users.

## What they do

NightSearcher designs and manufactures premium rechargeable and portable LED lighting and portable power solutions. Its floodlights, worklights, searchlights, flashlights, head torches and inspection lamps are used by the armed forces, police, fire and rescue, construction, oil and gas, and rail sectors worldwide. The company also produces ATEX-certified intrinsically safe lighting and battery-powered portable power stations as an alternative to fuel generators.

## Products and solutions

- **StratoStar** - rechargeable multi-directional tower floodlight with four light-heads and 360 degree adjustable illumination, marketed for sectors including military operations.
- **Sigma ATEX range** - intrinsically safe flashlights, head torches, hand lamps and floodlights for hazardous environments.
- **GenZero** - rechargeable portable power stations for off-grid and remote power.
- **Flashlights, head torches and searchlights** - rechargeable LED hand-held and head-worn lighting.

companies.name: Nominal
companies.summary: US software company building a unified test and mission data platform for defence, aerospace and other complex hardware programmes.
companies.body:
# Nominal

> US software company building a unified test and mission data platform for defence, aerospace and other complex hardware programmes.

## What they do

Nominal builds a unified software stack for hardware engineering teams, letting them test and iterate on physical systems as quickly as software teams ship code. Its platform captures, organises, monitors, visualises and securely shares high-rate test and operational data from complex hardware including aircraft, hypersonics, satellites and autonomous vehicles. The company has roots in aerospace and defence, founded by engineers from Anduril, Lockheed Martin and Palantir, and is headquartered in Los Angeles with offices including London.

## Products and solutions

- **Nominal Core** - secure cloud workbench for managing, monitoring and analysing high-rate sensor data, logs, video, simulation results and procedures in one time-aligned, collaborative view, with trend analysis, anomaly detection and synchronised post-test replay.
- **Nominal Connect** - Python-first edge platform for building custom hardware-in-the-loop applications, handling sensor streams at kilohertz rates and streaming large volumes of test and video data from a test bench into Nominal.

## Recent news

- **2026-04-30** - Acquired Fid Labs to bring AI agents to the full hardware engineering lifecycle. [source](https://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2026/04/30/3284606/0/en/nominal-acquires-fid-labs-to-bring-ai-to-the-full-hardware-engineering-lifecycle.html)
- **2026-03-05** - Reached a $1bn valuation in an $80M round led by Founders Fund, taking total raised to $155M in 10 months, with international expansion including a London office. [source](https://techcrunch.com/2026/03/05/hardware-testing-startup-nominal-hits-1b-valuation-raises-155m-in-10-months/)
- **2025-06-25** - Raised a $75M Series B led by Sequoia Capital to modernise hardware testing. [source](https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/nominal-raises-75-million-led-by-sequoia-capital-to-modernize-hardware-testing-302479991.html)

## Links

- Website: https://nominal.io/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/nominal-inc

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website (nominal.io), LinkedIn company page, TechCrunch, GlobeNewswire, PR Newswire and MIT News. Legal entity Nominal, Inc.; founded 2022. Headcount not published; the medium band is an estimate from public indicators (Series B-stage, 60-plus customer organisations, four offices). Named public customers include Anduril, Shield AI and the US Air Force.

companies.name: Northrop Grumman Corporation
companies.summary: Global US aerospace and defence prime operating across air, space, defence and cyberspace, with established UK operations.
companies.body:
# Northrop Grumman Corporation

> Global US aerospace and defence prime operating across air, space, defence and cyberspace, with established UK operations.

## What they do

Northrop Grumman is a global aerospace and defence technology company working across space, aeronautics, defence and cyberspace. It designs, develops and manufactures systems for national security and commercial customers across the air, land, sea, space and cyber domains, and is one of the largest contractors to the US federal government. It is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under ticker NOC, headquartered in Falls Church, Virginia, and maintains UK operations through Northrop Grumman UK Limited.

## Products and solutions

- **Aeronautics Systems** - manned and unmanned air systems, including military aircraft, autonomous systems and aerospace structures; lead contractor for the B-21 Raider next-generation stealth bomber.
- **Defense Systems** - modernisation and sustainment, battle command systems, directed energy, tactical weapons and armaments.
- **Mission Systems** - cyber-secure, software-defined systems including sensors, radars, electronic warfare and C4ISR.
- **Space Systems** - space and launch systems for national security, civil and commercial customers.
- **UK operations** - cyber and technology facilities in Cheltenham, London, Manchester and New Malden; the New Malden site specialises in marine navigation systems, radars, integrated bridge systems and integrated platform management systems.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group member; UKspace member.

## Recent news

- **2026-06-22** - Awarded a five-year US Army contract to produce the M1147 Advanced Multi-Purpose (AMP) tank ammunition round. [source](https://news.northropgrumman.com/armaments/northrop-grumman-awarded-multiple-year-contract-to-produce-advanced-multi-purpose-tank-ammunition-round)
- **2026-04-29** - Won a $488M sole-source contract for global F-16 radar support. [source](https://news.clearancejobs.com/2026/04/29/northrop-grumman-wins-488m-sole-source-contract-for-global-f-16-radar-support/)
- **2026-03-30** - Awarded a US Navy contract modification for the SEWIP Block 3 maritime electronic attack system. [source](https://news.northropgrumman.com/electronic-warfare/northrop-grumman-awarded-contract-modification-for-sewip-block-3-maritime-electronic-attack-system)

## Links

- Website: https://www.northropgrumman.com/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/northrop-grumman-corporation

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website (northropgrumman.com) and UK presence page, LinkedIn company page, Northrop Grumman newsroom, ClearanceJobs, ADS Group members directory and UKspace. Companies House (Northrop Grumman UK Limited, company number 05989428, incorporated 6 November 2006; registered office 26-27 Oxendon Street, London SW1Y 4EL). Global HQ Falls Church, Virginia; formed 1994 from the merger of Northrop and Grumman; NYSE ticker NOC. Global headcount approximately 95,000 per public figures.

companies.body:
# Nova Systems

> One of the largest Australian-owned defence and security companies, a global provider of capability assurance, test and evaluation and systems integration, with a UK arm based in Bristol.

> Australian-owned. Global HQ in Adelaide, South Australia. The UK arm is Nova Systems (International) Ltd, registered at Filton, Bristol (Companies House 03752187).

## What they do

Nova Systems is a 100% Australian-owned engineering services and technology solutions company partnering with clients in national defence, essential services, border control, cyber security and civil aerospace. It is a provider of test and evaluation, certification and systems assurance, and delivers specialist systems engineering advice alongside digital technology, software and systems integration. It operates from offices across Australia, New Zealand, the UK, Ireland, Singapore and Norway.

## Products and solutions

- **Test and evaluation** - certification, systems assurance and a Test and Evaluation Centre of Excellence bringing together defence, industry and academia.
- **Systems integration** - integration of complex platforms and systems.
- **Software and digital solutions** - digital technology and software delivery.
- **Aircraft modifications** - including special-mission aircraft integration.
- **Advanced training** - training services.
- **Advisory and engineering services** - specialist systems engineering advice and professional services.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

companies.name: Novatech Limited
companies.summary: UK custom-computing manufacturer building bespoke PCs, servers and rugged COTS hardware, including defence training and simulation systems.
companies.body:
# Novatech

> UK custom-computing manufacturer building bespoke PCs, servers and rugged COTS hardware, including defence training and simulation systems.

## What they do

Novatech designs, assembles, supports and repairs custom-built computer hardware from its Portsmouth headquarters, serving home, business, education and public-sector customers. Alongside its mainstream PC and server business, it supplies specialist and adaptable hardware including custom rack design and build, high-performance commercial off-the-shelf (COTS) PCs and servers, and ruggedised solutions. Its engineering team delivers complex rack and compute systems that power simulators for defence and aviation customers, and the company states it has supplied engineered COTS hardware into the MOD through primes including Thales, BAE Systems and Airbus Defence and Space.

## Products and solutions

- **Defence, Training and Simulation** - a dedicated sector division supplying engineered computing and simulation systems.
- **Motion Sims** - motion-simulator systems for training, including powerboat and RHIB trainers.
- **Custom Server and Rack Solutions** - bespoke rack design and build, configurable tower and rackmount servers.
- **Design and Engineering** - in-house engineering of COTS PCs, servers and ruggedised solutions, including high-performance AI and deep-learning compute workstations.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2024** - Babcock signed research and development agreements with Novatech and partners to develop a virtual-reality synthetic military driver-training capability. [source](https://www.adsadvance.co.uk/novatech-and-babcock-team-up-on-military-driver-training.html)
- **2020-01** - Novatech awarded a contract to supply RHIB motion simulators to Royal Navy Reserve establishments across the UK and Northern Ireland. [source](https://www.defenceonline.co.uk/2020/01/13/novatech-navy-reserves-training-simulator-technology/)

## Links

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/novatech

companies.name: NP Aerospace
companies.summary: Coventry-headquartered armour manufacturer and military vehicle integrator delivering survivability and protection solutions for defence and security customers worldwide.
companies.body:
# NP Aerospace

> Coventry-headquartered armour manufacturer and military vehicle integrator delivering survivability and protection solutions for defence and security customers worldwide.

## What they do

NP Aerospace describes itself as a world-leading armour manufacturer and vehicle integrator delivering high-performance defence and security solutions and engineering services, drawing on close to 100 years of experience producing lightweight survivability solutions from advanced materials. Its Coventry Advanced Armour Systems facility houses engineering, design, composites and armour manufacturing alongside a UKAS-accredited Ballistics Centre of Excellence. Its vehicle systems team handles full military vehicle integration, through-life support, repairs and refurbishment, and acts as Engineering Authority for the UK MoD's Protected Mobility fleet.

## Products and solutions

- **Composite vehicle armour systems** - lightweight add-on and integrated armour for military vehicles.
- **Vehicle integration and through-life support** - full military vehicle integration, repairs, refurbishment and spares; Engineering Authority for the UK MoD Protected Mobility fleet.
- **Ballistic helmets and shields** - personal protection products.
- **Explosive Ordnance Disposal (EOD) suits** - protective equipment for ordnance disposal.
- **Body armour plates** - personal survivability systems.
- **LC300 armoured vehicle** - upgraded armoured platform; entered full-rate production from January 2026.
- **Ballistics testing services** - independently UKAS ISO/IEC 17025 accredited laboratory.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001 and ISO 14001 (Coventry Advanced Armour Systems facility); UKAS ISO/IEC 17025 accredited Ballistics Centre of Excellence.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group member.

## Recent news

- **2026-06-23** - Announced a definitive agreement to acquire US-based Iten Defense, expanding into the US market, subject to regulatory approvals. [source](https://npaerospace.com/np-aerospace-to-acquire-iten-defense-and-expand-into-the-us-market/)
- **2025-05-20** - Opened a new military vehicle armour complex in England. [source](https://thedefensepost.com/2025/05/20/np-aerospace-armor-complex/)
- **2025-05** - Awarded a multi-year add-on armour contract from General Dynamics Land Systems-Canada for a LAV international order. [source](https://www.edrmagazine.eu/%E2%96%BA-np-aerospace-canada-receives-multi-year-contract-from-general-dynamics-land-systems-for-add-on-armour-systems)

companies.name: NquiringMinds
companies.summary: Southampton-based trusted AI and cyber security company building secure data-sharing and analytics for defence, government and industry.
companies.body:
# NquiringMinds

> Southampton-based trusted AI and cyber security company building secure data-sharing and analytics for defence, government and industry.

## What they do

NquiringMinds describes itself as a trusted AI company building advanced analytics on top of solid cyber security principles. Founded in 2010 by AI and cyber security experts from the mobile and defence research industries, it builds secure data-sharing solutions for central government, the wider public sector, and industrial manufacturing and agriculture. Its stated areas of expertise are AI-powered data analytics, secure data sharing and cyber-resilient Internet of Things, with customers across smart cities, Industry 4.0, defence, agriculture, telecoms and health and social care.

## Products and solutions

- **TDX (Trusted Data Exchange)** - cloud-based secure data-sharing and AI-powered analytics platform built for security and scale, handling large-scale and real-time IoT data with owner-controlled access and selective sharing.
- **InterliNQ** - secure IoT hub technology for small, low-power devices, providing security from hardware through to a PKI certificate-based application layer using a peer-to-peer cryptographic model.

Related consortium initiatives include TAIBOM (a trustable AI bill of materials, led by NquiringMinds with partners including BAE Systems and BSI, funded by the UKRI Technology Missions Fund) and Secure Networking by Design work with TechWorks and the University of Oxford.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** Participant in the Defence and Security Accelerator (DASA) innovation programme; UKRI Technology Missions Fund (TAIBOM); research collaborations with the University of Oxford and TechWorks.

## Recent news

- **2025-04-29** - TAIBOM project entered its next phase with an invitation to contribute to the trustable AI bill of materials framework. [source](https://nquiringminds.com/news/taibom-launch/)
- **2025-02-25** - Presented on engineering trustworthiness in AI systems at a TechWorks event at Bletchley Park. [source](https://nquiringminds.com/news/computing-breakthrough-and-cognitive-router-technology-promises-secure-networking-by-design/)

## Links

- Website: https://nquiringminds.com/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/nquiringminds

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website (nquiringminds.com), LinkedIn company page, Companies House (NQUIRINGMINDS LIMITED, company number 07452630, incorporated 26 November 2010), Southampton Science Park business directory, University of Southampton ECS, IoT Security Foundation and Land Mobile. Size band 11-50 per LinkedIn. No Cyber Essentials, ISO 27001, G-Cloud, techUK or ADS membership evidenced in public sources.

companies.name: Ocean Infinity Group (UK) Ltd
companies.summary: Large-scale marine robotics company operating fleets of uncrewed surface and underwater vehicles for ocean data and maritime defence.
companies.body:
# Ocean Infinity Group (UK) Ltd

> Large-scale marine robotics company operating fleets of uncrewed surface and underwater vehicles for ocean data and maritime defence.

## What they do

Ocean Infinity deploys fleets of marine robots, operated remotely from onshore control centres via satellite, to capture ocean and seabed data and deliver maritime solutions. The company describes itself as a pioneer of large-scale marine robotic operations, working across survey, offshore energy and defence markets. Operations are run from control centres in Southampton and Austin.

## Products and solutions

- **Armada fleet** - robotic and optionally-crewed surface vessels (78-metre and 86-metre classes) operated remotely from shore.
- **Infinity fleet** - autonomous underwater vehicles (AUVs) for deep-ocean data acquisition.
- **NeedleFish USV** - 14-metre dual-hull uncrewed surface vessel for patrol, surveillance, mapping and survey.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** AUVSI (Association for Uncrewed Vehicle Systems International).

## Recent news

- **2025-04-29** - Joined a Helsing-led maritime partnership (with QinetiQ and others) to apply AI and autonomy to countering underwater threats and protecting undersea infrastructure. [source](https://www.navalnews.com/naval-news/2025/04/helsing-announces-international-industry-partnership-to-harness-ai-and-autonomy-in-countering-underwater-threats/)
- **2025-07-03** - Launched the NeedleFish USV with the Kuwait Coast Guard for patrol and surveillance of territorial waters. [source](https://oceaninfinity.com/news/ocean-infinity-launches-needlefish-usv-in-kuwait/)
- **2025-12-15** - Completed its Armada fleet milestone with delivery of the final vessel. [source](https://oceaninfinity.com/news/ocean-infinity-completes-armada-fleet-milestone-with-delivery-of-final-vessel/)

## Links

companies.name: Orqa
companies.summary: Croatian manufacturer of FPV drone goggles, components and complete unmanned aerial systems.
companies.body:
# Orqa

> Croatian manufacturer of FPV drone goggles, components and complete unmanned aerial systems.

## What they do

Orqa is a Croatian drone-tech company headquartered in Osijek that designs and manufactures first-person view (FPV) equipment and complete unmanned aerial systems. It began with the FPV.One goggles for the consumer and prosumer market and has expanded into mission-ready aerial robotics for defence and security use. Development and production are based in Osijek, with products marketed as made in Europe.

## Products and solutions

- **FPV.One goggles** - FPV goggle systems for piloting drones, including the FPV.One Pilot and OLED variants.
- **FPV MRM-2 Interceptor** - an FPV interceptor drone reported to be in use by the Croatian military.
- **FPV components and systems** - NDAA-compliant, Chinese-component-free FPV drones produced at the Osijek facility.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Manufacturing:** states an annual production capacity of around 280,000 NDAA-compliant FPV drones.

## Recent news

- **2024** - secured a 5.8 million USD investment from Lightspeed Venture Partners. [source](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Orqa)
- **2025-08** - the FPV MRM-2 Interceptor reported as in use by the Croatian military. [source](https://total-croatia-news.com/news/osijek-orqa-croatian-military/)
- **2026-04** - signed a memorandum of cooperation with Ukrainian defence-tech company General Cherry. [source](https://defence-industry.eu/croatian-company-orqa-boosts-annual-fpv-drone-output-to-280000-units-as-it-removes-reliance-on-chinese-technology/)

## Links

- Website: https://orqafpv.com/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/orqafpv

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website (orqafpv.com), LinkedIn company page, Wikipedia, Total Croatia News, Defence Industry Europe, Tectonic Defense.

companies.name: Oxford Dynamics Limited
companies.summary: UK sovereign AI defence company building multi-agent AI and robotics for sensing, sense-making and action at the tactical edge.
companies.body:
# Oxford Dynamics Limited

> UK sovereign AI defence company building multi-agent AI and robotics for sensing, sense-making and action at the tactical edge.

## What they do

Oxford Dynamics describes itself as a sovereign AI defence company building a unified system for sensing, sense-making and action, with AI and robotics at the edge and humans in control. It engineers autonomous systems, robotics and multi-agent AI for defence forces, with systems trained on real-world scenarios and engineered for regulated, contested domains. The company is based at Harwell Campus in Oxfordshire.

## Products and solutions

- **AVIS (A Very Intelligent System)** - flagship multi-agent AI engine; a modular, containerised data-interrogation and analytics platform providing explainable insights and command-and-control from tactical edge to command level in bandwidth-denied environments.
- **SR-1** - multi-sensor robot for drone detection, fusing EO/IR, RF, LiDAR and radar for passive scouting and AI-directed investigation.
- **STRIDER** - autonomous ground robotic platform for hazardous (CBRN, ordnance, logistics) environments with hot-swap payloads and beyond-line-of-sight tele-operation.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** UK MOD Digital Decision Accelerators for Defence (DDAD) Open Framework, Lot 2; UK MOD Enterprise Agreement LITE.
- **Programmes:** DASA and Dstl funding history (first DASA contract 2020).
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

companies.body:
# PA Consulting

> Global consulting and innovation firm with an established defence and security practice, headquartered in London.

## What they do

PA Consulting is a consulting and innovation firm of around 4,000 strategists, innovators, designers, consultants, scientists, engineers and technologists, with expertise across eight industries including defence and security. Its defence and security practice works with the armed forces, government agencies and police on capability delivery, programmes and transformation. The firm operates from offices across the UK, US, Ireland, the Nordics and the Netherlands.

## Products and solutions

- **Public sector defence** - strategy, capability delivery and transformation for the Ministry of Defence and the armed forces.
- **Aerospace, defence and security industries** - performance, workforce and next-generation technology work for primes and suppliers.
- **Space** - innovation across the space domain, including work with the UK Space Agency.
- **National and homeland security** - critical programmes strengthening national security and public safety.
- **Cyber security** - including CREST-accredited penetration testing.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** MOD Digital and IT Professional Services (DIPS) framework, via the Digital Allies consortium.
- **Accreditations:** CREST member.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group, techUK.

- **2026-02-25** - The Digital Allies consortium (PA Consulting and Accenture) was awarded a £113m DLIS / Business Modernisation for Support contract by the MOD. [source](https://www.gov.uk/government/news/final-piece-in-place-for-defence-support-transformation)

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/pa-consulting/

companies.body:
# Palantir Technologies UK, Ltd.

> UK operation of the US data and AI software company Palantir Technologies, serving defence, intelligence and government with its Gotham, Foundry and AIP platforms.

## What they do

Palantir builds software platforms that integrate large, varied data sources and apply analytics and AI to support decision-making in government and commercial organisations. Its flagship platforms are Gotham (government and intelligence), Foundry (enterprise data operations), AIP (Artificial Intelligence Platform) and Apollo (continuous software delivery). The UK entity delivers these into UK defence, health and government. The US parent is headquartered in Denver, Colorado, and the UK office is in London.

## Products and solutions

- **Gotham** - built for government and intelligence; pattern identification across data sources for intelligence analysis, battlefield command and targeting.
- **Foundry** - core data operations platform for data integration, ontology, analytics and workflow development.
- **AIP** - generative-AI layer connecting large language models securely into the platforms, with tooling to build agents and automations.
- **Apollo** - continuous delivery platform managing the infrastructure hosting Foundry and AIP.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** Crown Commercial Service supplier (Back Office Software); G-Cloud framework.

## Recent news

- **2025-09-18** - Signed a strategic defence partnership with the UK MOD, committing to invest up to £1.5bn in the UK and establish a European HQ in Britain. [source](https://www.gov.uk/government/news/new-strategic-partnership-to-unlock-billions-and-boost-military-ai-and-innovation)
- **2026-01-28** - UK MOD signed a new three-year data analytics contract worth around £240m, effective 1 April 2026. [source](https://www.theregister.com/2026/01/28/mod_palantir_deal/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.palantir.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/palantir-technologies

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website, LinkedIn company page, Companies House (07042994), GOV.UK, Crown Commercial Service, The Register, NHS England. Publicly listed on NASDAQ (ticker PLTR).

# Parker Meggitt

> British aerospace and defence components and sub-systems business, part of Parker Hannifin's Aerospace Group.

## What they do

Parker Meggitt (formerly Meggitt plc) is a British aerospace, defence and energy components company based in Coventry. Founded in 1948, it became part of the Parker Aerospace Group of US motion and control company Parker Hannifin in September 2022. The business supplies products across the aerospace, defence and energy markets and employs more than 9,000 people across over 40 manufacturing facilities and regional offices worldwide.

- **Fire and safety systems** - detection and suppression for aircraft and platforms.

# Plexus Corp.

> Global electronics manufacturing services provider serving aerospace and defence among other regulated industries.

## What they do

Plexus is a global electronics manufacturing services (EMS) company that designs, manufactures and services highly complex products for customers in demanding regulatory environments. It works across the full product lifecycle, from design and development through supply chain, new product introduction, manufacturing and aftermarket services. Its markets include aerospace and defence, healthcare, industrial and semiconductor capital equipment, delivered from around 26 facilities across the Americas, Asia-Pacific and EMEA.

## Products and solutions

- **Design and Development** - product development and engineering, from individual circuit boards to fully tested line replaceable units.

# Precision Technic Defence

> Danish-headquartered supplier of tactical equipment, integrated systems and through-life services to armed forces and national security agencies.

## What they do

Precision Technic Defence Group is a defence supplier headquartered in Svenstrup, Denmark, tracing its origins to 1985. It develops, tests and supplies turn-key solutions to armed forces, combining components from selected sub-suppliers into interoperable systems and running them through testing before delivery. The group has companies in Denmark, Germany, Sweden, France, Poland, the USA, Australia and the UK, and its subsidiary Precision Services provides maintenance, integration and through-life support. A UK arm, Precision Technic Defence Limited, is incorporated in England (Companies House 08255248) and is an ADS Group member.

## Products and solutions

- **Integrated tactical systems** - interoperable systems and solutions assembled from market-leading manufacturers for military and national security use.
- **Vehicle preparation and modification** - preparation and modification of Mercedes-Benz G-Class vehicles for the Danish Armed Forces, as sole subcontractor to Ejner Hessel.
- **Precision Services** - technical maintenance, integration and through-life support for products and systems.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group (via Precision Technic Defence Limited, UK); FAD (Forsvars- og Aerospaceindustrien i Danmark) member.

companies.body:
# PreCog Systems

> UK data analytics company providing anomaly detection and movement-pattern intelligence for national security, law enforcement and border control.

## What they do

PreCog Systems is a London-based software company that analyses structured and unstructured data to detect anomalies and infer movement and behaviour patterns. Its platform collects signals passively from devices searching for Wi-Fi and Bluetooth connections, producing real-time and historical intelligence without connecting to those devices. It positions its work for national security, law enforcement, border control, airport security and counter-terrorism, and states its software is designed to comply with privacy measures such as GDPR.

## Products and solutions

- **PreCog analytics platform** - anomaly detection across datasets with passive data collection, real-time and historical intelligence reporting, and the ability to infer global movement patterns at a scale ranging from small deployments to nationwide systems.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Investors:** has received investment from Sure Valley Ventures and Mindflair.

# Prevail Partners

> UK defence and security consultancy offering intelligence, operational support and defence technologies, with a focus on border security and maritime domain awareness.

## What they do

Prevail Partners is a UK defence and security consultancy incorporated in 2018, with a registered office in Poole, England. It provides operational support, intelligence and defence capabilities to government, law-enforcement and commercial clients, with a focus on border security and maritime domain awareness. Its services span intelligence fusion, risk management, training, financial investigations, and cyber operations and security, and it has moved into defence technology through partnerships in unmanned systems.
