companies.name: Prizsm Technologies Ltd
companies.summary: UK data-security firm providing quantum-resistant computational storage that fragments and scatters data across multiple clouds.
companies.body:
# Prizsm Technologies

> UK data-security firm providing quantum-resistant computational storage that fragments and scatters data across multiple clouds.

## What they do

Prizsm describes itself as a computational storage capability providing resilient, quantum-resistant, hyper-secure cloud storage and communications. Its algorithm disrupts data at bit-level and randomly distributes redundant, complementary binary digits across multiple cloud platforms, so information is stored, in its own words, everywhere and nowhere. By sitting between users and cloud storage platforms, it aims to let organisations use cheap, elastic cloud services in an inherently secure way, with data recoverable even if a cloud provider is lost.

## Products and solutions

- **Prizsm Storage** - core store-and-retrieve product using bit-level data disaggregation and multi-cloud distribution for resilient, quantum-resistant storage.
- **Prizsm Edge** - secure store-and-forward communication for edge computing and IoT, allowing multiple independent channels to share cloud storage without crosstalk.
- **Prizsm Key** - secure key sharing built on the Prizsm algorithm.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** G-Cloud (CCS Digital Marketplace listed supplier).
- **Programmes:** Digital Security by Design (DSbD) Technology Access Programme participant; codebase ported to the Morello CHERI architecture.

## Recent news

- **2024** - Prizsm participated in the Digital Security by Design Technology Access Programme, porting its software to the Morello CHERI prototype hardware. [source](https://www.dsbd.tech/whos-involved/technology-access-programme-participants/)

## Links

- Website: https://prizsm.co.uk
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/prizsm-technologies

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Prizsm website, LinkedIn company page, Companies House (10720342), CCS Digital Marketplace (G-Cloud listing), Digital Security by Design, techUK. Website and LinkedIn URLs confirmed via search indexes; direct page fetch was unavailable at time of verification.

# Prolinx

> UK-owned SME providing secure, sovereign hosting and managed IT services across all government security classifications for defence and the public sector.

## What they do

Prolinx is a UK-owned and based SME, established in 1997, delivering secure hosting and managed services covering all government security classifications. It operates a secure multi-tier data centre with a 24/7 service desk, a Network Operations Centre and a Security Operations Centre, accredited to government security standards. Its stated customer base includes the Ministry of Defence, Defence Digital, the British Council and the higher-education sector.

## Products and solutions

- **Citadel** - UK-sovereign, fully managed end-user collaboration service that lets organisations handle protectively marked data securely while using tools such as Microsoft 365 and CAD.
- **Citadel Secure** - fully managed secure service assured to the OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE classification, with 24/7 support and a scalable consumption model.
- **Citadel Red** - fully managed secure service for higher security classifications, in use within specific areas of the MOD and national security agencies across multiple classifications.
- **Prolinx Assured Cloud (PAC)** - assured cloud and collaborative working environment listed on the G-Cloud Digital Marketplace.

companies.name: pureLiFi
companies.summary: Edinburgh-based developer of LiFi optical wireless communications technology, with a strong defence and national-security line.
companies.body:
# pureLiFi

> Edinburgh-based developer of LiFi optical wireless communications technology, with a strong defence and national-security line.

## What they do

pureLiFi develops LiFi (light fidelity), high-speed, bidirectional, networked and mobile wireless communication that uses the light spectrum rather than radio frequency to transmit data. It builds the optoelectronic components and systems that make LiFi work, for uses ranging from defence and government to enterprise. Because LiFi uses light rather than RF, the company markets it as inherently more secure, since the signal cannot be detected, intercepted or jammed outside its defined cone of light coverage. It was founded in 2012 as a University of Edinburgh spin-out (the legal entity was incorporated in 2011).

## Products and solutions

- **Kitefin** - LiFi defence system, an optical wireless communication system for secure data transmission without radio frequencies, deployed with the US Army in Tactical and Office variants.
- **Kitefin XE** - next-generation LiFi system launched June 2025, offering room-filling coverage over 80 square metres at gigabit capacity and compliant with the IEEE 802.11bb standard.
- **Light Antenna ONE / Light Antenna Module** - optoelectronic component enabling OEMs to integrate LiFi into connected devices, compliant with IEEE 802.11bb.
- **Through-window bridging technology** - proprietary LiFi technique to pass high-speed data through a window, the basis of a fixed-wireless-access partnership.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** In-Q-Tel (IQT) portfolio company, the strategic investor for the US national-security community and allies; University of Edinburgh spin-out.

## Recent news

- **2026-04-28** - pureLiFi agreed a strategic partnership with Askey to launch a through-window 5G fixed-wireless-access bridging system. [source](https://www.scotsman.com/business/edinburghs-purelifi-agrees-deal-to-revolutionise-delivery-of-gigabit-broadband-with-zero-drilling-7953209)
- **2025-06-10** - pureLiFi unveiled Kitefin XE, its next-generation LiFi system for secure defence and wider enterprise communications. [source](https://soldiersystems.net/2025/06/10/purelifi-unveils-kitefin-xe-the-next-generation-lifi-system-ready-to-secure-communications-for-defence-and-beyond/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.purelifi.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/purelifi

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website (purelifi.com), Companies House (registration SC394047), Soldier Systems, The Scotsman and Light Reading. Headcount sits near the small/medium boundary (around 50 per third-party profiles); no formal quality or security accreditations beyond IEEE 802.11bb standard compliance were evidenced.

QinetiQ Group plc is a British defence technology company headquartered at Cody Technology Park, Farnborough. companies.body:
# Quantum-Systems GmbH

> German deep-tech company developing and manufacturing electric VTOL fixed-wing uncrewed aerial systems for ISR and survey, with a strong defence focus.

## What they do

Quantum Systems is a European deep-tech company that develops, designs and manufactures small uncrewed aerial systems (UAS), specialising in electric vertical take-off and landing (eVTOL) fixed-wing drones. It builds its core technologies in-house, spanning aircraft platforms, mission software and AI-driven aerial-intelligence analytics. Founded for commercial and survey applications, it has grown into a dual-use company serving commercial, security and military customers globally. It is headquartered in Gilching, Bavaria, near Munich.

## Products and solutions

- **Vector** - tactical eVTOL fixed-wing ISR drone sold only to governments; selected by the Australian Defence Force under LAND 129 Phase 4B.
- **Twister** - short-range, backpackable ISR sUAS designed to operate in GNSS-denied and electronically contested environments; selected as the Bundeswehr ALADIN successor.
- **Reliant** - long-range VTOL fixed-wing UAS with a heavy-fuel engine delivering over 10 hours of persistent ISR.
- **Trinity Pro** - eVTOL fixed-wing mapping and survey drone supporting RGB, oblique, multispectral and LiDAR payloads.

## Recent news

- **2025-03** - Acquired AirRobot GmbH to expand its drone portfolio and strengthen technological sovereignty for the Bundeswehr and European partners. [source](https://www.eu-startups.com/2025/03/skys-the-limit-quantum-systems-acquires-airrobot-to-expand-drone-technology-portfolio/)
- **2025-11-27** - Closed a €180m Series C extension led by Balderton Capital, reported to triple its valuation to around €3bn. [source](https://techstartups.com/2025/11/27/german-drone-startup-quantum-systems-triples-valuation-to-3-5b-after-180m-funding-round/)
- **2025-12-12** - Won a Bundeswehr (BAAINBw) contract to supply Twister reconnaissance drones as the ALADIN successor, with a fixed order of 147 systems and options for up to 600 more. [source](https://dronelife.com/2025/12/12/bundeswehr-reconnaissance-drones-quantum-systems-twister/)

## Links

- Website: https://quantum-systems.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/quantum-systems-gmbh

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website, LinkedIn company page, Wikipedia, EU-Startups, Tech Startups, DroneLife, Defence Industry Europe. Funding totals and valuation drawn from trade press and aggregators; treat as reported.

companies.name: Raptor Photonics Limited
companies.summary: Northern Ireland manufacturer of high-performance, low-light digital cameras and sensor cores for surveillance, aerospace, space and scientific markets.
companies.body:
# Raptor Photonics

> Northern Ireland manufacturer of high-performance, low-light digital cameras and sensor cores for surveillance, aerospace, space and scientific markets.

## What they do

Raptor Photonics designs, manufactures and sells high-performance, low-light-level digital cameras and camera core engines for surveillance, aerospace and space, scientific and industrial OEM markets. It supplies both off-the-shelf and custom solutions using CCD, EMCCD, CMOS and InGaAs sensors across UV, visible and SWIR wavebands, with cameras built to military specifications and optimised for size, weight and power in harsh environments. Its ISTAR camera systems are deployed on electro-optic platforms from the sea-bed to space, including gimbals and turrets on air, sea and land platforms and payloads on low Earth orbit missions.

## Products and solutions

- **Eagle** - deep-cooled scientific CCD cameras.
- **Hawk** - compact, rugged CMOS cameras for electro-optic integration.
- **Owl** - SWIR and Vis-SWIR InGaAs cameras for night vision and surveillance.
- **Ninox** - cooled SWIR and Vis-SWIR InGaAs cameras.
- **Kestrel 640 eSWIR** - extended-SWIR camera with IRNova T2SL sensor, Stirling-cooled to 170K.
- **Eagle XV / Eagle XO** - X-ray cameras.
- **OEM solutions** - block cores for gimbals and EO turrets, flight-ready camera cores for space, hyperspectral and spectroscopy cores.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001:2015; IPC-A-610 Class 3; Cyber Essentials and Cyber Essentials PLUS. Cameras designed to MIL-STD-810F and MIL-STD-704F.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group; Northern Ireland Photonics (NI-PIC).

## Recent news

- **2026-04-16** - Introduced the Kestrel 640 eSWIR extended-SWIR camera (originally announced as the Owl eSWIR 640). [source](https://www.raptorphotonics.com/raptor-continues-to-innovate-with-the-owl-eswir-640/)
- **2026-04** - Launched a new 5.2MP stabilised Vis-SWIR camera (Owl 2560 family). [source](https://www.edrmagazine.eu/raptor-photonics-launches-new-5-2mp-stabilised-vis-swir-camera)

## Links

- Website: https://www.raptorphotonics.com/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/raptor-photonics-ltd/

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Sources: company website (raptorphotonics.com), ADS Group member profile (adsgroup.org.uk/members/raptor-photonics-ltd-2), Companies House (company NI060799), EDR Magazine, Northern Ireland Photonics member directory.

companies.name: Raytheon UK
companies.summary: Defence, national-security and aerospace technology company, the UK arm of RTX Corporation and a major UK MOD supplier and systems integrator.
companies.body:
# Raytheon UK

> Defence, national-security and aerospace technology company, the UK arm of RTX Corporation and a major UK MOD supplier and systems integrator.

## What they do

Raytheon UK is a landed company within the Raytheon business and part of the RTX enterprise in the UK, alongside Collins Aerospace and Pratt & Whitney. It is a major supplier to the UK government and to customers worldwide across defence and aerospace, cyber and space, and provides digital and training transformation solutions to commercial and military customers. It operates major facilities across England, Scotland and Wales with over 2,000 people; the main UK legal entity, Raytheon Systems Limited, was incorporated in 1946.

## Products and solutions

- **Weapons** - supplies the RAF with the Paveway IV precision-guided weapon and AMRAAM air-to-air missile, the Royal Navy with the Phalanx close-in weapon system, and the British Army with the Javelin anti-tank guided weapon; advanced manufacturing also supports Excalibur and TOW.
- **Sensors** - integrated sensor solutions for missile systems, the Multi-Spectral Targeting System used on Reaper, and air traffic radars and management solutions.
- **Cyber** - over 30 years of cyber security, intelligence and digital capability in defence, protecting critical information and infrastructure.
- **Space and airborne** - space domain awareness and mission intelligence, including the NORSSTrack orbital-analysis software.
- **Training transformation** - MOD training partner, prime contractor for the integrated training solution at the Future Submarine School at HMNB Clyde for Dreadnought-class submarine crews.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2026-02-09** - Raytheon UK extended its apprenticeship programme to existing staff for upskilling during National Apprenticeship Week. [source](https://www.raytheon.co.uk/news/2026/02/09/raytheon-uk-supports-skills-for-life-through-apprenticeship-opportunities)
- **2025-11-04** - Raytheon UK awarded a UK Space Agency contract to deliver an orbital-analyst capability using NORSSTrack software at the National Space Operations Centre. [source](https://www.rtx.com/news/news-center/2025/11/04/raytheon-uk-awarded-uk-space-agency-contract-to-deliver-orbital-analyst-capabilit)
- **2025-09-08** - Raytheon UK completed Paveway IV precision-guided bomb integration trials on the Eurofighter Typhoon. [source](https://www.rtx.com/news/news-center/2025/09/08/raytheon-uk-conducts-paveway-iv-precision-guided-bomb-integration-trials)

## Links

- Website: https://www.raytheon.co.uk
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/raytheon-uk

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website (raytheon.co.uk), RTX news centre, Companies House (Raytheon Systems Limited 00406809), ADS Group member listing and Airforce Technology. Owned by RTX Corporation (US parent); no specific accreditations were evidenced and are omitted.

companies.name: Real-Time Innovations (RTI)
companies.summary: Connext data-distribution software underpinning real-time, autonomous and mission-critical defence systems.
companies.body:
# Real-Time Innovations (RTI)

> Connext data-distribution software underpinning real-time, autonomous and mission-critical defence systems.

## What they do

RTI is a software framework company for intelligent physical systems. Its Connext product suite is a real-time data streaming and connectivity platform built on the Data Distribution Service (DDS) standard, used to integrate distributed, autonomous and mission-critical applications. RTI describes itself as the world's largest DDS supplier, with software embedded across hundreds of major defence programmes and autonomous-vehicle deployments.

## Products and solutions

- **Connext Professional** - software framework for building distributed real-time and physical AI systems on the DDS standard.
- **Connext product suite** - data connectivity, real-time data streaming and integration tooling for autonomous systems, command and control, and digital twins.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Standards:** built on the Object Management Group (OMG) Data Distribution Service (DDS) standard.

## Recent news

- **2026-01** - Awarded a position on the Missile Defense Agency SHIELD indefinite-delivery/indefinite-quantity (IDIQ) contract vehicle. [source](https://aeromorning.com/en/rti-awarded-position-on-mda-shield-idiq-contract/)
- **2025-03-25** - Secured a $1.25M US Air Force SBIR Phase II contract to advance Time-Sensitive Networking integration in Connext for mission-critical applications. [source](https://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2025/03/25/3048677/0/en/rti-secures-1-25m-u-s-air-force-contract-to-enhance-next-generation-data-and-networking-systems.html)

## Links

- Website: https://www.rti.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/rti

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. RTI company website (rti.com/company/about-rti, newsroom), RTI LinkedIn company page, GlobeNewswire, AeroMorning.

companies.name: Renishaw plc
companies.summary: UK-listed precision engineering company specialising in metrology, additive manufacturing and healthcare technologies, with applications across defence.
companies.body:
# Renishaw plc

> UK-listed precision engineering company specialising in metrology, additive manufacturing and healthcare technologies, with applications across defence.

## What they do

Renishaw is a manufacturer of high-precision metrology and healthcare technology. Its products and systems improve manufacturing efficiency and product quality and are used across aerospace, automotive, semiconductor, electronics, medical and defence sectors. The company designs, develops and manufactures in-house, with operations spanning around 36 countries, and is listed on the London Stock Exchange (ticker RSW) as a constituent of the FTSE 250.

## Products and solutions

- **Touch-trigger and scanning probes** - the founding product, sensors for coordinate measuring machines used for precision inspection of machined parts including defence components.
- **Coordinate measuring machine (CMM) probes, software and retrofits** - measurement and inspection systems for high-precision quality control.
- **Machine tool probes** - on-machine measurement and tool setting for CNC machining.
- **Position encoders** - linear, rotary, angle and magnetic encoders for high-accuracy motion control in robotics, semiconductors and precision machining, with relevance to guidance, optics and targeting systems.
- **Metal additive manufacturing (RenAM series)** - metal 3D-printing systems using multi-laser powder-bed fusion, marketed for defence applications including lightweight, complex metal parts.
- **Equator gauging system** - flexible, thermally insensitive shop-floor gauging with intelligent process control for automated CNC manufacturing.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** Institute of Materials, Minerals and Mining (IOM3), listed as a supplier member.

## Recent news

- **2026-02-11** - Renishaw reported record half-year revenue of £365.6m (up 7.1%), citing strong momentum in defence and semiconductor markets. [source](https://www.investegate.co.uk/announcement/rns/renishaw--rsw/half-year-financial-report/9424652)
- **2025-11-17** - Renishaw showcased defence-focused additive manufacturing, including the RenAM 500Q and TEMPUS scanning technology, at the Defense Manufacturing Conference 2025. [source](https://soldiersystems.net/2025/11/11/renishaw-to-showcase-advanced-additive-manufacturing-solutions-for-defense-at-dmc-2025/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.renishaw.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/renishaw

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website (renishaw.com), Companies House (registration 01106260), London Stock Exchange listing (RSW), Investegate financial filings and Soldier Systems. No formal accreditations were firmly evidenced and are omitted; the IOM3 entry is a supplier listing.

companies.name: Robosys Automation
companies.summary: UK developer of AI-powered maritime autonomy and smart-shipping software for crewed, lean-crewed and uncrewed vessels.
companies.body:
# Robosys Automation

> UK developer of AI-powered maritime autonomy and smart-shipping software for crewed, lean-crewed and uncrewed vessels.

## What they do

Robosys develops AI-powered maritime autonomy and smart-shipping software for crewed, lean-crewed and autonomous vessels. Its flagship VOYAGER AI software can transform a new or existing vessel into a fully autonomous uncrewed surface vessel capable of independent navigation, autonomous collision avoidance, obstacle and anti-grounding detection, and dynamic route optimisation. The company is UK-headquartered in Hamble, Southampton, with regional offices in the USA, Canada and India.

## Products and solutions

- **VOYAGER AI** - flagship maritime autonomy software suite delivering remote pilotage and advanced autonomous navigation, converting new or existing vessels into autonomous uncrewed surface vessels with collision avoidance, obstacle and anti-grounding detection and route optimisation.
- **VOYAGER AI Autonomous Navigation System (ANS)** - the autonomous navigation product within the VOYAGER AI line.
- **VOYAGER AI Simulator** - maritime simulation environment for the VOYAGER AI ANS, launched at Oceanology International 2026.
- **Subsea AI-supported navigation and vessel control** - a newer subsea product line announced following a contract for a fleet of advanced swimmer delivery vehicles.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** The Society of Maritime Industries (SMI).

## Recent news

- **2026-03-16** - Robosys launched the new VOYAGER AI Simulator at Oceanology International 2026. [source](https://smartmaritimenetwork.com/2026/03/16/robosys-launches-simulator-for-autonomous-navigation-system/)
- **2025-10-07** - Robosys secured a contract to retrofit a 26m Damen 2610 Fast Crew Supplier with VOYAGER AI, its first application in the offshore renewables sector. [source](https://www.oedigital.com/news/530832-robosys-automation-secures-offshore-wind-vessel-retrofit-contract)

## Links

- Website: https://robosysautomation.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/robosysautomation

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website (robosysautomation.com), Companies House (registration 12369867, incorporated 2019), the Society of Maritime Industries directory, Smart Maritime Network and OEDigital. Founding heritage is variously claimed at 2002 and 2012 in marketing copy against a 2019 legal incorporation, so a single founding year is omitted; headcount (~17) is from a third-party profile. No acquisition or change of control was found.

companies.name: Rockwell Collins UK Limited (Collins Aerospace)
companies.summary: UK operations of Collins Aerospace, an RTX business supplying avionics, actuation and mission systems for the global aerospace and defence industry.
companies.body:
# Collins Aerospace UK

> UK operations of Collins Aerospace, an RTX business supplying avionics, actuation and mission systems for the global aerospace and defence industry.

## What they do

Collins Aerospace, an RTX business (RTX was formerly Raytheon Technologies), designs and delivers integrated solutions for the global aerospace and defence industry. Its portfolio spans avionics, mission systems, actuation, aerostructures and connected aviation. The UK operations include manufacturing and engineering centres of excellence in the West Midlands and the South West. The UK trading entity is Rockwell Collins UK Limited; the parent RTX Corporation is headquartered in Arlington, Virginia.

## Products and solutions

- **Avionics and flight deck** - navigation, communications, datalink and attitude and heading reference systems.
- **Actuation systems** - Wolverhampton is the global headquarters for actuation manufacturing, including electric thrust reverser actuation systems (elecTRAS).
- **Electronic controls and motor systems** - Solihull centre of excellence.
- **Control, navigation and guidance** - Plymouth, for surface and air applications across defence and aerospace.
- **Aerostructures and nacelle systems** - nacelles, thrust reversers and composite aircraft doors.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group; listed on the GOV.UK Armed Forces Covenant business register.

## Recent news

- **2025-06-09** - Collins Aerospace expanded its aircraft electrification capabilities in Europe, opening a new engineering centre of excellence in Wolverhampton and an elecTRAS production line in Colomiers, France. [source](https://www.rtx.com/news/news-center/2025/06/09/rtxs-collins-aerospace-expands-aircraft-electrification-capabilities-in-europe)

## Links

- Website: https://www.collinsaerospace.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/collins-aerospace

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Sources used: Companies House (00543016), the ADS members directory, the Collins Aerospace and RTX websites, GOV.UK Armed Forces Covenant register, and Invest West Midlands. The company is a foreign-owned firm with UK operations; the headcount figure is for Collins Aerospace globally. Confirmed UK sites include Wolverhampton (over 1,300 staff), Solihull, Plymouth, Winnersh and Prestwick.

companies.name: Roke
companies.summary: British defence and national-security technology and engineering company specialising in sensors, communications, electromagnetic warfare, cyber, AI and autonomy, part of Chemring Group.
companies.body:
# Roke

> British defence and national-security technology and engineering company specialising in sensors, communications, electromagnetic warfare, cyber, AI and autonomy, part of Chemring Group.

## What they do

Roke integrates physical and digital systems to solve complex challenges across communications, sensors, cyber security, artificial intelligence and autonomy. It operates in the defence, national security and geospatial intelligence sectors for public and private clients, delivering advanced research and development, services and technologies. It is also a recognised crypto test house for UK Government.

## Products and solutions

- **CORTEXA GUARDIAN** - modular, mast-mounted system combining RADAR and PTZ sensor inputs for autonomous detect, track and identify, enhancing counter-UAS.
- **EM-Vis Deceive** - electromagnetic attack system.
- **EM-Vis Resolve** - electromagnetic warfare system for interception and location of radio communications signals.
- **Pattern of Life** - cyber-range solution providing realistic user emulation to test security teams and optimise cyber ranges.
- **Tactical wideband EW sensor** - adaptive beamforming and direction finding for electromagnetic awareness in contested environments.
- **Dismounted EW sensor** - field-proven find, fix and intercept against peer threats.
- **Acoustic sensor system** - detection and geolocation of artillery fire.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** Recognised UK Government crypto test house.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group member; Counter-EO UK member.

## Recent news

- **2026-04-30** - Launched the "Works with Roke" defence partner scheme, an integration framework giving an interoperability badge to tested partner products. [source](https://thedefensepost.com/2026/04/30/roke-integration-defense-partners/)
- **2025-04** - Won a UK MoD missile-defence research contract worth up to £251m, becoming delivery lead for Project STORM at the MoD Missile Defence Centre. [source](https://thedefensepost.com/2025/04/18/roke-uk-missile-defense/)
- **2025-01-14** - Announced a strategic supply agreement with a major US prime contractor. [source](https://www.chemring.com/media/press-releases/2025/14-01-2025)

## Links

- Website: https://www.roke.co.uk/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/roke-manor-research

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website (roke.co.uk), LinkedIn company page, Companies House (00267550), ADS member directory, Chemring Group press releases, and reputable defence press (The Defense Post, Army Technology, Janes). Legal entity is Roke Manor Research Limited; founded 1956 as Plessey Research Roke Manor. Current owner is Chemring Group PLC (since 2010). Public headcount figures vary between approximately 350 (engineers and scientists) and approximately 1,000 (total, per filings); both place it in the large band.

companies.name: Sagentia Defence
companies.summary: Defence science and technology consultancy, formerly TP Group, part of Science Group plc.
companies.body:
# Sagentia Defence

> Defence science and technology consultancy, formerly TP Group, part of Science Group plc.

## What they do

Sagentia Defence, formerly TP Group, provides science and technology consultancy on mission-critical defence programmes. It positions itself as an independent, agnostic adviser and a trusted customer friend to the MOD, with defence experience spanning over 60 years. It works with national government bodies, international institutions and global prime contractors on systems engineering, feasibility analysis, enterprise transformation and programme delivery across the science and technology, maritime, air, land, joint, space and defence digital domains, across the full CADMID lifecycle. It is part of Science Group plc, an LSE-listed science and technology group headquartered near Cambridge that consolidated several consultancies under the Sagentia brand in 2025.

## Products and solutions

- **Operational analysis** - technology analysis, roadmapping, modelling and simulation, requirements and decision analysis.
- **Cost engineering** - independent cost modelling, estimating and risk analysis.
- **Project, programme and portfolio management (P3M)** - managing complex defence programmes from inception to delivery.
- **Safety assurance and certification** - through-life safety across civil and military domains.
- **Supportability engineering** - integrated logistics support and supply chain management against MOD standards.
- **Systems engineering** - full lifecycle, applying ISO 15288.
- **Analysis and innovation** - pre-concept analysis, rapid concept generation and prototyping.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ISO 9001; ISO/IEC 27001:2022; Cyber Essentials; Cyber Essentials PLUS; JOSCAR registered.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group; INCOSE UK; APM; IET; IMechE; Operational Research Society; SCAF.

## Recent news

- **2025-03-17** - Launched the Sagentia Defence brand, replacing TP Group and integrating more than 300 consultants. [source](https://sagentia.com/news/sagentia-defence-a-new-era-for-the-former-tp-group/)
- **2026** - Published an insight on defence readiness as the defining priority for 2026, tied to the 2025 Strategic Defence Review. [source](https://sagentia.com/insight/defence-in-2026-readiness-is-the-defining-priority/)

## Links

- Website: https://sagentia.com/defence/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/sagentiadefence

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Sources: Sagentia Defence website (sagentia.com/defence), ADS Group member profile (adsgroup.org.uk/members/sagentia-defence-1), Science Group plc (sciencegroup.com), Companies House. Note: Sagentia Defence is a practice brand of Science Group plc (formerly TP Group, acquired January 2023); a single definitive legal entity name and registration number for the defence brand is not cleanly confirmable on the public register, so omitted. The large size band reflects the Science Group total of around 540 employees; standalone defence headcount is not public. The defence practice is Bristol-centred; the group is headquartered at Harston, near Cambridge.

companies.name: Satellite Applications Catapult Limited
companies.summary: UK not-for-profit space technology innovation centre, part of the Catapult Network sponsored by Innovate UK.
companies.body:
# Satellite Applications Catapult

> UK not-for-profit space technology innovation centre, part of the Catapult Network sponsored by Innovate UK.

## What they do

The Satellite Applications Catapult is an independent, not-for-profit innovation and technology company that helps businesses of all sizes realise the potential of space. It works with businesses, researchers, investors, government and end-users to develop satellite-based products, services and applications, taking ideas from concept to market with the aim of growing the UK's share of the global space market. It is a private company limited by guarantee, established in 2013 as one of the first Catapult centres and government-backed via Innovate UK.

## Products and solutions

- **Autonomous and Connected Earth** - work on safe adoption of autonomous systems and integration of satellite with terrestrial networks, including PNT, connectivity and resilient communications.
- **Beyond Earth** - the in-space economy and In-orbit Servicing, Assembly and Manufacturing (ISAM), supported by a robotics test facility at Westcott.
- **Resilient Earth** - Earth observation and geospatial work for environment, emissions and resilient communities.
- **Defence and security programme** - dedicated programme convening the Defence in Space community across MilSatcom, space ISR, space domain awareness, PNT and space security and cyber.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group.
- **Programmes:** Part of the UK Catapult Network sponsored by Innovate UK (UKRI).

## Recent news

- **2025-10-28** - Hosted a defence community session at Defence in Space 2025 in London, covering space ISR, space domain awareness, MilSatcom and space security and cyber. [source](https://sa.catapult.org.uk/events/defence-in-space-2025/)
- **2025-04-16** - Began a collaboration with The Aerospace Corporation UK on in-orbit servicing, linking robotics facilities at Westcott and El Segundo, California. [source](https://sa.catapult.org.uk/news/satellite-applications-catapult-and-the-aerospace-corporation-uk-collaboration-on-in-orbit-servicing-and-capabilities/)

## Links

- Website: https://sa.catapult.org.uk
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/satellite-applications-catapult/

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Organisation website (sa.catapult.org.uk), Companies House (no. 07964746), LinkedIn company page, The Aerospace Corporation newsroom, Electronics Weekly. Specific ISO certifications not publicly stated.

companies.name: Savox Communications
companies.summary: Tactical communications and hearing-protection headsets and systems for defence and security users.
companies.body:
# Savox Communications

> Tactical communications and hearing-protection headsets and systems for defence and security users.

## What they do

Savox Communications designs and manufactures rugged hearing-protection and communication solutions for defence, law enforcement, fire and rescue, maritime and industrial users. The company combines in-house design, engineering and manufacturing, and supplies radio-accessory products to leading radio and personal-protection-equipment manufacturers. It has over 40 years of experience and operations spanning Finland, Germany, the United Kingdom and the United States.

## Products and solutions

- **Noise-COM 200x2** - next-generation tactical hearing-protection and communications headset for dismounted, mounted and training environments.
- **TRICS Ci4** - tactical radio and intercom controller integrating radio, satellite and data traffic, with ATAK access for digital situational awareness; built to MIL-STD 810G.
- **Savox Bridge** - digital platform for enhanced information flow across tactical teams.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Standards:** products engineered to MIL-STD 810G.

## Recent news

- **2026-03** - Unveiled the next-generation Noise-COM 200x2 tactical hearing-protection headset at EnforceTac 2026. [source](https://www.savox.com/news/savox-communications-unveiled-the-next-generation-noise-com-200lesssupgreaterx2le)
- **2025-05** - Launched the TRICS Ci4 tactical communication platform with TAK plug-in command and control. [source](https://defence-industry.eu/savox-communications-unveils-new-tactical-communication-platform-with-launch-of-trics-ci4/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.savox.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/savox-communications-ltd

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Savox company website (savox.com/about-savox, news), Savox LinkedIn company page, defence-industry.eu, MenaFN.

companies.name: Sayari Labs, Inc.
companies.summary: US supply-chain and commercial-risk intelligence provider serving government, defence and national security customers.
companies.body:
# Sayari

> US supply-chain and commercial-risk intelligence provider serving government, defence and national security customers.

## What they do

Sayari is a counterparty and supply chain risk intelligence provider used by government agencies, multinational corporations and financial institutions. Its network analysis platform surfaces hidden risk through integrated corporate ownership, supply chain, trade transaction and risk intelligence data drawn from primary sources across more than 250 jurisdictions. It serves government, defence, border security, law enforcement and national security customers with use cases including counter-proliferation, sanctions and export-control enforcement, forced-labour detection and supply-chain security.

## Products and solutions

- **Sayari Graph** - corporate and trade network platform for entity mapping, relationship discovery and ownership intelligence, built on primary-source records.
- **Sayari Map** - supply chain mapping and bulk risk screening covering forced labour, sanctions and ESG exposure.
- **Sayari Signal** - risk screening data platform consolidating sanctions, export control and regulatory screening, including owned-uk exposure.
- **Sayari API** - programmatic access to the risk intelligence data.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Programmes:** US Customs and Border Protection enterprise contracts, including a DHS CBP SBIR Phase III award.

## Recent news

- **2024-04-16** - Closed a $235m strategic majority growth investment from TPG, inclusive of capital for organic growth and M&A. [source](https://www.tpg.com/news-and-insights/sayari-closes-235-million-strategic-investment-from-tpg-inclusive-of-additional-capital-for-organic-growth-and-ma)
- **2025** - Secured an expanded contract with US Customs and Border Protection to strengthen national trade security. [source](https://sayari.com/resources/newsroom/pr-sayari-secures-expanded-contract-with-cbp-to-strengthen-national-trade-security/)

## Links

- Website: https://sayari.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/sayarilabs

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website (sayari.com), LinkedIn company page, TPG newsroom, BusinessWire, PR Newswire, Security & Policing 2026 exhibitor listing, PitchBook. Majority-owned by TPG since 2024. Specific security certifications (SOC 2, ISO 27001, FedRAMP) not publicly confirmed.

companies.name: ScioTeq
companies.summary: Rugged avionics displays, consoles and visualisation systems for military and civil aircraft and air traffic control.
companies.body:
# ScioTeq

> Rugged avionics displays, consoles and visualisation systems for military and civil aircraft and air traffic control.

## What they do

ScioTeq designs and manufactures high-performance visualisation and display solutions for the avionics, defence and air traffic control markets. The company draws on a 40-year heritage in the field and operates manufacturing facilities in Belgium and the United States. Its displays are fielded on more than 150 aircraft types, civil and military.

## Products and solutions

- **Rugged avionics displays** - high-performance ruggedised cockpit and mission displays for fixed- and rotary-wing platforms.
- **Avionics display computers and consoles** - mission computing and video distribution for defence platforms.
- **ATC displays** - air traffic control visualisation systems.
- **AM-817 Airborne Mission Display** - next-generation airborne mission display.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Platforms:** displays fielded on military aircraft including F-16, F-35, C-130, A400M, A330 MRTT, C-27J, P-8 and PC-21.

## Recent news

- **2026-03-10** - Selected by Eaton Aerospace Group to provide the visualisation and control solution for an air-to-air refuelling system. [source](https://www.scioteq.com/en/news)
- **2026-02-24** - Advanced display selected for the Pilatus PC-7 MKX Smart Basic Trainer. [source](https://www.scioteq.com/en/news/scioteq-advanced-display-selected-pc-7-mkx-smart-basic-trainer)
- **2025-06-16** - OpenGate Capital entered a binding agreement to sell ScioTeq to Tikehau Capital's aerospace and defence fund, retaining a minority stake. [source](https://opengatecapital.com/news/opengate-capital-enters-into-binding-agreement-to-sell-scioteq-to-tikehau-capital/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.scioteq.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/scioteq

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. ScioTeq company website (scioteq.com/en, news), ScioTeq LinkedIn company page, OpenGate Capital, European Times.

companies.name: Serco Group plc
companies.summary: Defence and government support services provider, listed on the London Stock Exchange.
companies.body:
# Serco Group plc

> Defence and government support services provider, listed on the London Stock Exchange.

## What they do

Serco is a British multinational services company providing support across defence, space, justice, migration, health, customer services and transport. Its defence business operates and maintains military bases, provides marine and fleet support, training and mission-support services for the UK Ministry of Defence and international customers. Serco generated around £1.89 billion of defence revenue in 2024, roughly 35 per cent of group revenue. It is a constituent of the FTSE 250.

## Products and solutions

- **Base and estate support** - operation and maintenance of RAF and Royal Navy sites including Brize Norton, Northolt, Portsmouth, Devonport and Clyde.
- **Marine services** - in-service support for Royal Navy and British Army marine fleets.
- **Training and mission support** - synthetic warfare training and operational support for defence customers in the UK and internationally.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group (UK aerospace, defence, security and space trade association).

## Recent news

- **2026-05-19** - Awarded a five-year, $90M (£65M) US Army contract for mission support of the Planning Programming Budgeting Business Operating System. [source](https://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2026/05/19/3297617/0/en/Serco-Awarded-90-Million-Army-Contract-Strengthening-Leadership-in-Mission-Support-and-Operations.html)
- **2026** - Won a seven-year contract to provide in-service support for the British Army's fleet of 512 marine vessels, starting April 2026. [source](https://www.serco.com/uk/media-and-news/2026/serco-wins-contract-to-support-british-armys-marine-assets-fleet)

## Links

- Website: https://www.serco.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/serco

companies.summary: Manufacturer of firearms, weapon systems, ammunition and electro-optics for military and law enforcement.
companies.body:
# SIG SAUER, Inc.

> Manufacturer of firearms, weapon systems, ammunition and electro-optics for military and law enforcement.

## What they do

SIG SAUER, Inc. is a US-based manufacturer of firearms, electro-optics, ammunition, suppressors, airguns, remote weapon stations and training. Headquartered in Newington, New Hampshire, with over 3,200 employees across twelve locations in three states, it blends American, German and Swiss engineering heritage. The US company forms part of the wider SIG SAUER group under Germany's L&O Holding, which also owns the German SIG SAUER GmbH & Co. KG.

## Products and solutions

- **XM7 (M7) rifle** - 6.8mm rifle selected for the US Army Next Generation Squad Weapon programme.
- **XM250 automatic rifle** - 6.8mm automatic rifle under the same NGSW programme.
- **XM8 carbine** - shorter NGSW carbine variant of the M7 rifle.
- **6.8 Common Cartridge ammunition** - family of ammunition supplied alongside the NGSW weapons.
- **Electro-optics and suppressors** - sighting systems and sound suppressors for military and law enforcement use.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Programmes:** prime contractor on the US Army Next Generation Squad Weapon (NGSW) programme.

## Recent news

- **2026-04** - US Army accepted first deliveries of the XM8 carbine, a new variant of the 6.8mm M7 rifle. [source](https://www.nationaldefensemagazine.org/articles/2026/6/11/army-introduces-new-xm8-carbine-for-close-combat-ops)
- **2025-10** - Displayed the Product Improvement Effort (PIE) M7, lightened by about 0.7 lb, at the AUSA Annual Meeting. [source](https://news.clearancejobs.com/2026/03/24/why-the-army-is-developing-a-new-xm8-variant-of-its-m7-rifle/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.sigsauer.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/sigsauer

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. SIG SAUER company website (sigsauer.com/company, history, blog), SIG SAUER LinkedIn company page, US Army (army.mil), National Defense Magazine, Wikipedia.

companies.name: Silvus Technologies
companies.summary: Developer of high-speed mobile ad-hoc network (MANET) tactical radios and mesh networking technology.
companies.body:
# Silvus Technologies

> Developer of high-speed mobile ad-hoc network (MANET) tactical radios and mesh networking technology.

## What they do

Silvus Technologies develops software-defined MANET radio systems for secure data, video and voice communications without fixed infrastructure. Its proprietary MN-MIMO waveform creates a self-forming, adaptive mesh network able to link hundreds of nodes. Customers span military, law enforcement, public safety, autonomous systems manufacturers and commercial users worldwide. Silvus is a Motorola Solutions company following the 2025 acquisition.

## Products and solutions

- **StreamCaster MANET radios** - family of tactical mesh radios providing high-fidelity video, voice and IP data, used on the ground, in the air and at sea.
- **StreamCaster MINI 5200 (SM5200)** - compact 182-gram 2x2 MIMO MANET radio with up to two watts output power and up to 100 Mbps data throughput.
- **StreamCaster NEXUS** - chest-mounted next-generation tactical networking system for dismounted military operators, built around the SM5200 radio.
- **MN-MIMO waveform** - proprietary waveform underpinning the self-forming mesh network across the product range.

## Recent news

- **2025-10-08** - Silvus launched StreamCaster NEXUS, a tactical networking system for dismounted military operators. [source](https://www.motorolasolutions.com/newsroom/press-releases/silvus-technologies-launches-streamcaster-nexus.html)
- **2025-08-06** - Motorola Solutions completed its acquisition of Silvus Technologies. [source](https://www.motorolasolutions.com/newsroom/press-releases/motorola-solutions-completes-acquisition-of-silvus-technologies.html)
- **2025-05-27** - Motorola Solutions announced an agreement to acquire Silvus Technologies for approximately 4.4 billion US dollars in up-front consideration. [source](https://www.motorolasolutions.com/newsroom/press-releases/motorola-solutions-to-acquire-silvus-technologies.html)

## Links

- Website: https://silvustechnologies.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/silvus-technologies

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website, Motorola Solutions newsroom press releases, Military Embedded Systems.

companies.name: Simthetiq
companies.summary: Provider of military simulation, 3D models and synthetic training environments.
companies.body:
# Simthetiq

> Provider of military simulation, 3D models and synthetic training environments.

## What they do

Simthetiq is a Montreal-based provider of 3D solutions for the defence sector, offering visual systems, 3D model libraries, synthetic environments and virtual training. Its synthetic environments are geo-specific or geo-typical and adaptable to training requirements, supplied in standard industry formats. The 3D content is designed as plug-and-play with common simulation software and is compatible with simulation protocols such as DIS and HLA.

## Products and solutions

- **Synthetic terrains** - modular and comprehensive geo-specific and geo-typical terrains for a range of simulation activities.
- **3D model library** - simulation entity models and 3D content for training and simulation, supplied in standard industry formats.
- **Immersive training environments** - geo-specific synthetic environments and immersive classroom solutions for military end users.

## Recent news

- **2022-04-15** - Simthetiq was awarded a multi-year contract from the Canadian Department of National Defence to provide simulation entity models in support of the Canadian Advanced Synthetic Environment (CASE) programme. [source](https://www.simthetiq.com/news/simthetiq-awarded-multi-year-contract-in-support-of-canadian-advanced-synthetic-environment-program-2/)
- Simthetiq delivered an immersive training classroom to the Royal Canadian Navy using the Station IX display environment. [source](https://simthetiq.com/news/simthetiq-delivers-immersive-training-classroom-to-the-royal-canadian-navy/)
- Simthetiq delivered large-scale and immersive geo-specific synthetic training environments for NATO military end users. [source](https://canadiandefencereview.com/simthetiq-delivers-large-scale-synthetic-training-environment-for-nato-military-end-user/)

## Links

- Website: https://simthetiq.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/simthetiq

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website, Canadian Defence Review, Shephard Media.

companies.name: Sintela Limited
companies.summary: Bristol manufacturer of distributed fibre-optic sensing systems for security, perimeter and infrastructure monitoring.
companies.body:
# Sintela

> Bristol manufacturer of distributed fibre-optic sensing systems for security, perimeter and infrastructure monitoring.

## What they do

Sintela designs, manufactures and field-supports distributed fibre-optic sensing (DFOS) systems, with particular expertise in distributed acoustic sensing (DAS). Its ONYX systems turn existing fibre-optic cable into a long-range sensing platform that detects strain, temperature and acoustic changes for security, perimeter intrusion detection and infrastructure monitoring. Applications span pipelines, telecoms and power cables, railways, highways, mining, subsea cables, geophysical monitoring and border surveillance.

## Products and solutions

- **ONYX nano** - short-range DAS interrogator (1 to under 20 km) for small sites.
- **ONYX peta** - standard-range DAS interrogator (around 20 to 75 km per fibre) for medium sites.
- **ONYX peta EX** - long-range DAS interrogator (around 75 to 200 km per fibre) for large sites.
- **Operating System Software (OSS)** - core firmware with REST API, Modbus and SNMP integration.
- **Industry Application Software (IAS)** - bespoke application-specific user interfaces, with AI detection and classification.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** ONYX conforms with FCC, CE and RoHS; tested against the Center for Internet Security (CIS) Benchmarks; reliability calculated per Telcordia SR-332.
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Recent news

- **2026-04-01** - Press coverage of a US border security contract with a ceiling increased to $200m, using fibre-optic AI sensing for US Customs and Border Protection. [source](https://businesscircle.co/2026/04/01/uk-firm-sintela-wins-200m-us-border-contract-using-fibre-optic-ai-sensing/)
- **2026-05-15** - Exhibited at the 27th World Mining Congress 2026. [source](https://sintela.com/sintela-at-27th-world-mining-congress-2026/)
- **2026-03-26** - Shortlisted for a 2026 British Business Award in the Growth Strategy of the Year category. [source](https://sintela.com/sintela-shortlisted-for-a-2026-british-business-award/)

## Links

- Website: https://sintela.com/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/sintela

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Sources: company website (sintela.com), ADS Group member profile (adsgroup.org.uk/members/sintela-ltd-2), Companies House (company 11015440), Business Circle, Western Morning News. Note: exact headcount is not publicly confirmed; ADS describes Sintela as an SME and 2026 press reported recruitment in the dozens, supporting the small band. The website footer carries an ISO logo but the specific standard is not named publicly, so omitted.

companies.name: Sirius Analysis Limited
companies.summary: Independent defence analysis and digital services consultancy.
companies.body:
# Sirius Analysis Limited

> Independent defence analysis and digital services consultancy.

## What they do

Sirius Analysis is an independent consultancy delivering operational analysis and data science, cost engineering, systems engineering, P3MO, digital services and business case development. It provides services to the UK Ministry of Defence, the wider defence industry and NATO, using evidence-based analysis to improve the operational effectiveness and value for money of defence systems, platforms and services. The company also works across the nuclear, space and energy sectors and operates from multiple UK offices.

## Products and solutions

- **Operational analysis and data science** - evidence-based analysis to inform defence decisions.
- **Cost engineering** - cost analysis and estimation for defence projects.
- **Systems engineering** - engineering support across defence platforms and services.
- **P3MO and business case development** - portfolio, programme and project support and business case work.
- **Digital services** - digital and data services delivered to government and industry.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

companies.name: Skua Defence Limited
companies.summary: UK firm building uncrewed air system capability for allied militaries using training and simulation proven on the Ukrainian frontline.
companies.body:
# Skua Defence

> UK firm building uncrewed air system capability for allied militaries using training and simulation proven on the Ukrainian frontline.

## What they do

Skua Defence is a UK company formed by former Ukrainian and British military officers to help allied and partner forces build uncrewed air system capability. It draws on a network in Ukraine spanning training centres, simulator developers, military units and manufacturers, and applies that frontline experience to instructor development, simulation and training design. The company also advises on protecting sites against drone attack through layered defensive systems and operator training.

## Products and solutions

- **UAS capability development** - instructor-cadre development, realistic simulation and training design intended to translate into operational capability for NATO and aligned militaries.
- **Counter-drone site protection** - risk assessment and layered defensive design to detect, respond to and recover from drone incidents, drawing on operator experience from Ukraine.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Frameworks:** Listed as an approved supplier on the Constellia neutral-vendor managed service platform.

## Recent news

[source](https://www.nextgov.com/defense/2025/12/now-you-can-train-next-drone-war-simulated-ukrainian-front-lines/410279/)

companies.summary: Designer and manufacturer of automotive, traffic and defence radar sensors.

# smartmicro

> Designer and manufacturer of automotive, traffic and defence radar sensors.

## What they do

smartmicro designs, develops and manufactures radar solutions for traffic management, automotive and airborne applications, as well as defence. The company was founded in 1997 as a spin-off from the Technical University of Braunschweig, where it is headquartered, combining development, testing and production on one campus. Its defence offering draws on automotive and traffic radar experience and includes long-range radar and airborne applications, with all development carried out in Germany. smartmicro has subsidiaries in the United Kingdom and the United States.

## Products and solutions

- **Defence radar** - radar-based detection and tracking of small, low-flying and fast-moving objects for drone detection and infrastructure protection.
- **Automotive radar sensors** - high-performance radar sensors for automotive applications.
- **Traffic management radar** - radar sensors for traffic management and intelligent transport systems.
- **Engineering services** - radar engineering services for automotive radar sensors.

## Recent news

- smartmicro promotes its defence radar solutions for drone detection and the protection of critical infrastructure such as energy facilities, airports and military bases, with development carried out in Germany. [source](https://www.smartmicro.com/defense-radar-solutions/)

## Links

- Website: https://www.smartmicro.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/smartmicro

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website and company profile, AutoSens organisation listing.

# Spherea UK

> UK arm of the Spherea group, supplying automatic test equipment and in-service support for military, aerospace and space applications.

## What they do

Spherea Test & Services Ltd designs, manufactures, supplies, services, repairs and integrates electronic test equipment and diagnostic solutions, with related software and product development, across the full life cycle of critical applications for military, aerospace, space and other civil markets. It positions itself as a recognised partner to the UK Ministry of Defence, leading primes and international customers, citing more than 50 years of experience delivering test solutions to the UK defence sector. It is the UK entity of the wider Spherea group, headquartered in France.

## Products and solutions

- **ATEC Series 7** - generic-purpose avionic MRO test benches used by airlines, OEMs and MROs to verify conformity of critical avionic electronic equipment.
- **ATEC Dyna Series** - modular, scalable production automatic test equipment for high-throughput avionics manufacturing with parallel multi-unit testing.
- **ATEC ATMOS** - compact, open automatic test bench for electronic equipment with a reduced signal count, covering avionics and mechatronic and optronic applications.
- **U-Test** - software and simulation platform combining models from different environments with real equipment to create a digital twin.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

companies.name: STARK Defence
companies.summary: European defence technology company building AI-enabled uncrewed systems and loitering munitions.
companies.body:
# STARK Defence

> European defence technology company building AI-enabled uncrewed systems and loitering munitions.

## What they do

STARK is a European defence technology company specialising in uncrewed systems across multiple domains. It develops and manufactures loitering munitions and the mission software to operate them, and supplies the German Bundeswehr and other NATO states. The company was established in 2024 and has operations across Germany, Ukraine, the United Kingdom, Greece and Sweden.

## Products and solutions

- **OWE-V Virtus** - electrically powered VTOL loitering munition. Public specifications cite a cruise speed of around 120 km/h, a dive speed of up to 250 km/h, a 5 kg warhead and an endurance of around 60 minutes.
- **Minerva** - mission control software suite for precision-strike coordination, including operation in GNSS-denied or data-link-degraded conditions, integration with battle management systems, and coordination of synchronised strike actions.

## Recent news

- **2026-06-23** - STARK confirmed a EUR 500 million Series C round co-led by Sequoia Capital and Founders Fund, with backers including the NATO Innovation Fund, valuing the company above EUR 3.5 billion. [Sifted](https://sifted.eu/articles/stark-defence-drones-funding-round-confirms) [Tech.eu](https://tech.eu/2026/06/23/stark-bags-eur500-million-in-new-funding/)
- **2026** - Germany approved procurement of medium-range loitering munitions from STARK and Helsing. [Army Recognition](https://www.armyrecognition.com/news/aerospace-news/2026/germany-approves-540m-medium-range-loitering-munition-procurement-from-helsing-and-stark-defence-firms)

## Links

- Website: https://stark-defence.com/en
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/stark-defence/

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website (stark-defence.com), STARK LinkedIn company page, Wikipedia (STARK), Sifted, Tech.eu, Army Recognition.

# Stirling Dynamics Ltd

> Advanced engineering consultancy delivering control systems, simulation and technical services across aerospace and marine, part of the Expleo Group.

## What they do

Stirling Dynamics is an advanced engineering company providing high-end engineering products and services to civil and military aerospace and marine programmes worldwide. It specialises in active control technologies, system monitoring, simulation and modelling, and has worked on over 70 different aircraft types. The company has a long heritage in submarine control systems and marine consultancy. It has been part of the Expleo Group since 2018.

# STS Defence

> Defence electronics, communications and engineering company specialising in naval and air defence systems, part of the Cicor Group.

## What they do

STS Defence is a UK-based technology and engineering company specialising in mission-critical, secure communications and networks, electronic warfare and control, and instrumentation systems. It operates primarily in the naval and air defence markets, helping customers design, assemble and integrate equipment and systems and support capability through-life. It has been a wholly owned subsidiary of the Swiss-listed Cicor Group since October 2023.

## Products and solutions

- **Ships communications masts** - configurable, integrated main communications masts for naval warships.
- **UHF satellite communications** - delivery and through-life support of mission-critical UHF SatCom systems.
- **Integration and support** - system integration plus Integrated Logistic Support aligned to MoD principles, covering reliability engineering, repairs, spares and obsolescence management.
- **Electronic warfare and instrumentation** - specialist EW support and instrumentation, sensors and control systems for marine and harsh environments.
- **Electronics manufacturing** - fabrication, assembly and testing of consoles, cabinets, box builds, PCBAs and cable harnesses (via Cicor integration).

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

companies.name: SubSea Craft
companies.summary: British advanced maritime-technology company designing, testing and manufacturing high-speed surface and sub-surface and uncrewed platforms for special-forces and naval defence customers.
companies.body:
# SubSea Craft

> British advanced maritime-technology company designing, testing and manufacturing high-speed surface and sub-surface and uncrewed platforms for special-forces and naval defence customers.

## What they do

SubSea Craft is a UK specialist maritime-technology manufacturer that designs, tests and builds advanced maritime platforms at pace, working with military partners to equip operators with the latest technology. Its flagship is VICTA, a dual-domain craft that transits at high speed on the surface then submerges to covertly insert and recover divers and payloads. It operates an integrated design, prototype, test and build facility at The Camber in Old Portsmouth.

## Products and solutions

- **VICTA** - flagship diver delivery unit. An optionally-manned carbon-fibre craft that runs at 40-plus knots on the surface then floods ballast tanks to submerge for covert insertion and recovery of divers and payloads in contested environments. Can be helm, umbilical or autonomously operated.
- **MARS (Maritime Autonomy Reconnaissance System)** - a compact, modular, multi-role uncrewed surface vessel for offensive operations, ISR and logistics; low-signature and mission-configurable.
- **CADDIS** - a marinised uncrewed aerial vehicle launchable underwater from a submerged VICTA or by a diver, transitioning to flight to deliver ISR and targeting information.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group member; Armed Forces Covenant signatory.

## Recent news

- **2026-05-21** - Announced US expansion, selecting Virginia Beach as its US hub. [source](https://thedefensepost.com/2026/05/21/subsea-craft-us-expansion/)
- **2026-05** - MARS USV entered production, with an upgraded variant in advanced testing against a customer contract. [source](https://www.navalnews.com/naval-news/2026/05/subsea-craft-advances-mars-usv-as-production-begins/)
- **2025-01-29** - Appointed the Rt Hon Penny Mordaunt as Chair of the Board. [source](https://subseacraft.com/subsea-craft-announces-penny-mordaunt-as-new-chair-of-the-board/)

## Links

- Website: https://subseacraft.com/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/subseacraft-limited

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website (subseacraft.com), LinkedIn company page, Companies House (08930367), ADS member directory, GOV.UK Armed Forces Covenant register, and reputable defence and maritime press (Naval News, Navy Lookout, Janes, Army Recognition). Incorporated 10 March 2014; the VICTA project began in 2018. No single authoritative public headcount figure was found; third-party figures range from approximately 48 to approximately 200, placing it most likely in the medium band.

companies.name: Systematic
companies.summary: Developer of defence command and control and battle-management software, including the SitaWare suite.
companies.body:
# Systematic

> Developer of defence command and control and battle-management software, including the SitaWare suite.

## What they do

Systematic, established in 1985 and headquartered in Aarhus, is Denmark's largest privately owned software company, with solutions sold in over 50 countries. It develops software for the public and private sectors, including defence command and control. Its SitaWare suite is combat-proven commercial off-the-shelf software providing C4ISR and battle-management capabilities across land, sea, air and joint domains, with interoperability for coalition operations. SitaWare is used by more than 50 countries, including most NATO nations.

## Products and solutions

- **SitaWare Suite** - C4ISR and battle-management software offering command-and-control across the battlespace and coalition interoperability.
- **SitaWare Headquarters** - command-and-control software for planning and conducting operations; selected by NATO as its standard system for land operations.
- **SitaWare BattleCloud** - cloud-native evolution of the SitaWare Suite, extending capabilities from fixed headquarters to mobile users at the tactical edge.

## Recent news

- **2026-01** - The French Army's 3rd Division adopted SitaWare Headquarters C2 software. [source](https://euro-sd.com/2026/01/major-news/48619/french-army-adopts-sitaware-hq/)
- **2025-07-15** - Systematic launched SitaWare BattleCloud, a cloud-native version of the SitaWare Suite. [source](https://systematic.com/us/industries/defense/news-knowledge/news/systematic-introduces-cutting-edge-cloud-enabled-c4isr-enhancements-to-the-acclaimed-sitaware-suite/)
- **2024-04** - NATO selected SitaWare Headquarters as its standard system for planning and conducting land operations. [source](https://euro-sd.com/2024/04/major-news/37625/nato-selects-sitaware-hg/)

## Links

- Website: https://systematic.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/systematic

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website and newsroom, European Security and Defence, Army Technology, The Defense Post.

companies.name: Tadaweb
companies.summary: Luxembourg company building a publicly available information (PAI) and open-source intelligence (OSINT) platform for defence, national security and public safety.
companies.body:
# Tadaweb

> Luxembourg company building a publicly available information (PAI) and open-source intelligence (OSINT) platform for defence, national security and public safety.

## What they do

Tadaweb is a Luxembourg-headquartered software company that builds a PAI and OSINT platform used by defence, national security, public safety, cyber threat intelligence and corporate security organisations. The platform ingests publicly available and commercially available information and integrates with third-party web tools and APIs, combining technology with human analysis under a stated emphasis on transparency and ethics. Its "Small Data" approach is designed to augment analysts rather than replace them, keeping the human in control rather than relying on a black box.

## Products and solutions

- **PAI and OSINT platform** - core SaaS platform that ingests publicly and commercially available information and integrates with third-party web tools and APIs.
- **Small Data approach** - combines precise data points to reduce time to insight while keeping the analyst in control.
- **Low/no-code visual query engine** - visual query capability cited by investors as a differentiator.
- **Maritime Domain Awareness** - capability for national security customers announced for launch in 2026.

## Recent news

- **2025-06-19** - Raised around $20m to scale its Small Data PAI and OSINT platform, in a round led by Arsenal Growth and Forgepoint Capital International with existing investor Wendel. [source](https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20250619691508/en/Tadaweb-raises-$20-million-to-scale-Small-Data-PAI-and-OSINT-Operating-System)

## Links

- Website: https://www.tadaweb.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/tadaweb/

## Sources

companies.name: Teledyne Defence & Space
companies.summary: UK manufacturer of RF and microwave components, sub-systems and systems for defence, space, electronic warfare, radar and communications.
companies.body:
# Teledyne Defence & Space

> UK manufacturer of RF and microwave components, sub-systems and systems for defence, space, electronic warfare, radar and communications.

## What they do

Teledyne Defence & Space (TDS) designs, develops and manufactures complex integrated RF and microwave solutions from its site in Shipley, West Yorkshire. It is a business unit of Teledyne Microwave Solutions and part of the US-listed Teledyne group. TDS supports defence, space, security, electronic warfare, radar and communications customers, and describes itself as a supplier of ITAR-free and ITAR-compliant microwave products with over 40 years of heritage, tracing its origins to Filtronic Components Ltd.

## Products and solutions

- **Radar Warning Receivers (RWR)** - threat-warning receiver systems.
- **ELINT and ESM receivers** - electronic intelligence and electronic support measures receivers, including the Phobos radar ESM system offering 360 degree passive detection.
- **Multi-function assemblies** - DIFM, DLVA, channelisers, converters, synthesisers and switch multiplexers.
- **Filters and components** - bandpass, suspended substrate stripline, tunable, combline filters and multiplexers.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** describes products as ITAR-free and ITAR-compliant. Holder of the Queen's Award for Enterprise 2019 (International Trade) and 2020 (Innovation).
- **Memberships:** ADS Group.

## Links

- Website: https://www.teledynedefence.co.uk
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/teledyne-defence-and-space

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website, ADS members directory.

companies.name: Telent Technology Services Limited
companies.summary: Technology company designing, building and maintaining critical network and communications infrastructure across UK and Ireland defence and public sector.
companies.body:
# Telent

> Technology company designing, building and maintaining critical network and communications infrastructure across UK and Ireland defence and public sector.

## What they do

Telent is a UK and Ireland technology company specialising in the design, build, operation and maintenance of critical digital and communications infrastructure. It draws on decades of experience in mission-critical communications and operational technology across transport, emergency services, network providers, defence, utilities and the public sector. Its stated purpose is keeping national infrastructure connected, resilient and secure. The Telent business was formed in 2006 from the residual UK services business of Marconi, with the underlying legal entity tracing to 1961.

## Products and solutions

- **Defence** - secure communications and digital infrastructure for the armed forces.
- **Rail** - rail and metro communications and control systems, including Network Rail's nationwide SCADA programme.
- **Public safety** - emergency services communications and logistics for coastguard, ambulance, fire and police customers.
- **Traffic** - intelligent traffic systems delivered with National Highways.
- **Service providers** - network build and support for telecoms operators, including full-fibre delivery.
- **Enterprise and public sector** - managed network and IT services, cyber security, and integrated warehouse logistics systems.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Memberships:** ADS Group; techUK (Communications Infrastructure, Central Government, and Justice and Emergency Services groups).

## Recent news

- **2026-01-14** - Won a contract to operate and improve the RAF's SCIDA service across 244 military sites, with delivery from April 2026. [source](https://www.intelligentciso.com/2026/01/14/telent-lands-strategic-contract-to-support-the-rafs-increasing-demand-for-digital-capability/)
- **2025-08** - Acquisition by M Group Services completed following regulatory approval. [source](https://mgroupltd.com/news-insights/m-group-successfully-completes-telent-acquisition/)

## Links

- Website: https://telent.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/telent

## Sources

Public information verified 2026-06-29. Company website (telent.com), Companies House (00703317), ADS Group member directory, techUK, M Group Services, Intelligent CISO, Wikipedia. Owned since August 2025 by M Group Services, itself backed by CVC Capital Partners, hence backed-pe. Registered office is now Stevenage; operational HQ remains Warwick, recorded here.

companies.name: Telesoft Technologies

companies.body:
# Telesoft Technologies

> UK cyber security and telecoms network monitoring company building high-performance network visibility and threat detection systems.

## What they do

Telesoft designs high-performance data communications technologies and systems that let communications service providers, network security organisations and large enterprises monitor, analyse and protect their networks. The company is engineering-led and describes its products as carrier-scale network visibility and threat detection. It runs a UK sovereign Security Operations Centre staffed by SC-cleared analysts and serves service providers, telecoms, government and enterprise customers.

## Products and solutions

- **Telesoft Data Analytics Capability (TDAC) Platform** - cyber security platform for full network visibility and threat detection.
- **Network Detection and Response (NDR)** - network observability and threat mitigation, with FPGA-accelerated processing.
- **Managed SOC services** - 24/7 threat detection and response from a UK sovereign Security Operations Centre.
- **IntSOC / Agentic AI NDR** - autonomous AI-led investigation and detection capability.

## Frameworks, accreditations and memberships

- **Accreditations:** UK sovereign SOC with SC-cleared analysts; supports DEFCON 658 compliance for handling MOD Identifiable Information.

## Recent news

- **2026-03-17** - Published material on agentic AI and Network Detection and Response for critical infrastructure cyber defence. [source](https://www.telesoft-technologies.com/redefining-security-agentic-ai/)
- **2026** - Announced a partnership with ATCO Group to deliver AI-powered cyber security and NDR solutions in Saudi Arabia. [source](https://www.telesoft-technologies.com/vision-2030-ai-powered-securitycybersecurity-saudiarabia/)

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/telesoft-technologies
